name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: McConnell GONE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
I'm in complete disbelief.

I just read THREE polls that show Republicans' odds of retaking the Senate are CRUMBLING.

\-- They're **LOSING** by ONE point in New Hampshire
\-- They're **LOSING** by FOUR points in Nevada
\-- They're **LOSING** by SEVEN points in Arizona

[**I need you to understand what this means: We now have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to build the BIGGEST Democratic Majorities in history and hand McConnell and the Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. So I 'm calling for 11,250 more gifts before our End of Month Deadline to OUTRAISE them, build an UNBEATABLE war chest, and prevent a TOTAL Republican takeover. Can I count on your $3 in this historic moment to protect our House Majority? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)

| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 10/31, 11:59 PM
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $%%CUST_HPC_75%%_](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

I need to be perfectly blunt:

While the polls predict Democrats will clinch control of the Senate...

House Republicans have a **$2 MILLION cash advantage** to defeat our House Majority.

**I know they will use every cent to target my Democrats with attack ads, chip away at our polling lead, and ruin our best chance to win.**

I will not allow Republicans to outspend us and sabotage this opportunity to build the biggest Democratic Majorities in history.

**[So I'm calling for your help to go on the ATTACK and close our budget gap before Republicans completely overpower us. Can I count on your $3 before our End of Month Deadline in 48 hours to defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)
---

Thank you,

Nancy

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. subject: Taliban tried to kill me

I’m running for Congress to keep America safe by securing our border and supporting our military and law enforcement. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae6ca4b91e0f4ea58222c7beab4c35db&_e=I3cwfEF1n0lsZmC6PiSS0TlDUKIDcvHHZ5-FT4wWlsFNYa87ugwXlnjBt_k0Ki2fx8sA6kbLdJUXGoSpJHFQuhkE9Ucoxr1FoXKdOr7pBbz2MVYEEjTkgLBnRq1ko1eGvkrOVUffqN9RFK37tNxUzOU_W-7NmOySeguS4t8pbd076BI0aIICRhQY5hu9CxTVY4wt-H0V85TkznxlkOggHViO5FNV6cFuipzRmvRF4Lp_dug2MgIzB5jBj4PmGtCZJSUJrVAAnx-YWU9PR0fsm0ubUPp_GYMDkIh3ILH8XLzIkF3nMeshMAWE-SW_KpQB9N351EPPSUhAo08hQu_WwDFHwHHuUC1GrzMVmb4z4dus7Y59YDcdQfvMokPHtoO-jdJwZHUVVT5d2m9hP4XkNXp4zbqumagiK7JUdebxP6vhWQNpzigbZ3xwWSmxLRFTlcsO1vPfb9gzL8zMzfRo5w%3D%3D)

Peter,

I’m Shawn Collins – **a proud black conservative Republican, Navy combat veteran, and active Navy reservist running for Congress in California’s 45th District.**

I’m running against liberal Congresswoman Katie Porter – a self-proclaimed socialist who hangs out with the squad and co-chaired Elizabeth Warren’s presidential campaign.

[**I need help from grassroots conservatives like you to flip this top-target House seat and win back a Republican House majority so we can put a stop to the Biden agenda.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae6ca4b91e0f4ea58222c7beab4c35db&_e=I3cwfEF1n0lsZmC6PiSS0TlDUKIDcvHHZ5-FT4wWlsFNYa87ugwXlnjBt_k0Ki2fx8sA6kbLdJUXGoSpJHFQuhkE9Ucoxr1FoXKdOr7pBbz2MVYEEjTkgLBnRq1ko1eGvkrOVUffqN9RFK37tNxUzOU_W-7NmOySeguS4t8pbd076BI0aIICRhQY5hu9CxTVY4wt-H0V85TkznxlkOggHViO5FNV6cFuipzRmvRF4Lp_dug2MgIzB5jBj4PmGtCZ0NIDxOPcYoph8sU-1v4gk2qlKmeNEb3xejxmmQ0mJbE3_2sI9fz9OSuw8qgIOe308EKcAQuP1GPMSOQ0athuiZBFF0dV1cybSHLF7go4R2HAVHPgE2LyCF1qGYNEPAtrB9leJYi_Rfsm_4LPNj-bORby_m74WUoTaKJh-eXQ-X26ULcwVubz0J2Q_S7hGfCr06e2eCySVIIgaZUPiLkhjQ%3D%3D)

But first, I want to tell you about my service in the Navy...

After I graduated from law school, I answered the call to serve my country and enlisted in the United States Navy.

Just one year after my wife Zeina and I got married, I volunteered for a combat deployment to Afghanistan.

While stationed near Kandahar City, Afghanistan – the birthplace of the Taliban – I coordinated with Special Forces units to help them track down and arrest suspected terrorist suicide bombers. Our work saved countless lives.

But wearing the American flag on my sleeve made me a target, **and I was fortunate to survive two suicide bombing attacks.**

Now, everything I and thousands of other soldiers fought for – and even died for – in Afghanistan has been undone by Biden’s failed military withdrawal.

This failure has left Americans and our allies stranded, left our weaponry and supplies in the hands of the Taliban, and resulted in more deaths of innocent civilians – including woman and children – along with American troops.

Yet Biden, my opponent Katie Porter, and the Democrats have moved on and are seemingly ignoring what happened and what is still happening.

**This failure, combined with the lack of security at our southern border which would permit even terrorists to cross unnoticed, means America is less safe than it was a year ago.**

There’s absolutely no doubt – [**American needs new leadership, and I’m running for Congress to give it to us.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae6ca4b91e0f4ea58222c7beab4c35db&_e=I3cwfEF1n0lsZmC6PiSS0TlDUKIDcvHHZ5-FT4wWlsFNYa87ugwXlnjBt_k0Ki2fx8sA6kbLdJUXGoSpJHFQuhkE9Ucoxr1FoXKdOr7pBbz2MVYEEjTkgLBnRq1ko1eGvkrOVUffqN9RFK37tNxUzOU_W-7NmOySeguS4t8pbd076BI0aIICRhQY5hu9CxTVY4wt-H0V85TkznxlkOggHViO5FNV6cFuipzRmvRF4Lp_dug2MgIzB5jBj4PmGtCZXqXf_Ulni7XwojZPMJfQQsyUzwn-UHrBcqiluS5Jns3JeUJ_aRsBUOexTZy4FnocOOZbLNIFfG3r9w6rNyNVIhw7psGP02C3ev3UMcUza63VMMfZrl-62nY9abypMAgEOwt0mWBJfaNSUupmj6nehv7i7juceWiMSjetoajkAHWeCjSmsPd1hXB6lhArl06AA1sy0-5MQINrXd5dCPsQXg%3D%3D)

But I need your help. The Left knows that a **black, conservative, Navy veteran with Afghanistan combat experience who is focused on real solutions** is exactly the kind of candidate who can defeat them in this current climate, _which is why they’re already targeting me._

I’m running for Congress to keep America safe by securing our border and supporting our military and law enforcement.

[**Will you help me fend off attacks from the Left and restore responsible conservative leadership in America by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or more to my campaign today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ae6ca4b91e0f4ea58222c7beab4c35db&_e=I3cwfEF1n0lsZmC6PiSS0TlDUKIDcvHHZ5-FT4wWlsFNYa87ugwXlnjBt_k0Ki2fx8sA6kbLdJUXGoSpJHFQuhkE9Ucoxr1FoXKdOr7pBbz2MVYEEjTkgLBnRq1ko1eGvkrOVUffqN9RFK37tNxUzOU_W-7NmOySeguS4t8pbd076BI0aIICRhQY5hu9CxTVY4wt-H0V85TkznxlkOggHViO5FNV6cFuipzRmvRF4Lp_dug2MgIzB5jBj4PmGtCZUQJ3lHYxt7mtWf7rC7nY-MbTCnw6Mi3g2s-Rx73Qd08EzJCIjkgGA6Ufxlge3pFPnWGXbsxy2zLwXNM67C5SOmI7ticIpwyV6nlfQFJsgzq1trwNUgoOMu7jSqy2vqKVlo1NZxyOzXVWFqwcakRByiEfkDd2G9Ib1mL5BafOEbIRqB527qhghXhtf4UGVFlnnlga4l-1_sNzkoQX3x4TdQ%3D%3D)

Thanks,

Shawn Collins
U.S. Navy veteran
Republican for Congress

name: Mississippi Freedom Caucus
subject: You are invited to the Freedom Caucus Dinner
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODA3NTYyNjYxMzQxMTc0MDgxJmM9cDJvOCZlPTAmYj03NzUyNjYwMDgmZD1oNHQ2azZy.GUv1mRP6SyiKd12VZgT1Vjao0rL2FAKnD4duhXsvsOc)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Freedom Caucus Dinner - November 11, 2021
---
| |
---
| You are invited
---
Space in limited so make your reservations today - Dinner is provided by AFP-MS and members of the Freedom Caucus will honor veterans and discuss the state of our state. We hope you will come!
| [Click here to Make your Reservation NOW!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODA3NTYyNjYxMzQxMTc0MDgxJmM9cDJvOCZlPTAmYj03NzUyNjYwMTQmZD1nM2UzZzRh.X9n-ZYHWLxtGKJZYqu7P3SNhM8hzo2JmhbNr65-fok8)
---
---
| |
---
| The Mississippi Freedom Caucus invites you to dinner honoring veterans hosted by AFP-MS on November 11th, from 6:00PM-7:30PM, at the Gin in Nesbit, MS. The Freedom Caucus was founded by elected officials who deeply believe in both freedom and individual liberty for the people of Mississippi. The members strive to represent the voice of citizens who want bold action to protect life, strengthen families, defend our constitutional rights, limit government, and revitalize personal and economic freedoms in the state of Mississippi. Join us for dinner to honor all the American Veterans, on Veteran’s day, who fought for our freedom, as we hear from the members of the Freedom Caucus – Brady Williamson, Dan Eubanks, Dana Criswell, Steve Hopkins, and Chris Brown.

---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Learn more about the Mississippi Freedom Caucus
---
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is founded by elected officials who believe in freedom and liberty for the people of Mississippi. We are the voice of citizens who want bold action to protect life, strengthen families, defend our constitutional rights, limit government, and revitalize personal and economic freedoms in the state of Mississippi.
| [Find out more](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODA3NTYyNjYxMzQxMTc0MDgxJmM9cDJvOCZlPTAmYj03NzUyNjYwMjAmZD1oNm4yaTR3.mVZYRbqjHZQ6US9e0IEIJb_4gDBkMqKYOKYVY4Vgp7o)

| | Hi Team Sisolak, I wanted to formally introduce myself -- I’m Sam Barrett, Steve’s campaign manager! I’m reaching out to you because, as we get closer to the election, I want to stay in touch with this team, and keep you up to date on this critical race. One thing I wanted to talk to you about is our end-of-month deadline. **The deadline is coming up this Sunday at midnight -- and I’ll be honest, we’re not where we’d like to be.** So, can I ask you to chip in before our books close Sunday night? I know this team always steps up to help Steve, and**[I’m hoping I can count on you to give $25, $15, or even $5 to help us catch up?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3GljEB-TJ2YVe3zYBQD4sThnH5S4zOSFRMZJ_Npumav25a-wFvVjcH8mXRq-Nz9QLmwVpE2SJmgWMSjx_mRd36f48h8wqrjuH2PwqLKAhsf2V2jiS5jPFrxefZrLHYbSJ4hOQume0Xu6lURLREnEp_gWwsIc7S5VJ-5Xk0IuONbM2QccdteS1pyUxwH3y-2RFfOpve2sr2-0R0I6XVcaOpg3vqT25Z3KW_XiG8vpuNp05STnh2BbXUOLp3iPT4cUxv4_tbTPLfSGR9KSrS5w9rLCWCdxTR-jI4KTcy22a8ByBN-MF4Q0pg_1hPmFpTD-DHifLrfvXBHBr8G3VMm4JlrL9/3gl/I14I0Q6VRSGWtqNU1cTVyQ/h1/CqbytDeGrXC5UZ3Uu-jWcrF4UOHapl_nZYPlkeg2s_Y)** | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3GljEB-TJ2YVe3zYBQD4sThnH5S4zOSFRMZJ_Npumav25az5DaR4M6uYn6kdGt2qY0WjqZZgZRc4iIF0N1hwY3oUeoemlT5f8oE4o-vwhlSZMLHZb_Vz42YcY7AOuGhPxIWrTgSQUNYyMv8X2rxRJN3U3VOS4fHrglGunH5FMQFZ0TEAMYs_g2QQuSUEGkXOEewvNLy1sO2Wxxjt2S-hc30NprhEFzo6ssfp_BMMaLYv9azFfMHtDXxSt5taHu2ukjoJ_M4PVuEO1OQBYbkgsog40IyD0BT0CPccVIEY7l4dglFxTEMQ8zcp-f-GmOoIsGU-9SxjjVJD3enNfaZ5FjlSL/3gl/I14I0Q6VRSGWtqNU1cTVyQ/h2/4bZoO6azboszwLrGbnbPpndUmaUC0qUTKUPHbSd-Wt4)

I won’t beat around the bush, we’ve got a _lot_ of ground to cover before the election. Steve is facing six MAGA Republicans who are ready to roll back all of the progress he's made for Nevada.
I’ve worked on a lot of competitive races, so believe me when I say this is going to be a tough one -- and we’re going to need all hands on deck to make it to the finish line.
I’ve seen what this grassroots team can do, and I can’t wait to show Steve’s Republican opponents that he has a strong coalition of grassroots supporters ready to back him up.
**[So, will you chip in as we prepare for the fight to Keep Nevada Blue?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3GljEB-TJ2YVe3zYBQD4sThnH5S4zOSFRMZJ_Npumav25awHmt-zrqyC7B8v4QklKiAHmL6sZpffumz8LYKJIRGUWzL541jmbNC9prKhPF700IhVYgGXgJWNeZ-y7Qi2OONSw0Wp5dauQ42-_e1F_XGxrpWy41KkzHiHCuEmrtgXchIlZcFTmh_YFvDfp4OdL9DW4M-5B2BIkUuMKOqonEEExz_uufTkh8xyOQ8N0FS49mSUHAy-tg27hDJVouozvsK0_R-rXMCd02w1GzzSVTjhSspqodP-ct7FMIQL8BlAy1__yJNFHgltmaxIZkFq-UghdLslmWAr7Uti7RDzGv2au/3gl/I14I0Q6VRSGWtqNU1cTVyQ/h8/vZQxunN55y9yVXJgfOW0M_ARvjX0UB_AxctLYlc9V14)**

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Team Sisolak, I wanted to formally introduce myself -- I’m Sam Barrett, Steve’s campaign manager! I’m reaching out to you because, as we get closer to the election, I want to stay in touch with this team, and keep you up to date on this critical race. One thing I wanted to talk to you about is our end-of-month deadline. The deadline is coming up this Sunday at midnight -- and I’ll be honest, we’re not where we’d like to be. So, can I ask you to chip in before our books close Sunday night? I know this team always steps up to help Steve, and | | | | | | | | | | | | | I won’t beat around the bush, we’ve got a lot of ground to cover before the election. Steve is facing six MAGA Republicans who are ready to roll back all of the progress he's made for Nevada. I’ve worked on a lot of competitive races, so believe me when I say this is going to be a tough one -- and we’re going to need all hands on deck to make it to the finish line. I’ve seen what this grassroots team can do, and I can’t wait to show Steve’s Republican opponents that he has a strong coalition of grassroots supporters ready to back him up. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Sam Barrett Campaign Manager Steve Sisolak for Governor | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Tom Fitton
subject: January 6 Secrets Exposed
body:
New Fauci Lawsuit

[INSIDE JW]

January 6 Documents Show Police Expected Large Group to March on
Capitol

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26182&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj11S1ZXSjB0TUNDYyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==]

Previously hidden documents show that on the day before the January 6
rally featuring President Trump, US Park Police expected a “large
portion” of the attendees to march to the US Capitol and that the
FBI was monitoring the demonstrations, including travel there by
“subjects of interest.”

In sum, federal law enforcement was closely monitoring the First
Amendment-protected activities of Americans and had plenty of warning
there would be a huge crowd at the US Capitol on January 6.

This was clear in 329 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26136&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXMtcGFyay1wb2xpY2Utc2VwdGVtYmVyLTIwMjEtMDEzMDIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDMwMDIzNDU3]
of
records we received from United States Park Police related to the
January 6, 2021, demonstrations and disturbance at the U.S. Capitol.

We received these documents in response to our May 2021 Freedom of
Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=24982&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctamFuLTYtcGVudGFnb24tdXNwcC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMzAwMjM0NTc=]
filed
after the U.S. Park Police failed to comply with our March 2021 FOIA
request for records regarding the January 6 rally (_Judicial Watch v.
U.S. Department of Department of the Interior
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=24925&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaW50ZXJpb3ItZGMtdHJvb3BzLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTMwMi9dXz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==
(No.
1:21-cv-01302)).

The documents reveal the following:

At 1:39 p.m. on January 6, Park Police Sgt. James Murphy notified
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26137&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXMtcGFyay1wb2xpY2Utc2VwdGVtYmVyLTIwMjEtMDEzMDItcGctMjAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDMwMDIzNDU3]
colleagues:

POTUS event concluded.

Crowds are marching towards Capitol.

Capitol PD working three very suspicious packages around Capitol
proper.

We are checking our NPS areas for suspicious packages out out [sic] an
abundance of caution.

NPS areas are clearing out. Still heavy visitation throughout Mall
Core.

Capitol PD and MPD are engaged with crowd and munitions being
deployed. Crowd has breached the fence lines.

Large crowds at BLM Plaza as well.

In a text exchange
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26138&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXMtcGFyay1wb2xpY2Utc2VwdGVtYmVyLTIwMjEtMDEzMDItcGdzLTQ3LTUzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==]
between
Park Police officials on January 6 beginning at 11:19 a.m., Park
Police Capt. Michael Libby texts colleagues the following:

Large group (200+) of Proud Boys are on the US Capitol grounds. We are
monitoring the groups’ [sic] movements through the city. There are
no large groups of counter protesters currently being tracked.”

Large group has breached the fence line at the west front of the US
Capitol. USCP are handling and not requesting assistance from USPP at
this time.

USCP working three separate suspicious devices.

USCP heavily engaged w/ protestors at the west front of the Capitol.
Chemical munitions and physical altercations on going.

Official Jenny Anzelmo-Sarles replies to this text requesting
clarification: “What does that mean? USCP deploying chemicals or
protesters are deploying chemicals?”

Libby replies, “Both.”

Libby then asks officer Tim Wallace, “Are you in the JOC [Joint
Operations Center]? Are they tracking any large groups other than the
Proud Boys at the capitol?”

Wallace responds, “Not tracking any other splinter groups other than
that one towards the Cap. Right now all focus on these weapons
reports.”

Wallace then informs Libby of an “IED” [Improvised Explosive
Device] located at 300 1st Street, SE. And then of a “Second
device” found at 430 South Capitol Street and asks Libby, “Are you
hearing anything about 2 more devices? Unconfirmed here.”

Libby replies, “No – nothing.”

Wallace later texts Libby, “DC Fire reporting smoke in Capitol.”

Finally, at 2:14 p.m., Libby texts a Coast Guard official: “Capitol
fence has been breached on both sides, east and west. USCP, MPD, and
USPP have our backs to the Capitol wall ... Mutual Aid assistance has
been requested to all metro LE agencies.”

On January 6, 2021, a situation report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26139&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXMtcGFyay1wb2xpY2Utc2VwdGVtYmVyLTIwMjEtMDEzMDItcGdzLTQxLTQ1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==]
submitted
by Adamchik details the following:

[Metropolitan Police] declared the activity a riot (per commander
assigned to the [Metropolitan Police-Joint Operations Command
Center]). USCP [US Capitol Police] and [Metropolitan Police] both
reported empty on less lethal pepper ball at the West Front of the
Capitol and were actively being assaulted.... [Park Police] had pepper
ball and pepper spray engagements with criminal actors actively
assaulting officers, destroying property and crossing a police line.

In a January 6 FBI situation report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26140&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXMtcGFyay1wb2xpY2Utc2VwdGVtYmVyLTIwMjEtMDEzMDItcGdzLTE3LTE5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==]
sent
to the Park Police at 10:28 am on January 6, the FBI reported:

No civil disobedience reported at this time” in the “Active
Crowds,” which included “10,000 plus waiting in line” to go
through magnetometers to be on the Ellipse during Trump’s speech.

***

Currently, the IOC [Information Operations Center] is monitoring the
suspected or reported travel of [redacted] subjects of interest from
various field offices [redacted]. [Redacted] of the subjects were
reported as not traveling to the NCR [National Capital Region]. As of
1000, the IOC had not confirmed the arrival for the rest of these
subjects of interest in Washington, DC.

The FBI’s IOC was “tracking” the following events: Freedom
Rally, Wild Protest, Jericho March and Save America Rally. The report
was forwarded to Park Police Capt. Michael Libby, who told colleagues
a, “Large group (200+) of Proud Boys are on the US Capitol grounds.
We are monitoring the groups’ [sic] movements through the city.
There are no large groups of counter protesters currently being
tracked.”

In a January 6, 2021, situation report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26141&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXMtcGFyay1wb2xpY2Utc2VwdGVtYmVyLTIwMjEtMDEzMDItcGctMTUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDMwMDIzNDU3]
Park
Police Major Mark Adamchik, advises colleagues “in addition to the
pepper ball team, USPP has offered portions of the Motorcycle Unit for
dignitary escorts as well as a cadre of [redacted].” Adamchik also
notes that, “No injuries to USPP personnel.”

In a January 5, 2021, Park Police “Incident Briefing
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26142&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXMtcGFyay1wb2xpY2Utc2VwdGVtYmVyLTIwMjEtMDEzMDItcGdzLTI2OS0yNzUvXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==
report, the purpose of the January 6 rally was described in part as
being “to protest election integrity.” The report notes:

This group has significant potential to attract counter-protesters,
similar to events in November and December 2020. Multiple acts of
violence have occurred in the downtown Washington, DC area during and
after similar events hosted by the same organizer.

***

As long as POTUS has finished speaking, we still expect a large
portion of this group to depart the Ellipse at some point and march to
the U.S. Capitol prior to 1300 hours.

On January 5, 2021, in an email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26143&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXMtcGFyay1wb2xpY2Utc2VwdGVtYmVyLTIwMjEtMDEzMDItcGdzLTgzLTg0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==]
with
the subject line “BLM from Baltimore,” a Capitol Police official
in the Intelligence and Interagency Coordination Division forwarded a
tweet to colleagues that warned of “Pantifa/bLM Balt/DC branches are
already bussing in people to disturb January 6th. Orders given to
dress like ‘MAGA’ blend in cause trouble especially around
cameras. At night arson has been ordered. All to be blamed on Trump
supporters attending.” The police official notes “There are
multiple replies to this comment that says BLM/Antif will wear MAGA
hats backwards, wear camo, and attempt to blend in with MAGA crowd.”

The January 5, 2021 “Daily Operational Snapshot
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26145&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdXMtcGFyay1wb2xpY2Utc2VwdGVtYmVyLTIwMjEtMDEzMDItcGctNjYvXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==
notes: “Reported Proud Boys leader, Enrique TARRIO was arrested on 4
January by the Metropolitan Police Department on an outstanding DC
Superior Court arrest warrant. It is unknown what effect this will

against the U.S. Department of Health
and Human Services (HHS) for the employment contracts; financial,
conflict of interest, and confidentiality disclosure documents; and
job description of National Institute of Allergy and Infectious
Diseases (NIAID) Director Anthony S. Fauci, M.D. We’re also seeking
details on royalties paid to NIH employees by outside entities
(_American Transparency, DBA OpenTheBooks.com v. U.S. Department of
Health and Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26166&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL29wZW50aGVib29rcy1jb20tdi1oaHMtZmF1Y2ktY29tcGxhaW50LTAyODIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==]
(No.
1:21-cv-02821)).

We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after
the National Institutes of Health (NIH), which is an agency of HHS,
failed to comply fully with three FOIA requests filed between January
28, 2021, and September 2021, for the following records about Dr.
Fauci:

* All employment contracts, modifications and addendums since hiring
as Director of National Institute for Health, National Institute of
Allergy and Infectious Diseases. (January 28, 2021)
* Daily calendar from 1/1/2019 to the present time. (January 28,
2021) (After a phone call in January with NIH, we agreed to narrow our
request and took this calendar request out
* Any confidentiality documents, conflict documents, and economic
interest disclosure documents. (January 28, 2021)
* Current job description. (January 28, 2021)
* Any confidentiality agreements, conflict of interest documents,
and economic interest disclosure documents pertaining to calendar year
2020 to the present. These include but are not limited to the OGE Form
278e and accompanying paperwork filed for 2020 with a May 2021
deadline. (May 27, 2021)
* A complete list/database of all personal royalties paid
(including, but not limited to, FY2020) to current and former National
Institutes of Health employees for work done while they were federally
employed. The list/database should include, but not be limited to, the
royalty recipient’s name, the amount of the royalty, the reason for
the royalty, the date the royalty was paid, and the name of the entity
paying the royalty. (September 15, 2021)

shouldn’t take a subpoena or a lawsuit to force open basic
employment documents that executive-level federal bureaucrats are

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=25135&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZm9pYS1jb3ZpZC13dWhhbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMzAwMjM0NTc=]
the
filing of FOIA lawsuits against the Office of the Director of National
Intelligence (ODNI) and the State Department for information on the
Wuhan Institute of Virology and the origins of the SARS-CoV-2 virus.

In March 2021, Judicial Watch, through a lawsuit filed on behalf of
the Daily Caller News Foundation, uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26171&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZW1haWxzLXdoby10ZXJtcy82P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDMwMDIzNDU3]
emails
and other records of Fauci and Dr. H. Clifford Lane from HHS showing
that NIH officials tailored confidentiality forms to China’s terms
and that the World Health Organization (WHO) conducted an unreleased,
“strictly confidential” COVID-19 epidemiological analysis in
January 2020.

In October 2020, Judicial Watch, through a lawsuit filed on behalf of
the Daily Caller News Foundation, received from HHS 300 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=21023&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmF1Y2ktZW1haWxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==]
of
Fauci’s emails, including his approval of a press release supportive
of China’s response to the 2019 novel coronavirus.

Anthony Fauci wields unrivaled political power in our federal
government, so it is urgent the American people have full access to
his financial disclosures. That we had to file a federal lawsuit about
Dr. Fauci’s financial disclosures and other basic employment (and
Covid!) information raises a host of concerning questions.

RECORD-BREAKING MEXICAN BORDER ARRESTS, CARAVAN EN ROUTE, PANAMA WARNS
65K MORE

Our border is now wide open, thanks to Joe Biden, and the tidal wave
of illegal immigrants is staggering. And they’re coming from
everywhere. Our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog has the latest numbers
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26172&F=T&].

Not only was the record for illegal immigrant apprehensions along the
southern border shattered in 2021, the fiscal year, which ended in
September, concluded with a bang—a final month spike of migrants
from Haiti (132%), Turkey (89%), India (82%), Ukraine (81%) and even
China (75%). The number of illegal aliens from Russia nearly doubled
from 758 to 1,432 during the same period, according to
year-end figures
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26173&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JwLmdvdi9uZXdzcm9vbS9zdGF0cy9zb3V0aHdlc3QtbGFuZC1ib3JkZXItZW5jb3VudGVycy1ieS1jb21wb25lbnQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMzAwMjM0NTc=]
provided
this month by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). The chilling
stats illustrate the magnitude of the national security and
humanitarian crisis created by the Biden administration’s disastrous
open border policies.

Federal agents apprehended an astounding 1,659,206 illegal immigrants
at the southwest border in 2021, breaking the previous high of
1,643,679
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26174&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JwLmdvdi9zaXRlcy9kZWZhdWx0L2ZpbGVzL2Fzc2V0cy9kb2N1bWVudHMvMjAyMS1BdWcvVVM1OUI4fjEuUERGP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDMwMDIzNDU3]
in
2000. In the fiscal year 2020, federal agents only arrested 400,651
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26174&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JwLmdvdi9zaXRlcy9kZWZhdWx0L2ZpbGVzL2Fzc2V0cy9kb2N1bWVudHMvMjAyMS1BdWcvVVM1OUI4fjEuUERGP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDMwMDIzNDU3]
on
the southern border. The upsurge in just one year is difficult to
grasp. Eight of the nine Border Patrol sectors saw triple-digit
percentage increases in illegal immigrants over last year and one,
Yuma in Arizona, reported an eye-popping 1,200.4% hike in
apprehensions. The agency’s Del Rio sector in Texas had an
unbelievable 542.7% surge. The Rio Grande Valley sector, also in
Texas, saw a 508.7% increase and led all stations with 549,000
arrests. Del Rio reported 259,000 apprehensions which surpassed Border
Patrol divisions in Texas and Arizona that typically see more traffic.
Two other Texas stations, Big Bend and EL Paso, recorded apprehension
gains of 331.9% and 256.5% respectively. Big Bend and El Centro in
California were the only sectors that did not see six-digit
apprehensions this year, though both reported major increases over
2020—331.9% for Big Bend and 115.4% for El Centro.

Most of the illegal aliens, 608,000, arrested by the U.S. in 2021 came
from Mexico followed by the Central American nations of Honduras
(309,000), Guatemala (279,000) and El Salvador (96,000). In the last
month of the fiscal year, migrants from those four Latin American
countries accounted for well over half (63.7%) of apprehensions along
the Mexican border. The records show that 367,000 arrests included
Haitians, Cubans, Brazilians, Venezuelans, and Ecuadorans. To top the
year, Border Patrol encounters with Haitians rose from 7,590 in August
to a startling 17,639 in September. The final month also saw big
increases in migrants from other countries as well, including
Venezuelans (71%), Romanians (49%) and Colombians (44%).

As the government released last year’s record-breaking figures,
various Spanish-language news outlets report that the “mother of all
caravans” (also known as the “march for liberty, dignity and peace
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26175&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JwLmdvdi9zaXRlcy9kZWZhdWx0L2ZpbGVzL2Fzc2V0cy9kb2N1bWVudHMvMjAyMS1BdWcvVVM1OUI4fjEuUERGXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAzMDAyMzQ1Nw==)
just embarked from the southern Mexican state of Chiapas, which
borders Guatemala. One news story
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26176&F=T&]
estimates
that more than 4,000 illegal immigrants are in the caravan, which of
course, is heading to the U.S. Another Spanish online article
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26177&F=T&],
which includes video of the caravan, says the group consists mainly of
Haitians and Central Americans. Mexican authorities have reportedly
committed to “respecting the rights
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26178&F=T&
of
the illegal aliens, allowing them to march through the country on the
way to the American border. Mexico Foreign Affairs Secretary Marcelo
Ebrard is quoted in a local news story
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26179&F=T&]
saying
that the government will act with prudence and caution in accordance
to human rights laws, though he added that migrants are being fooled
because they will not be allowed to enter the U.S.

It appears that the most recent caravan is just the beginning. A few
weeks ago Panama’s foreign minister, Erika Mouynes, warned that
there are more than 65,000
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26180&F=T&]
mostly
Haitian illegal aliens ready to head north through Latin America.
Since January, more than 86,000 migrants who arrived at the
U.S.-Mexico border went through Panama, according to Mouynes. “We
have been sounding the alarm for months about this,” the Panamanian
official said in a Spanish news article
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57028&L=26180&F=T&]
published
on September 29, adding that the numbers indicate migration will
increase.

Until next week,

clean_body: New Fauci Lawsuit [INSIDE JW] January 6 Documents Show Police Expected Large Group to March on Capitol [==] Previously hidden documents show that on the day before the January 6 rally featuring President Trump, US Park Police expected a “large portion” of the attendees to march to the US Capitol and that the FBI was monitoring the demonstrations, including travel there by “subjects of interest.” In sum, federal law enforcement was closely monitoring the First Amendment-protected activities of Americans and had plenty of warning there would be a huge crowd at the US Capitol on January 6. This was clear in 329 pages [] of records we received from United States Park Police related to the January 6, 2021, demonstrations and disturbance at the U.S. Capitol. We received these documents in response to our May 2021 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [=] filed after the U.S. Park Police failed to comply with our March 2021 FOIA request for records regarding the January 6 rally (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Department of the Interior [== (No. 1:21-cv-01302)). The documents reveal the following: At 1:39 p.m. on January 6, Park Police Sgt. James Murphy notified [] colleagues: POTUS event concluded. Crowds are marching towards Capitol. Capitol PD working three very suspicious packages around Capitol proper. We are checking our NPS areas for suspicious packages out out [sic] an abundance of caution. NPS areas are clearing out. Still heavy visitation throughout Mall Core. Capitol PD and MPD are engaged with crowd and munitions being deployed. Crowd has breached the fence lines. Large crowds at BLM Plaza as well. In a text exchange [==] between Park Police officials on January 6 beginning at 11:19 a.m., Park Police Capt. Michael Libby texts colleagues the following: Large group (200+) of Proud Boys are on the US Capitol grounds. We are monitoring the groups’ [sic] movements through the city. There are no large groups of counter protesters currently being tracked.” Large group has breached the fence line at the west front of the US Capitol. USCP are handling and not requesting assistance from USPP at this time. USCP working three separate suspicious devices. USCP heavily engaged w/ protestors at the west front of the Capitol. Chemical munitions and physical altercations on going. Official Jenny Anzelmo-Sarles replies to this text requesting clarification: “What does that mean? USCP deploying chemicals or protesters are deploying chemicals?” Libby replies, “Both.” Libby then asks officer Tim Wallace, “Are you in the JOC [Joint Operations Center]? Are they tracking any large groups other than the Proud Boys at the capitol?” Wallace responds, “Not tracking any other splinter groups other than that one towards the Cap. Right now all focus on these weapons reports.” Wallace then informs Libby of an “IED” [Improvised Explosive Device] located at 300 1st Street, SE. And then of a “Second device” found at 430 South Capitol Street and asks Libby, “Are you hearing anything about 2 more devices? Unconfirmed here.” Libby replies, “No – nothing.” Wallace later texts Libby, “DC Fire reporting smoke in Capitol.” Finally, at 2:14 p.m., Libby texts a Coast Guard official: “Capitol fence has been breached on both sides, east and west. USCP, MPD, and USPP have our backs to the Capitol wall ... Mutual Aid assistance has been requested to all metro LE agencies.” On January 6, 2021, a situation report [==] submitted by Adamchik details the following: [Metropolitan Police] declared the activity a riot (per commander assigned to the [Metropolitan Police-Joint Operations Command Center]). USCP [US Capitol Police] and [Metropolitan Police] both reported empty on less lethal pepper ball at the West Front of the Capitol and were actively being assaulted.... [Park Police] had pepper ball and pepper spray engagements with criminal actors actively assaulting officers, destroying property and crossing a police line. In a January 6 FBI situation report [==] sent to the Park Police at 10:28 am on January 6, the FBI reported: No civil disobedience reported at this time” in the “Active Crowds,” which included “10,000 plus waiting in line” to go through magnetometers to be on the Ellipse during Trump’s speech. * Currently, the IOC [Information Operations Center] is monitoring the suspected or reported travel of [redacted] subjects of interest from various field offices [redacted]. [Redacted] of the subjects were reported as not traveling to the NCR [National Capital Region]. As of 1000, the IOC had not confirmed the arrival for the rest of these subjects of interest in Washington, DC. The FBI’s IOC was “tracking” the following events: Freedom Rally, Wild Protest, Jericho March and Save America Rally. The report was forwarded to Park Police Capt. Michael Libby, who told colleagues a, “Large group (200+) of Proud Boys are on the US Capitol grounds. We are monitoring the groups’ [sic] movements through the city. There are no large groups of counter protesters currently being tracked.” In a January 6, 2021, situation report [] Park Police Major Mark Adamchik, advises colleagues “in addition to the pepper ball team, USPP has offered portions of the Motorcycle Unit for dignitary escorts as well as a cadre of [redacted].” Adamchik also notes that, “No injuries to USPP personnel.” In a January 5, 2021, Park Police “Incident Briefing [== report, the purpose of the January 6 rally was described in part as being “to protest election integrity.” The report notes: This group has significant potential to attract counter-protesters, similar to events in November and December 2020. Multiple acts of violence have occurred in the downtown Washington, DC area during and after similar events hosted by the same organizer. As long as POTUS has finished speaking, we still expect a large portion of this group to depart the Ellipse at some point and march to the U.S. Capitol prior to 1300 hours. On January 5, 2021, in an email [==] with the subject line “BLM from Baltimore,” a Capitol Police official in the Intelligence and Interagency Coordination Division forwarded a tweet to colleagues that warned of “Pantifa/bLM Balt/DC branches are already bussing in people to disturb January 6th. Orders given to dress like ‘MAGA’ blend in cause trouble especially around cameras. At night arson has been ordered. All to be blamed on Trump supporters attending.” The police official notes “There are multiple replies to this comment that says BLM/Antif will wear MAGA hats backwards, wear camo, and attempt to blend in with MAGA crowd.” The January 5, 2021 “Daily Operational Snapshot [== notes: “Reported Proud Boys leader, Enrique TARRIO was arrested on 4 January by the Metropolitan Police Department on an outstanding DC Superior Court arrest warrant. It is unknown what effect this will have on the actions of the Proud Boys over the next 48 hours. TARRIO was viewed by some as keeping the more violent factions of the Proud Boys ‘under control’ during recent demonstrations in the District.” Also included in this report: “Women for America First will hold a rally on the Ellipse. President Trump is scheduled to speak at this event around 1100 hours. The permit application states that 20,000 people will attend this event. It is expected that a portion of this group will march to the US Capitol prior to 1300 hours.” In a text exchange [] on January 4-5, 2021, Park Police officials discuss the arrest of Proud Boys leader Enrique Tarrio and state that the January 6 rally is being manipulated by a “grand puppeteer:” Official One: “No arrest warrant for [redacted]. Tarrio arrested at 1630.” Official Two: “Copy” Official Two: “I’m assuming he will get kicked tomorrow and still be around for the Wednesday.” Official Two: “Dude this is insane. I’m more confused now than before 9am.” Official One: “These ‘organizers’ are being played by the grand puppeteer and seems like the goal is to confuse, confuse, confuse so they can get what they want when they want it, on their terms. Very annoying. A January 4, 2021, Park Police “Daily Operational Snapshot [== notes: “While the probability of sporadic violent actions is likely if opposing groups are allowed to come into physical contact with each other, at this time we have no indication of any acts of violence being pre-planned by an specific individual(s) or groups.” In a December 30 email [] a DC Metropolitan Police Department official instructed colleagues, “We need PIC [Presidential Inaugural Committee] NOT to release their permits!!!!!” A colleague replies, “Agreed. This is all over the place.” Another police official responds, “POTUS?” David Lamond, Commander of the Park Police Special Events Unit, replies, “I’m more confused than I was before. If am tracking correctly, no one knows what is going on anymore.” An MPD official then mockingly compares that planning to a chaotic football play, “Ok – you go long – [redacted] will fall out to the weak side - [redacted] will go strong side – and [redacted] up the middle – then I’ll pass it off to [redacted] and she will end around on the strong, weak, and middle???” A December 28, 2020, Park Police Executive Brief [==] details the January 6 protest as follows: There is some concern that individuals may display aggressive and desperate behavior as they interpret 6 January as their final opportunity to act on their grievances. A recent event on Christmas morning may directly reference this desperation leading to violent action by a motivated and determined individual. The report references the December 25, 2020, bombing [] in Nashville, TN: While the exact motive behind the bombing remains unknown, there have been some social media postings concerning conspiracy theories stating that election data stored at the AT&T building was targeted by the bomber.... [T]he 25 December bombing should act as a vivid reminder as to the despair and the dedication to act that exists from a small minority of individuals concerning social and political events. The Park Police report also notes: We are aware that many members of the far-right group ‘Proud Boys’ plan on being in Washington on this date. We also expect far-left groups to continue to engage law enforcement and their opposition with weapons such as bottles, bricks, commercial grade fireworks, and laser pointers. On December 22, 2020, a Lieutenant of the MPD Special Operations Branch messaged [==] colleagues, “Well, here we go again. I am sure you are aware of the First Amendment demonstrations to occur again on Wednesday, January 6, 2021; hopefully it will not be as big as the November 14th or December 12, 2020, weekend.” In a December 19, 2020, email [==] to Capitol Police and US Park Police colleagues, an MPD Homeland Security Bureau official told them he was “hoping” that an announcement about an upcoming pro-Trump rally in January “is a hoax.” In a December 18, 2020, text exchange [], two Park Police officials had the following conversation: Official One: “Good one two punch there.” Official Two: “I took a clipping penalty but scored 2 points for a takedown.” <laughing emoji> Official One: “Got her to slip up and say she is just going [sic] what the president is telling them to do.” Official Two: “Interview and Interrogation Training paid off.” <laughing emoji> Official One: “45 minutes of my life I’ve never get back.” Official One: “I am not tracking one actionablebthing [sic] I can do with what she provided.” Official Two: “We need to convince the pic [Presidential Inaugural Committee] not to give up their regulatory preference.” Official One: “That ship may have already sailed I’ll follow up.” Official Two: “Mark filled me in some back story about Justin and RNC [Republican National Convention]” Official One: “Yup” In a situation report [] sent on December 12, 2020, about “First Amendment Demonstrations” notes, “Currently there are 2000 people (Proud Boys group) on the Washington Monument grounds, within the flagpole circle. At 1303 hours, there was a fight involving this group, which broke up without incident.” This lawsuit is part of our comprehensive investigation into the January 6 disturbance. Earlier this month, we received records [=] from the DC Metropolitan Police about the shooting death of Ashli Babbitt on January 6, 2021, in the U.S. Capitol Building. On August 3, we obtained new documents [=] showing the Washington, D.C. Medical Examiner submitted a request to cremate Babbitt two days after gaining custody of her body. Also in August, we uncovered [==] records related to the death of U.S. Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick which show major media representatives pressuring the Office of the Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) of the District of Columbia over its conclusion that Officer Sicknick had died of natural causes [=]. In July, we announced a lawsuit [==] against the FBI for records of communication between the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) and several financial institutions about the reported transfer of financial transactions made by people in DC, Maryland and Virginia on January 5 and January 6, 2021. The FBI has refused to confirm or deny the existence of any such records. In May, we sued [=] both the Department of the Interior and the Department of Defense for records regarding the deployment of armed forces around the Capitol complex in Washington, D.C., in January and February of 2021. We also filed a lawsuit for Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s communications [==] with the Pentagon in the days after the January 6 incident. As Speaker Pelosi’s January 6 star chamber proceeding abuse and targets [=] the First Amendment rights of Americans, using the Capitol disturbance as a pretext, your Judicial Watch is stepping up to conduct an independent and honest investigation. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FAUCI FINANCIAL RECORDS & ROYALTIES PAID TO NIH EMPLOYEES Anthony Fauci is a federal bureaucrat who assumes the authority to tell Americans what we can do on holidays and how our children must be treated at school. He deserves thorough scrutiny, and we are obliging. We filed a FOIA lawsuit on behalf of OpenTheBooks.com [=] against the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) for the employment contracts; financial, conflict of interest, and confidentiality disclosure documents; and job description of National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) Director Anthony S. Fauci, M.D. We’re also seeking details on royalties paid to NIH employees by outside entities (American Transparency, DBA OpenTheBooks.com v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services [==] (No. 1:21-cv-02821)). We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the National Institutes of Health (NIH), which is an agency of HHS, failed to comply fully with three FOIA requests filed between January 28, 2021, and September 2021, for the following records about Dr. Fauci: All employment contracts, modifications and addendums since hiring as Director of National Institute for Health, National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases. (January 28, 2021) Daily calendar from 1/1/2019 to the present time. (January 28, 2021) (After a phone call in January with NIH, we agreed to narrow our request and took this calendar request out Any confidentiality documents, conflict documents, and economic interest disclosure documents. (January 28, 2021) Current job description. (January 28, 2021) Any confidentiality agreements, conflict of interest documents, and economic interest disclosure documents pertaining to calendar year 2020 to the present. These include but are not limited to the OGE Form 278e and accompanying paperwork filed for 2020 with a May 2021 deadline. (May 27, 2021) * A complete list/database of all personal royalties paid (including, but not limited to, FY2020) to current and former National Institutes of Health employees for work done while they were federally employed. The list/database should include, but not be limited to, the royalty recipient’s name, the amount of the royalty, the reason for the royalty, the date the royalty was paid, and the name of the entity paying the royalty. (September 15, 2021) “No one is above the law, including Dr. Anthony Fauci. It shouldn’t take a subpoena or a lawsuit to force open basic employment documents that executive-level federal bureaucrats are required by law to file,” said Adam Andrzejewski, CEO and founder of OpenTheBooks.com []. “We thank Judicial Watch for being a good friend and partner in this important matter.” About OpenTheBooks.com [= Last year, the organization filed 40,500 FOIA requests – the most in American history. They successfully captured $6 trillion in federal, state, and local spending. In January 2021, their investigation found that Anthony Fauci was the #1 most highly compensated federal employee – even out earning the president, here [=]. Through previous FOIA lawsuits, we uncovered [=] noteworthy Fauci emails and CDC/NIAID records. In July 2021, we uncovered [=] emails and other records from NIAID officials in connection with the Wuhan Institute of Virology in Wuhan, China, revealing significant collaborations and funding that began in 2014. Also in July 2021, we uncovered [] CDC records showing that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising given to the CDC by social media companies. In June 2021, we revealed [=] that the NIAID under Fauci gave the Wuhan lab $826,000 for bat coronavirus research from 2014 to 2019. Also in June, we announced [=] the filing of FOIA lawsuits against the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI) and the State Department for information on the Wuhan Institute of Virology and the origins of the SARS-CoV-2 virus. In March 2021, Judicial Watch, through a lawsuit filed on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation, uncovered [] emails and other records of Fauci and Dr. H. Clifford Lane from HHS showing that NIH officials tailored confidentiality forms to China’s terms and that the World Health Organization (WHO) conducted an unreleased, “strictly confidential” COVID-19 epidemiological analysis in January 2020. In October 2020, Judicial Watch, through a lawsuit filed on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation, received from HHS 300 pages [==] of Fauci’s emails, including his approval of a press release supportive of China’s response to the 2019 novel coronavirus. Anthony Fauci wields unrivaled political power in our federal government, so it is urgent the American people have full access to his financial disclosures. That we had to file a federal lawsuit about Dr. Fauci’s financial disclosures and other basic employment (and Covid!) information raises a host of concerning questions. RECORD-BREAKING MEXICAN BORDER ARRESTS, CARAVAN EN ROUTE, PANAMA WARNS 65K MORE Our border is now wide open, thanks to Joe Biden, and the tidal wave of illegal immigrants is staggering. And they’re coming from everywhere. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the latest numbers []. Not only was the record for illegal immigrant apprehensions along the southern border shattered in 2021, the fiscal year, which ended in September, concluded with a bang—a final month spike of migrants from Haiti (132%), Turkey (89%), India (82%), Ukraine (81%) and even China (75%). The number of illegal aliens from Russia nearly doubled from 758 to 1,432 during the same period, according to year-end figures [=] provided this month by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). The chilling stats illustrate the magnitude of the national security and humanitarian crisis created by the Biden administration’s disastrous open border policies. Federal agents apprehended an astounding 1,659,206 illegal immigrants at the southwest border in 2021, breaking the previous high of 1,643,679 [] in 2000. In the fiscal year 2020, federal agents only arrested 400,651 [] on the southern border. The upsurge in just one year is difficult to grasp. Eight of the nine Border Patrol sectors saw triple-digit percentage increases in illegal immigrants over last year and one, Yuma in Arizona, reported an eye-popping 1,200.4% hike in apprehensions. The agency’s Del Rio sector in Texas had an unbelievable 542.7% surge. The Rio Grande Valley sector, also in Texas, saw a 508.7% increase and led all stations with 549,000 arrests. Del Rio reported 259,000 apprehensions which surpassed Border Patrol divisions in Texas and Arizona that typically see more traffic. Two other Texas stations, Big Bend and EL Paso, recorded apprehension gains of 331.9% and 256.5% respectively. Big Bend and El Centro in California were the only sectors that did not see six-digit apprehensions this year, though both reported major increases over 2020—331.9% for Big Bend and 115.4% for El Centro. Most of the illegal aliens, 608,000, arrested by the U.S. in 2021 came from Mexico followed by the Central American nations of Honduras (309,000), Guatemala (279,000) and El Salvador (96,000). In the last month of the fiscal year, migrants from those four Latin American countries accounted for well over half (63.7%) of apprehensions along the Mexican border. The records show that 367,000 arrests included Haitians, Cubans, Brazilians, Venezuelans, and Ecuadorans. To top the year, Border Patrol encounters with Haitians rose from 7,590 in August to a startling 17,639 in September. The final month also saw big increases in migrants from other countries as well, including Venezuelans (71%), Romanians (49%) and Colombians (44%). As the government released last year’s record-breaking figures, various Spanish-language news outlets report that the “mother of all caravans” (also known as the “march for liberty, dignity and peace [==) just embarked from the southern Mexican state of Chiapas, which borders Guatemala. One news story [==] estimates that more than 4,000 illegal immigrants are in the caravan, which of course, is heading to the U.S. Another Spanish online article [], which includes video of the caravan, says the group consists mainly of Haitians and Central Americans. Mexican authorities have reportedly committed to “respecting the rights [= of the illegal aliens, allowing them to march through the country on the way to the American border. Mexico Foreign Affairs Secretary Marcelo Ebrard is quoted in a local news story [==] saying that the government will act with prudence and caution in accordance to human rights laws, though he added that migrants are being fooled because they will not be allowed to enter the U.S. It appears that the most recent caravan is just the beginning. A few weeks ago Panama’s foreign minister, Erika Mouynes, warned that there are more than 65,000 [=] mostly Haitian illegal aliens ready to head north through Latin America. Since January, more than 86,000 migrants who arrived at the U.S.-Mexico border went through Panama, according to Mouynes. “We have been sounding the alarm for months about this,” the Panamanian official said in a Spanish news article [=] published on September 29, adding that the numbers indicate migration will increase. Until next week, [Contribute] [] <a href="" target="blank"><img alt="WU01" src="" style="width:100%; height:auto;" /></a> [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2021, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

Friend,

It breaks my heart to say this: **_American national pride has fallen to an all-time low.

This is due to an extreme Anti-American push from the Left._** The Radical Left agenda is based on **_Anti-American sentiments and values._ This is just so wrong.**

I don’t know about you, but I am and always will be **PROUD** to be an American. It has been the honor of my life to serve as Indiana’s Senator.

To show my pride, my team and I have decided to **double every donation made in the next 24 hours.** We owe it to you -- and this country -- to show that American pride still exists.

Republicans are showing tons of enthusiasm about voting for their guy.

And now, Donald Trump is making a last-minute plan to campaign in Virginia to help seal the deal for fellow extremist Glenn Youngkin.

So we’ve got to do everything we can to ensure we turn out a record-breaking number of voters.

This final fundraising goal is all about turning out those voters — **everything you contribute right now will go directly toward getting voters to the polls on or before Election Day.**

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8910%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KjsR8egL8VG9Kf9rt9TYfQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16471%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gsCn4DD%2fBsO%2fnyl%2brqA8tQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16472%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o5m4uz8KhDIjOMZd8vh%2b4A&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16472%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o5m4uz8KhDIjOMZd8vh%2b4A&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8910%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KjsR8egL8VG9Kf9rt9TYfQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8910%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KjsR8egL8VG9Kf9rt9TYfQ&sysid=1)

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z08qc146rav4nlvcs4ipbosaj00ahqmg49juv5go_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clge1oj0shh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjk1nntrqp4lp1rtf5haldtb0oo4sqknh98t1hf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clge1oj0shh2bs)

body:

In a moment, I'm going to ask you for a [**few bucks to win THE most important House race in America, keep Texas red, AND save America**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58650318:JAVtlP2N3:m:1:3298722022:9BEF9151B339718CBA2B6B0A4C1FE3BF:r) \-- but first, here's what you need to know about me:

\-- I'm a proud Conservative

Liberals like Nancy Pelosi, Beto O'Rourke, Stacey Abrams, and Joe Biden want to flip Texas blue MORE THAN ANYTHING. **It 's the grand prize. They know if Democrats edge us out in our great state, we'll lose everything.**
[**I 'll never let that happen if it's the last thing I do.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58650318:JAVtlP2N3:m:1:3298722022:9BEF9151B339718CBA2B6B0A4C1FE3BF:r) I'm teaming up with Republican Whip Steve Scalise because Democrats just outraised us by $10,000,000 and I'm worried. _With that much cash stacked against us, they could pull off the impossible ..._
This is officially an emergency situation.
That's why I'm calling out to every MAGA Conservative and humbly requesting your help before our big midnight deadline. I'm asking you as a personal favor: can you help?

I'm running in the most important race in America and you won't believe how vicious the attacks are. Democrats are dragging my name -- **as well as President Trump 's** \-- through the mud at this very moment. And now they have tens of millions to unleash against us.

name: American Defense News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpf2ldu819macoughsss594q2h9gnmvl8hm4dklo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqn8tb5e4pjcc9ie3gj1dlhepo72thm6eq72srk6gqe4dtkspon4dlkcupr4sbn6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imlj33dpl6hg7cob6e4ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6clim1o74cjhm49fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuu2cb5prvc8qc09636tap88d601jpmabt5c1oa0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clge1p34sdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkk4dpjem0210vfm6k1vf0ucm36htuu08ekb99gg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clge1p34sdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0mflr07gb5nl4jqmf8js6mqd6et1t4ddpsh3j70_rp22sh2s8i66pj5clge1p34sdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Baker/Polito's No Good, Very Bad, Week
body:
Diehl Tops Baker in Poll 57-25
| | | |
---
---
---
| October 30, 2021
As we wrap up October, let's take a look at Charlie Baker and Karyn Polito's no good, very bad, week.
First, they went after our law enforcement officers, removing them from their jobs because they refused to submit to the vaccine mandate: [Stabbed In The Back - YouTube](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jk3gNJFERpnfE3mcS4QPoqSbA01-mylV0eydLlS_hth-tXOgw2tMsGSYvrCflFLniyS6LtrWlTAghxnp9jiKd3AOMkpzl1Db1yiDuEQ2pHz7elYZ1rm3zJl9tWBy3LOaFTHzxg1zZMF9HbYYK97l5tcQ6mPRC03PuAoucMWt4MtdPA8iAog2rA==&c=qaSn3mf3ehwSZvdgrdJcBaYjLr5h4V1I9RXKVXAW-YoTe2grWBc4iA==&ch=1HVIemH6nYzgydtUrijunS5-HjmDS44WlDCh_cNkD16FBGY8QEmfgA==)
These were the same people who worked through the pandemic when a vaccine wasn't available, and Charlie and Karyn called them heroes. Now, these same people have gone from hero to zero in the Baker administration.
Second, they went after the kids, extending the mask mandate in schools until January, in an attempt to force parents to get their children vaccinated by dangling the carrot of removing masks if they do. This decision was announced without taking questions, or getting any input from parents. [Mask Mandate In Massachusetts Schools Extended Into Jan. 2022 - CBS Boston (cbslocal.com)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jk3gNJFERpnfE3mcS4QPoqSbA01-mylV0eydLlS_hth-tXOgw2tMsGSYvrCflFLnuCSrjLJi_EsYNBhtxzdp25zGzHIVkDVaNXkPEFTdSmEqSX3YUO1cWlDyJrMEvT2Jp9bsASfXNFPWeLPk2DMpAOte1H0P9KU7f7c6DXyMjdRE0Q5M6pZqO55x6iC0Ip-taAjCOgsAa-vTaWC3nPz-G1nopO6N2kh_Iy-gkXG8STECCGfaNkKcqYPFd5p1ESOcXQa1XK4_xho=&c=qaSn3mf3ehwSZvdgrdJcBaYjLr5h4V1I9RXKVXAW-YoTe2grWBc4iA==&ch=1HVIemH6nYzgydtUrijunS5-HjmDS44WlDCh_cNkD16FBGY8QEmfgA==).
As if that wasn't enough for one week, then they targeted dogs, taking K-9s away from the families who cared for them for many years: [Massachusetts trooper has K9 taken away over governor's vaccine mandate (bostonherald.com)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jk3gNJFERpnfE3mcS4QPoqSbA01-mylV0eydLlS_hth-tXOgw2tMsGSYvrCflFLn3jXYS-p10rJQsaKVke2vg-nWTF1RdGyzTS4LFHQ-lMO08njd9Gaw-9WPRZNgdKZYYEE6789CaBkZI8hH1b7y_-YeNQropWr9jykJeoVxLJu4nOGLrm9nsOZkriQ_9YOC8uxKU1_TV7o9URYuILLuGx3yI0m0y72L7eVnGUGHkfLI_KyToBq48V4HNv7Psk25IlRoBy9PzOU9LwyKHKBhQQ==&c=qaSn3mf3ehwSZvdgrdJcBaYjLr5h4V1I9RXKVXAW-YoTe2grWBc4iA==&ch=1HVIemH6nYzgydtUrijunS5-HjmDS44WlDCh_cNkD16FBGY8QEmfgA==).
Finally, Charlie and Karyn found out that recent polling in the Governor's race shows that, among likely Republican primary voters, Diehl would defeat Governor Baker 57-25 in a match-up.
---

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsq8g6rcsrh0avhd9uro1i6uehv8ifhb02rcsvq0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcsr5mep66o5k61p78ttkejj6ddr4mqoe4srgc9om2tr1eap36c71epo70sjhcurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaqmccdkmkr3fchicoo71cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpimap76c5h6coh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuv50a47vhhm33qtkak52d4f4k97th3rpccue048_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cliecob2cph2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1j9ec9rak7urejq1b1gpghb0l7gajb8o3vcr7j0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cliecob2cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfau36rvujg32sag630mcjjh7lg4cp4qopkn0pu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cliecob2cph2bs) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
