name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: If our voters turn out, we win. If they don’t, we lose.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
48 hours only, every contribution will be matched
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38094356/313964549/-2023814932?refcode=20211030.02_TM_10JK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzRiZTViYy03NDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RIWA4qH4auXU26pQv-WepSP7iUxBLGBAJQkooW6NNYg=)

| | Derek,

We have 3 days left in this must-win race. Between now and Tuesday, we’ve got to fully fund our Get Out The Vote program, and we’ve got to send the message that we’re more fired up than ever to protect our democracy and keep Virginia blue.

So before midnight tomorrow, we’ve set a goal of raising $2 million for our voter mobilization fund.

**With a new _Washington Post_ poll showing only a one point lead, it’s even more important that we make sure our voters turn out — so we’re launching our FINAL donation matching opportunity of the campaign right now.**

_**[Having the resources to get our voters to the polls is incredibly important — can you chip in right now and help me stop Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump? For the next 48 hours only, your contribution will be matched so you can double your impact.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38094357/313964550/-2023814932?refcode=20211030.02_TM_10JK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzRiZTViYy03NDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RIWA4qH4auXU26pQv-WepSP7iUxBLGBAJQkooW6NNYg=)**_

It’s this simple, Derek:

If Democrats turn out like they did in 2020, we’re going to win. If they don’t, we’ll lose. At that point you can kiss all of Virginia’s progress goodbye and say hello to the resurgence of Trumpism in our country.

Derek, I need your help to stop that from happening.

body:
We’re only days away.

| Peter,

Tomorrow is our FINAL end-of-month deadline of the campaign. It’s our LAST chance to fully fund our Get Out the Vote program. AND it’s the final opportunity to send the message that we’re more fired up than ever to protect our democracy and keep Virginia blue.

**Before midnight tomorrow, we’ve set a goal of raising $6 million online to our historic grassroots campaign.

[_It’s an incredible milestone — can you split a donation right now between John King and my campaign to help stop Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38094794/313966295/-844928598?refcode=BLU-KING-20211030-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzk2ODZlZS03ODM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qyCJ1k14dyg-s_n1uIQdM0Jou8P-V8Nr-NfoMSdVBM=)**

Your support is critical right now because we are just DAYS away from Election Day. Polls keep showing a tied race and every dollar we raise right now goes directly into our organizing and ads program.

It’s this simple:

If Democrats turn out like they did in 2020, we’re going to win on November 2. If they don’t, we’ll lose. At that point, you can kiss all of Virginia’s progress goodbye and say hello to the resurgence of Trumpism in our country.

Peter, I need your help to stop that from happening.

[_**Please, split a donation right now, and help us turn out the voters we need to keep Virginia blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38094795/313966296/-844928598?refcode=BLU-KING-20211030-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzk2ODZlZS03ODM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qyCJ1k14dyg-s_n1uIQdM0Jou8P-V8Nr-NfoMSdVBM=)

Talk soon,

Terry

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: The most important race in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Don’t let Trumpism make a comeback
| | |
---
I’m not kidding when I say this is the most important email you’ll receive today.

The Virginia Governor’s election is on TUESDAY, and recent polls show it’s still tied. Experts are saying my Trump-endorsed opponent Glenn Youngkin has the momentum. That Democrats don’t care about stopping Trumpism any more.

Folks, we’re running out of time to prove them wrong.
**[Will you split a donation between my campaign and Abby Finkenauer right now? Your support is crucial right now because every single dollar we raise between now and Election Day goes directly towards our effort to get out the vote and win for Virginia and our Country. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38094863/313966534/-688926594?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk359-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmE5NTZhNS03OTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JIWY8k5ZzbzxowgI2tvbMfiDWzG4az_T6_I_E0Wm240=)**
So here’s my final message to you:
**What happens in Virginia on November 2nd doesn’t just impact the future of our Commonwealth, it impacts the future of our entire country.**
My opponent isn’t afraid to pull pages straight from the Trump playbook. He’s pushing the ‘big lie.’ He’s using hateful, racist dog whistles to divide Virginians.

The Washington Post even came out and said Glenn Youngkin is “unfit” to be Governor. Unfit!
I’m working my heart out to turn out every single voter we possibly can in these final days.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: THAT’S A LIE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Setting the record straight. I need you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58650577:69jFGP2mN:m:1:3298722022:FEF2AD52EE8ACD2725CE69A5207FC2EB:r)
---
Peter,
---
I needed you to hear this _directly_ from me.
---
The media claims that I'm in so much "excruciating" trouble that I'm about to "FLIP" on President Trump.
---
**_That 's a damn LIE._**
---
Here's the truth: President Trump is an innocent man. I didn't turn on him when 7 FBI agents raided my home -- and I'm not betraying him now -- or _EVER._
---
_With the threats against me now on the rise, I have to ask for your help building up my Legal Defense Trust._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I continue to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58650577:69jFGP2mN:m:1:3298722022:FEF2AD52EE8ACD2725CE69A5207FC2EB:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58650582:69jFGP2mN:m:1:3298722022:FEF2AD52EE8ACD2725CE69A5207FC2EB:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58650577:69jFGP2mN:m:1:3298722022:FEF2AD52EE8ACD2725CE69A5207FC2EB:r)**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58650577:69jFGP2mN:m:1:3298722022:FEF2AD52EE8ACD2725CE69A5207FC2EB:r)

---
How could I even "flip" when President Trump didn't commit a crime?
---
_I 'll tell you what's going on, Peter..._
---
**_...This is nothing but an intimidation campaign -- fueled by the Deep State-controlled mainstream media -- to try and get me to turn an innocent man into a criminal._**
---
What happened to the America where you were innocent until PROVEN guilty?
---
Now, we live in a nation where rumors and lies spread by the media establishment turn you into a criminal and force you to prove your innocence.
---
**_But rest assured, I will continue to stand strong in the midst of these attacks -- even as they try to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially._**
---
However, I simply have no choice but to ask for your help along the way as I stand up to the Deep State goons who want me to fall.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I continue to battle for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58650577:69jFGP2mN:m:1:3298722022:FEF2AD52EE8ACD2725CE69A5207FC2EB:r)
---
Thank you,

Peter,

The Virginia governor’s election is just days away, and Terry McAuliffe desperately needs our support. Terry is currently TIED with Trump-supporting Glenn Youngkin.

| | Derek,

I’m emailing you because Terry McAuliffe has less than 48 hours to hit his two million dollar goal, and he just called to let me know that he’s behind where he needs to be.

This is the absolute _worst_ time to be losing ground — we’ve got to pull it together.

Glenn Youngkin has the entire National Republican Party (including Donald Trump!) behind him. These guys are gonna pour resources into Virginia because they know how important it is for them to win.

Susan has made it clear that prescription drug pricing is her top priority

| | | **"I'm not interested in crumbs"**
\- Susan Wild on Medicare drug price negotiations
---
Peter —

Susan can do a lot of things. She can win elections in one of the most competitive House districts in the country, she can fight for good jobs and improving infrastructure in the Lehigh Valley, and she can withstand right-wing extremist attacks. **But one thing she can’t do is accept anything less than full allowance for Medicare negotiation of drug prices.

body:
I have a personal request:

[**Ron Johnson is the most vulnerable Republican Senator up for re-election, which means our race is the Democrats’ best chance to flip a Senate seat and expand our majority. Will you chip in $10 before our end-of-month deadline expires tomorrow to make sure our campaign has the resources to defeat him?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38102854/314000711/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211030_eom10_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211030_eom10_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjFjMjRkNC04YTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkaYEA139f9a1YCH0MiC23FuXov1diHNL0cqtyuStXk=)
| [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38102856/314000720/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211030_eom10_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211030_eom10_fndd_gq_act_snglbtn__sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjFjMjRkNC04YTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IkaYEA139f9a1YCH0MiC23FuXov1diHNL0cqtyuStXk=)
---

There’s no doubt: national Republicans and outside groups plan to blanket Wisconsin with millions of dollars in false attacks to boost Ron Johnson and keep this seat red. Look, we already know that kind of money can swing an election. Especially in a battleground state like ours.

Even worse? Ron Johnson is on _Fox News_ every other week spreading dangerous lies and conspiracy theories about January 6, climate change, COVID-19 -- you name it. Doctors even had to publicly beg him to stop spreading misinformation! Every time he opens his mouth, he puts people’s lives in danger.

name: Kevin Hern
subject: A message from Kevin
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
This won’t fix the problem. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/3967e0666178b408/302d70288fdb3306c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, The Democrats’ so-called infrastructure bill is up for a vote in the House, and I plan to oppose it. I’m all for fixing our broken roads and bridges – and expanding access to broadband internet for rural Americans. But that’s not what this bill is about. It’s about handing out taxpayer funding to liberal special interest groups and making Americans even more dependent on the federal government. The Democrats who wrote this legislation went out of their way to underfund energy-producing states like Oklahoma – and give away a disproportionate amount of money to big left-wing cities like New York and San Francisco. Most importantly, this bill will cost at least $1.5 trillion, and burden future generations of Americans with an even larger national debt. As you know, I serve on the House Ways and Means Committee, and I will continue to use my position to fight for reasonable solutions to our infrastructure problems. But I cannot and will not support the left’s fake infrastructure package. Sincerely, Kevin Hern
---

| | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. subject: my least favorite thing
body:
I hate to bother you.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38104097/314005241/-2105783743?refcode=bpi_em_20211030.1_eom4-ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGRhZDAwZi04ZDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4_S2FeibdSsvARxgNIxzdwdVaNiCQC5hMXCC_hNdGk=)
Peter,

I couldn’t be more proud of the endorsements we’ve received this month. That said, I want to be clear: I got into this race to fight for Maryland families. I didn’t get into this race for praise, and I _certainly_ didn’t get into it because I like asking you for money. But tomorrow is our October fundraising deadline, and my finance team just gave me an update:

**It’s looking like we’re going to fall short of our 350 online donation goal this month.**

**Our records show that you haven’t donated toward our October goal yet.[If you pitch in $7 or more today, your gift won’t just go a long way toward winning, it’ll get us one step closer to Annapolis where we can get to work helping 350,000 uninsured Marylanders, workers struggling to access unemployment benefits, and families just fighting to get by. name: CNN Update (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: The battle for the Senate hinges on New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
**NEW: CNN is reporting that New Hampshire is likely to be "the marquee Senate race of the 2022 election."** Republicans are one seat away from taking back the Senate majority. Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and the full force of the GOP have made Maggie Hassan their number one target -- and right now, we’re down in the polls. **[The GOP has already spent over $4 million on attack ads, and they’re just getting started. body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2ZPGJ7kyxB6dsJw3dlRf8h6XvxvUd5SaYA369NWPikp1Z8VlYZjU4EBW6vOW0KanuTApzb1By-cEWEapX_GaxRz-uKXpR0LKqS7E8Q2ppA_UgljI9Yc3BfPz84DBdmjfOqeQnV7tEY4ePNhWqvGYHbmRMXufI-M1cOeYNtbJOjdA7gN-9GWnA==&c=9GASNfHSCOVz-mdtpzbaxkFQRq-lLb58MzKsT3r2nl5Y2W3McAHN8Q==&ch=vADioGOt5hb_c7gHO_dcJvQTlB5mu8jpKSF3GTEfWDgkG8nnT-LdWw==)

| BREAKING: Eugene "Gene" Huelsman, a longtime camera operator for CNN, ABC, NBC, and other media outlets, has been ARRESTED for threatening to kill me and my family.
Back in January of this year, Gene Huelsman left a [chilling voicemail](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2ZPGJ7kyxB6dsJw3dlRf8h6XvxvUd5SaYA369NWPikp1Z8VlYZjU4EBW6vOW0KanuTApzb1By-cEWEapX_GaxRz-uKXpR0LKqS7E8Q2ppA_UgljI9Yc3BfPz84DBdmjfOqeQnV7tEY4ePNhWqvGYHbmRMXufI-M1cOeYNtbJOjdA7gN-9GWnA==&c=9GASNfHSCOVz-mdtpzbaxkFQRq-lLb58MzKsT3r2nl5Y2W3McAHN8Q==&ch=vADioGOt5hb_c7gHO_dcJvQTlB5mu8jpKSF3GTEfWDgkG8nnT-LdWw==) for me, threatening my life and the lives of my family members. As it turns out, Huelsman is a former employee of our favorite fake news media outlets: CNN, ABC, NBC, and others. It took almost 10 months before he was detained, but justice is finally being served.
[Watch](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2ZPGJ7kyxB6dsJw3dlRf8h6XvxvUd5SaYA369NWPikp1Z8VlYZjU4EBW6vOW0KanuTApzb1By-cEWEapX_GaxRz-uKXpR0LKqS7E8Q2ppA_UgljI9Yc3BfPz84DBdmjfOqeQnV7tEY4ePNhWqvGYHbmRMXufI-M1cOeYNtbJOjdA7gN-9GWnA==&c=9GASNfHSCOVz-mdtpzbaxkFQRq-lLb58MzKsT3r2nl5Y2W3McAHN8Q==&ch=vADioGOt5hb_c7gHO_dcJvQTlB5mu8jpKSF3GTEfWDgkG8nnT-LdWw==) the report from Tucker Carlson here:

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2ZPGJ7kyxB6dsJw3dlRf8h6XvxvUd5SaYA369NWPikp1Z8VlYZjU4EBW6vOW0KanuTApzb1By-cEWEapX_GaxRz-uKXpR0LKqS7E8Q2ppA_UgljI9Yc3BfPz84DBdmjfOqeQnV7tEY4ePNhWqvGYHbmRMXufI-M1cOeYNtbJOjdA7gN-9GWnA==&c=9GASNfHSCOVz-mdtpzbaxkFQRq-lLb58MzKsT3r2nl5Y2W3McAHN8Q==&ch=vADioGOt5hb_c7gHO_dcJvQTlB5mu8jpKSF3GTEfWDgkG8nnT-LdWw==)
---
| Right now, [another man who recently threatened my life](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2ZPGJ7kyxB6dsJw3dlRf8h6XvxvUd5SaYA369NWPikp1Z8VlYZjU4EBW6vOW0KanuTApzb1By-cEWEapX_GaxRz-uKXpR0LKqS7E8Q2ppA_UgljI9Yc3BfPz84DBdmjfOqeQnV7tEY4ePNhWqvGYHbmRMXufI-M1cOeYNtbJOjdA7gN-9GWnA==&c=9GASNfHSCOVz-mdtpzbaxkFQRq-lLb58MzKsT3r2nl5Y2W3McAHN8Q==&ch=vADioGOt5hb_c7gHO_dcJvQTlB5mu8jpKSF3GTEfWDgkG8nnT-LdWw==) is still walking the streets after the Biden DOJ blocked the Capitol Police recommendation for arrest.
My life may be threatened for leading this America First Movement in Congress, but I refuse to back down. Now is the time to stand together in solidarity against the threats, intimidation, and canceling by the Left and their partners in the mainstream media.
Remember...they want to come after you, but I'm standing in their way.
[>> Join me in the fight <<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2ZPGJ7kyxB6dsJw3dlRf8h6XvxvUd5SaYA369NWPikp1Z8VlYZjU4EBW6vOW0KanuTApzb1By-cEWEapX_GaxRz-uKXpR0LKqS7E8Q2ppA_UgljI9Yc3BfPz84DBdmjfOqeQnV7tEY4ePNhWqvGYHbmRMXufI-M1cOeYNtbJOjdA7gN-9GWnA==&c=9GASNfHSCOVz-mdtpzbaxkFQRq-lLb58MzKsT3r2nl5Y2W3McAHN8Q==&ch=vADioGOt5hb_c7gHO_dcJvQTlB5mu8jpKSF3GTEfWDgkG8nnT-LdWw==) [>> Rush in your support <<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2ZPGJ7kyxB6dsJw3dlRf8h6XvxvUd5SaYA369NWPikp1Z8VlYZjU4EBW6vOW0KanuTApzb1By-cEWEapX_GaxRz-uKXpR0LKqS7E8Q2ppA_UgljI9Yc3BfPz84DBdmjfOqeQnV7tEY4ePNhWqvGYHbmRMXufI-M1cOeYNtbJOjdA7gN-9GWnA==&c=9GASNfHSCOVz-mdtpzbaxkFQRq-lLb58MzKsT3r2nl5Y2W3McAHN8Q==&ch=vADioGOt5hb_c7gHO_dcJvQTlB5mu8jpKSF3GTEfWDgkG8nnT-LdWw==)

Friend, I’d like to explain why I’m asking for a **[donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38105000/314006792/302357874?refcode=20211030_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjJhYmQ5OC04ZTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ar8Su95gisYLGv19gJAN0L1VpA4NN9GDJ9QcVhYecjw=)** before tomorrow night’s deadline.

**_I’m worried about the future of Florida_** if we allow Gov. Ron DeSantis to remain in office. If we don’t defeat him in 2022, he’ll continue playing politics with our health, restricting reproductive rights, and pushing voter suppression.

**[But I know Gov. DeSantis isn’t unstoppable. We can stop him, but we have to do it together. That’s why I’m asking you for a donation today -- before the month ends.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38105003/314006793/302357874?refcode=20211030_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjJhYmQ5OC04ZTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ar8Su95gisYLGv19gJAN0L1VpA4NN9GDJ9QcVhYecjw=)

Your contribution will help my team and I register new voters, persuade swing voters, mobilize existing supporters, and build the grassroots organization we’ll need to get everyone to the polls.**

Now, this election will be a slog, no doubt about it, but anyone who tells you it’s unwinnable is wrong. Gov. DeSantis's approval rate is **_dropping_** and poll after poll shows me within the margin of error ... or flat-out **_beating_** him.

Gov. DeSantis and his right-wing, billionaire pals will throw everything AND the kitchen sink at us, but with your help -- we will defeat him.

**[But I’ll need a grassroots army fighting with me to win this race, so will you make a quick contribution to my campaign for governor and help us beat our October goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38105005/314006794/302357874?refcode=20211030_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjJhYmQ5OC04ZTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ar8Su95gisYLGv19gJAN0L1VpA4NN9GDJ9QcVhYecjw=)**

Thanks so much,
Charlie Crist

body:
Sara has been a champion for the Child Tax Credit since day one

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38105229/314006966/1546772515?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211030-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGZiOWVkZC04ZTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NjD-FsW4chWpAtdmZlf1eZVOXUNVzdd1zJmG-78iz_U=)

| Since the first round of payments started hitting bank accounts across the country in July, the Child Tax Credit has assisted the families of sixty one million children, with low-income families spending nearly all of their payments on food, rent, utilities, clothing, and school supplies.

**The Child Tax Credit is so significant that it’s projected to cut childhood poverty in half — and Sara has been a champion for it since day one. But not a single Republican voted in favor of this crucial legislation. There’s no doubt about it: if Republicans take back control of the House in 2022, the Child Tax Credit and so many other programs that benefit American families will be on the chopping block.**

Between an already slim majority and upcoming redistricting, Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat if we’re going to keep the House blue in 2022 — and that starts in our district. [_**Our campaign has a major end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow night, so we’re asking if you can chip in today to support our work and keep Sara in Congress working hard on the issues that matter.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38105230/314006967/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211030-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGZiOWVkZC04ZTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NjD-FsW4chWpAtdmZlf1eZVOXUNVzdd1zJmG-78iz_U=)

clean_body: Sara has been a champion for the Child Tax Credit since day one | = | Since the first round of payments started hitting bank accounts across the country in July, the Child Tax Credit has assisted the families of sixty one million children, with low-income families spending nearly all of their payments on food, rent, utilities, clothing, and school supplies. The Child Tax Credit is so significant that it’s projected to cut childhood poverty in half — and Sara has been a champion for it since day one. But not a single Republican voted in favor of this crucial legislation. There’s no doubt about it: if Republicans take back control of the House in 2022, the Child Tax Credit and so many other programs that benefit American families will be on the chopping block. Between an already slim majority and upcoming redistricting, Democrats can’t afford to lose a single seat if we’re going to keep the House blue in 2022 — and that starts in our district. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = With appreciation, Team Jacobs * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

subject: Why I'm running.

body:
I'm not setting out to make history -- but I do plan on making a difference. | _Ras Smith is running to replace Kim Reynolds, one of America's worst far-right governors. He's a father, husband, public servant, hunter, farmer, coach, and counselor who believes Iowa deserves better.**[Chip in to help him flip Iowa blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38105559/314007337/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGJjYzcyOC04ZjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1RZTH0f3gU5xALKrEuGBLZDi2-1kWJWQ6qPhtfbLN6k=)** We'd hate to see you go, but if you no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2407c659-8d39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/9dbcc728-8f39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGJjYzcyOC04ZjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1RZTH0f3gU5xALKrEuGBLZDi2-1kWJWQ6qPhtfbLN6k=&id=123790384)._

**As a Black man running to be Iowa's next governor, I'm not setting out to make history -- but I do plan on making a difference.** It all starts with something I learned from my parents at a young age.

Iowa welcomed my grandmother in 1957 after she packed up her family in an old station wagon and fled a sharecropping plantation in Tchula, Mississippi.

My dad was only seven years old when he arrived. He went on to take a job at John Deere and stayed for more than 40 years. He was an active member of the United Auto Workers union and barely missed a day of work in his life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38105563/314007341/-73891749?refcode=em-103021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGJjYzcyOC04ZjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1RZTH0f3gU5xALKrEuGBLZDi2-1kWJWQ6qPhtfbLN6k=)
_My dad with my siblings and me._
My mom served as military police, and then became a pastor. Here's a story about how they taught me to treat people:

One Easter Sunday, a few folks at our church told my mom they couldn't afford to buy and wear their "Sunday best." My mom immediately got on the phone and told them **"No, come as you are."**

That story has stuck with me my whole life. You see, my mom did not want clothes or money to be a barrier for folks to participate in community.

To me, "come as you are" means Iowa could be a state where everyone is welcome -- no matter how much money you have, who you voted for, or what part of the state you call home.

**Unfortunately the opportunities my parents had to not just survive, but thrive, are further out of reach for more working families today than ever before.**

Instead of working to change that, politicians like my opponent Kim Reynolds and the rest of the Iowa GOP have only made them worse.

[**I'm running to be Iowa's next governor so that everyone has the opportunity to not just survive, but truly thrive. If you agree, chip in $3 to help us raise $1,480 to meet our end-of-month goal. Everything you give goes toward making sure more voters know another future is possible, and that I'm ready to take on Kim Reynolds and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38105564/314007342/-73891749?refcode=em-103021&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGJjYzcyOC04ZjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1RZTH0f3gU5xALKrEuGBLZDi2-1kWJWQ6qPhtfbLN6k=)

clean_body: I'm not setting out to make history -- but I do plan on making a difference. | Ras Smith is running to replace Kim Reynolds, one of America's worst far-right governors. He's a father, husband, public servant, hunter, farmer, coach, and counselor who believes Iowa deserves better.= We'd hate to see you go, but if you no longer receive email from us, please . = Friend, = | = As a Black man running to be Iowa's next governor, I'm not setting out to make history -- but I do plan on making a difference. It all starts with something I learned from my parents at a young age. Iowa welcomed my grandmother in 1957 after she packed up her family in an old station wagon and fled a sharecropping plantation in Tchula, Mississippi. My dad was only seven years old when he arrived. He went on to take a job at John Deere and stayed for more than 40 years. He was an active member of the United Auto Workers union and barely missed a day of work in his life. = My dad with my siblings and me. My mom served as military police, and then became a pastor. Here's a story about how they taught me to treat people: One Easter Sunday, a few folks at our church told my mom they couldn't afford to buy and wear their "Sunday best." My mom immediately got on the phone and told them "No, come as you are." That story has stuck with me my whole life. You see, my mom did not want clothes or money to be a barrier for folks to participate in community. To me, "come as you are" means Iowa could be a state where everyone is welcome -- no matter how much money you have, who you voted for, or what part of the state you call home. Unfortunately the opportunities my parents had to not just survive, but thrive, are further out of reach for more working families today than ever before. Instead of working to change that, politicians like my opponent Kim Reynolds and the rest of the Iowa GOP have only made them worse. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Ras Smith Democrat for Governor = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. subject: Wisconsin is ready for real, compassionate, progressive leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Hello —

Earlier this month, we finished up our Full Nelson tour — _the tour that brought me to every single one of Wisconsin’s 72 counties._

**Visiting every corner of Wisconsin made one thing clear:** the people of our state are ready for real, compassionate, progressive leadership. But, frankly, that’s not what we’re seeing in the Senate right now, and Republicans are not the only culprits: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38109211/314012557/67999095?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_211030_1_2&refcode2=64d3f317-9239-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGQzZjMxNy05MjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTekemNROi3epPHDfdm3qdQ9YcwgKxO9Rs19aetKv7w=) [If you, _like me_ , have had enough and are ready for bold, progressive leadership in Congress, please chip in to support my campaign today. Listen, it’s bad enough when Republicans grandstand and throw fits to try to block legislation aimed at helping working people. We’re all used to this nonsense.

It’s a whole other matter when Democrats, **the party of working people** , do the same thing. There’s only one way to stop it from happening — **elect progressive Democrats.**

[I have always stood on the side of working people, _and will continue to do so in the U.S. Senate_. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Your support for our campaign has not gone unnoticed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Now, I need your help to reach our team's first fundraising goal for Q4
#

Friend,
Your support for our campaign has not gone unnoticed.
I'm so incredibly grateful that you chose to be a part of our movement to give working folks like us a voice of our own in the U.S. Senate.
Frankly, I'm not the typical candidate for Senate. I'm a gay Black man. I grew up in the projects of North Philly. And my family moved around a lot to avoid eviction.
But your support sends a powerful message that working people demand leaders who work for US, not their wealthy donors or corporate PACs.
**Now, I need your help to reach our team's first fundraising goal for Q4. We're coming up on our end-of-month deadline, and we're about $10,000 away from our goal.**
[Could you pitch in your first $3 to help us close the gap? We're up against some wealthy, self-funded opponents, and we rely on grassroots donations from folks like you to stay competitive.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38109371/314012663/-360183459?refcode2=96d3f317-9239-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-1-15d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmQzZjMxNy05MjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=phVo4Q8vpO7DT8XoCa2-DFb40Tdt_L9c2MjS9i8xmaE=)

We're running a grassroots campaign. That means the goals we set aren't arbitrary.
Hitting our October goal is an essential part of our plan to build a coalition of supporters from every one of Pennsylvania's 67 counties.
Falling behind on our goal would mean we'd have fewer resources to count on and put us in a tough spot going into the end of the year.
[So, with less than 48 hours left in October, can I count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can to fuel our people-powered campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38109400/314012677/-360183459?refcode2=96d3f317-9239-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-1-15d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmQzZjMxNy05MjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=phVo4Q8vpO7DT8XoCa2-DFb40Tdt_L9c2MjS9i8xmaE=)

Malcolm

Hey Peter,
I just received word that we are still $489 short of hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal.

body:
It’s going to be a battle of inches

|
---

| | This is tough to write:

I’m falling seriously short of my End-of-Month Goal.

If I can’t raise $9,053 in the next 24 hours, I’ll have to make serious budget cuts to my campaign.

[**_Having to make cuts this early in the race will be the difference between winning or losing. So I’m asking: will you chip in $15 so I can flip this seat blue? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38111034/314013787/1129282168?refcode=20211030_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWQzZjMxNy05MjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxlHxRXsaDDAJLALh8e3QSgizfAVrrZBQSCG3Ooz8JY=)

I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country.

Joe Biden flipped this district by over 6 points -- and my opponent barely won reelection.

It’s going to be a battle of inches to get over the finish line.

To win, I’m going to have to outwork & outraise Don Bacon every step of the way.

[**_But to reach voters, pay staff, and run ads I have to reach my End-of-Month Goal._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38111036/314013788/1129282168?refcode=20211030_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWQzZjMxNy05MjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxlHxRXsaDDAJLALh8e3QSgizfAVrrZBQSCG3Ooz8JY=)

I know you work hard for your money, and I appreciate every dollar donated.

[**But I can’t reach my goal and win this race on my own. Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: It's not too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ug1rIfpRhiaOmHGMTAWUbn9%2FmxGLhMHI&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend, I'm personally reaching out to my most engaged supporters with an urgent update:
My team let me know we're projected to fall short of our end-of-month fundraising goal unless things pick up right away. Falling short here could put us at risk of being under-resourced when it comes to defending this Senate seat from GOP attacks - and if we lose here, we could lose Senate control to Mitch McConnell.
**Friend, we only have a few hours, but it 's not too late to get back on track - and I'm counting on your donation to do so.**
Mitch McConnell and the GOP may have reason to be hopeful. The political ground is shifting, even here in Connecticut: Republicans were recently able to flip a Democratic seat here - the first state legislative seat to flip parties since President Biden was inaugurated. With Senate control narrowly held by Democrats right now, we can't afford to lose a single seat. We cannot take anything for granted.
Republicans are looking for signs of weakness. Showing our strength and protecting this seat means hitting all our fundraising goals - which is why I'm counting on every supporter reading this email to chip in whatever they can.

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

body:
#

There is so much on the line in 2022. Just take it from Cheri what’s at stake and the challenges we face:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38119482/314018822/-572197399?refcode2=7412fc4a-9439-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyZmM0YS05NDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcOOVDKzCccjGIAwpUNGXXSAPapF9cd7ERyXFJ9zUX4=)
Democrats have the opportunity to make real progress on so many critical issues if we flip North Carolina. But like Cheri said, it requires competing with well-funded special interests. So we need lots of grassroots donations to help us fight back:
**[Please make a $3 contribution to help elect Cheri Beasley before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow night.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38119486/314018823/-569772567?refcode2=7412fc4a-9439-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyZmM0YS05NDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcOOVDKzCccjGIAwpUNGXXSAPapF9cd7ERyXFJ9zUX4=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38119490/314018824/-569772567?refcode2=7412fc4a-9439-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyZmM0YS05NDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcOOVDKzCccjGIAwpUNGXXSAPapF9cd7ERyXFJ9zUX4=)**
Here is the truth:
North Carolina is consistently ranked by non-partisan analysts as one of the tightest Senate races in the country. This election could be the difference between expanding Democrats’ majority in the Senate or handing power back to Mitch McConnell.
And Cheri Beasley is the only candidate in this race — Democrat or Republican — who’s won statewide twice, and right now, the primary polling shows her in the lead.
That’s why outside special interest groups are going to pour millions of dollars to try to beat us. But that’s ok, because we have something they don’t: **you.**
When you, and lots and lots of people like you all chip in, you become a part of something really special. And when you add up all that support, that’s exactly how we’re going to win: one donation at a time.
So please:
**[Can you make a $3 contribution to help Cheri Beasley win this race before tomorrow night’s fundraising deadline comes to a close?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38119493/314018826/-569772567?refcode2=7412fc4a-9439-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDEyZmM0YS05NDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gcOOVDKzCccjGIAwpUNGXXSAPapF9cd7ERyXFJ9zUX4=)**

clean_body: There is so much on the line in 2022. Just take it from Cheri what’s at stake and the challenges we face: = Democrats have the opportunity to make real progress on so many critical issues if we flip North Carolina. But like Cheri said, it requires competing with well-funded special interests. So we need lots of grassroots donations to help us fight back: = = Here is the truth: North Carolina is consistently ranked by non-partisan analysts as one of the tightest Senate races in the country. This election could be the difference between expanding Democrats’ majority in the Senate or handing power back to Mitch McConnell. And Cheri Beasley is the only candidate in this race — Democrat or Republican — who’s won statewide twice, and right now, the primary polling shows her in the lead. That’s why outside special interest groups are going to pour millions of dollars to try to beat us. But that’s ok, because we have something they don’t: you. When you, and lots and lots of people like you all chip in, you become a part of something really special. And when you add up all that support, that’s exactly how we’re going to win: one donation at a time. body:

---
Friend, I'm going to get to the point because we're running out of time. The Virginia Governor's race is a must win for Democrats in 2021. Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That's right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. Friend, we only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I'm asking for your help to prove them wrong. [**If you 're with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and The Way Ahead.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3MyxntiLuwpdxBhA-EjCxkPUaGtc5Uc36y3LhKcGIyM=/FAq7T4w865Vs8jhAcACmZYboTBr-39_zImP_7ctZ7Z8=?refcode=20211030_RN_TRM) This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you've been waiting for the best time to donate, it's right now. We're literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday. With polls _STILL_ tied, anything can happen -- but here's the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we'll turn out the voters we need to win. _And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism._ [**Will you split a donation right now between The Way Ahead and my campaign to ensure we turn out all the voters we need on Tuesday?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3MyxntiLuwpdxBhA-EjCxkPUaGtc5Uc36y3LhKcGIyM=/FAq7T4w865Vs8jhAcACmZYboTBr-39_zImP_7ctZ7Z8=?refcode=20211030_RN_TRM) I'm up against a Trump-loving guy who has promised to go on offense and ban abortion if he's elected. The only way the stakes could be higher would be if I were up against Donald Trump himself. Now I've got to get back on the road, but I'll ask one last time, [**please split a donation right now to ensure that we keep Virginia blue this Tuesday.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3MyxntiLuwpdxBhA-EjCxkPUaGtc5Uc36y3LhKcGIyM=/FAq7T4w865Vs8jhAcACmZYboTBr-39_zImP_7ctZ7Z8=?refcode=20211030_RN_TRM) - Terry

body:
| [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=7da57802ac1e44a5853c291a87afcfd2)

| **Anna Paulina Luna 's $150,000 Dirty Trick** **[](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=726e5ea150f1469389fd62bec0b83dc6)** By [Francisco Gonzalez](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=2&link=13979932ebc44f95abb57cbe2cfaf810) The most recent federal election filings by Republican Congressional candidate Anna Paulina Luna, whose biography, history, and temperament are already the subject of criticism by many conservatives and those in the America First Movement, reveal a $150,000 dirty trick. In fact, there could be some serious ethical violations as she used that amount of campaign funds on legal fees. Not to mention, an additional $32,000 was spent on her campaign manager in one quarter alone. This is not the kind of person I want to send to Congress - she is already showing how reckless her spending is with other people's money. Earlier this year, Luna (not her real name, and she is not Hispanic and does not speak Spanish) filed an extraordinary and sensational claim with the St. Petersburg Police Department and the State's Attorney. She accused all of her prospective opponents in the upcoming primary contest for the Republican nomination for Congress in the 13th District (which is in the Tampa-St. Petersburg area) of plotting to murder her! Luna's sidekick, Erin Marie Olszewski, alleged that one of Luna's then prospective Congressional opponents, William Braddock, told Olszewski in a phone call that he was involved in a plot with two other prospective Congressional opponents in the Republican primary, Amanda Makki and Matt Tito, to murder Luna in order to end her political ascendency. You can't make this up! Makki ran for the nomination against Luna two years ago. Tito is a former State Representative candidate and decorated Marine combat veteran. While this sensational charge got front page coverage in the Tampa Bay Times and POLITICO, both sources failed to point out that it was Olszewski who called Braddock (Braddock didn't call her) at 1AM, and that the surreptitious recording of a phone call in which only the recording party knows the call is being recorded, is strictly prohibited by law in Florida. In fact, there are many instances of individuals being prosecuted for violating it. Neither news organization pointed out that although a link to a recording of the entire call was included in Luna's complaint to the St. Petersburg Police Department, because the call was conducted illegally, it could not be considered by the court in Luna's failed effort to get a permanent restraining order against Braddock, who subsequently dropped out of the race. Anna Mayerhofer (that's Ana Paulina Luna's real name) has pulled the restraining order scam at least 5 other times before. She filed a restraining order in an attempt to silence a family member who pointed out the falsification of her name and ethnicity, as well as against a woman in the panhandle who she thought was seeing her husband on the side. In fact, Luna claims that this woman violated the restraining order when she inadvertently visited a gentlemen's club in Fort Walton Beach, Florida called the Red Rose Gentlemen's Club, where Luna was violating military regulations by working as a dancer. Luna's claim that she was only a cocktail waitress is vehemently denied by the club owner and multiple employees who worked in the club at the time. You can always tell when Anna Paulina Luna is lying; her lips are moving. According to the Federal Election Commission report filed on October 15, it shows this legal hoax cost the Luna campaign $150,000 in legal fees. This is particularly problematic when you consider that Luna raised $231,000 in the last quarter, but spent $251,000. The filing for the Republican primary is not until next June, and the primary date is likely to be in August. The entourage of cult members, courtiers, hench-women, consultants, and camp-followers, and other hangers around Luna creates an unsustainable burn rate long before next year's Republican primary. This campaign is just another example of political grifters like Luna trying to gain power while continuing to use GOP donor money on attorneys and consultants. It is the definition of The Swamp creatures that Donald Trump's America First movement has tried to eradicate. Perhaps Luna and her well-paid cabal believe the false "murder" narrative will distract voters from her past as a Democrat and Obama-supporter, not to mention her identifying herself on her California driver's license as Caucasian rather than Hispanic. Anna Paulina Luna is the epitome of a chameleon; positioning herself as an America First candidate in the primary and then remaining silent on supporting Donald Trump in the 2020 general election. She has also done her best to cozy up to other "influencers" in the America First movement. While I don't know Ms. Makki, she appears to be an honorable woman. The smear of Matt Tito, who I do know, is both outrageous and insulting. Matt is a U.S. Marine Corps combat veteran who served his country with honor. He also took on a decidedly uphill race for the Florida state house against incumbent representative Ben Diamond who ironically is likely to win the Democratic nomination against a weak Democratic field. In other words, should Matt Tito become the Republican nominee for Congress, this race against Diamond will be a rematch - except this time Tito will find a much more favorable constituency compared to the state house district in 2020. Tito took the nomination in a hopelessly Democrat district and waged an aggressive shoe-leather campaign running 18% ahead of President Trump and eight points ahead of Luna in this Democrat stronghold. Tito accepted the nomination largely because no other Republican would step forward and he felt strongly that no Democrat should get a free ride, particularly a Democrat as left-wing as Diamond. Contrast this with Luna, who, although she served in the U.S. Air Force, was never deployed outside the country for combat. That makes her widespread use of a photograph of her in U.S. Marine fatigues and brandishing a military-style weapon, combined with her claim that "you can't understand the concept of freedom being paid for with blood unless you've actually been there," a very clear case of stolen valor. Falsely claiming combat duty is specifically prohibited under Florida State law. I can't imagine the district's many veterans will appreciate her lack of candor about her military record. Luna's husband, Andy Gamberzky, who she married, divorced, and remarried, is indeed a combat veteran who served his country with honor, and nothing here is meant to diminish or dishonor his service. His wife's obvious attempt to conflate his combat duty to her "service," is, however, a transparent fraud. Of course, in the recent report filed with the Saint Petersburg Police, Gamberzky signed his last name as Luna. His last name is not Luna and Florida law clearly states that it is a felony to sign a fake name to a police report. It is also possible that it was his wife who may well have signed for him without his knowledge or consent, to continue her "con" regarding her name for the people that would in fact look up the report. Either way, the illegal activity continues for the "Luna" family. Luna and her supporters will counter all of this by pointing out that she was recently endorsed by former President Donald Trump. I highly doubt that our esteemed former President is aware of Luna's false claims of combat duty, lack of any Hispanic ethnicity, name change, and her experience as a stripper, but then that's what Republican primaries are all about. In fact, Donald Trump endorsed the opponent of Madison Cawthorn in North Carolina's 11th congressional district in 2020 and Cawthorn defeated that Trump-endorsed candidate by 30 points. Today, Cawthorn is close with the former President. Endorsement mistakes happen and are often the result of establishment insiders having undue influence over outsiders like President Trump. Who wins the Republican nomination in the 13th District of Florida is a crucially important contest when it comes to winning a majority back in the U.S. House of Representatives. Luna's race against incumbent Charlie Crist was neither close nor impressive given Crist's long service in both the State Senate and in various elected offices, including the Governorship. The flip-flopper Crist managed to hold on to 25% of the Republican vote against Luna. In fact, Luna ran 5 points behind President Trump, who only lost the district by one point. Only time will tell what the impact of the revelations regarding Luna's background, temperament, intellect, and ethics will have on Republican primary voters in the 13th District (or whether she will face legal action), but I am confident they, like President Trump, will learn not to make another mistake. [READ MORE](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=3&link=1a344d922f41456aa07447c9d1820ea3). [https://www.stonecoldtruth.com/anna-paulina-lunas-150000-dirty-trick/](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=4&link=8ecc87d3db5745eba52d049d08b3705b) [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=5&link=a6d3f291d07a4e29ab20ac0de3c1e0e3) **Roger Stone** is a political strategist and pundit and a long-time political advisor and friend of President Donald Trump. Stone was a [victim](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=6&link=20f2bbfc5cf44e9189a72a7b28bda9c8) of the Mueller witch-hunt and was charged with lying to Congress in order to pressure him into testifying against the President. Stone refused. After Stone's trial was corrupted by a biased Judge, a corrupt Jury Forewoman and a stacked jury and prosecutors sought to incarcerate Stone in a Covid 19 infested prison in violation of all current legal precedents, DOJ policy, and without regard to Stone's health or age, President Donald Trump pardoned Roger Stone on December 23, 2020. On November 3, 2020, at midnight, the US Justice Department by court order released the long-hidden sections of the Mueller Report in which the Special Counsel admitted that his office with its unlimited legal authority and unlimited budget had found "no factual evidence" to tie Roger Stone to Russian Collusion, Wikileaks collaboration or the alleged theft of John Podesta's e-mail. Stone is a New York Times Bestselling author and has returned to political commentary at [StoneColdTruth.com](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=7&link=0d52ff16e6944d86ab31d58d437f3ad0). Follow Roger Stone on social media @ **GAB:** [https://gab.com/RogerJStoneJr](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=8&link=168c9e6b27514484801474f58a7a1071) / **Telegram:** [https://t.me/RogerStoneJr](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=9&link=de7299d41f9c4356ae23178dee2bed61) / **BitChute:** [https://bitchute.com/rogerstone](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=10&link=28fa383e556b4a068cdd90630757d624) / **Rumble:** [https://rumble.com/stonecoldtruth](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=11&link=a0278506639548bd8108e5e998baae98) / **Cameo:**[ https://cameo.com/rogerstone](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=12&link=0849b516738d4eabbd16d40b9af7a21a) [__](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0poppxwaok2o2wkpm&linkid=13&link=aa6e87eaea2f419f99460810f93e3a1e)

name: Team Turner
subject: The frightening reality is that working-class Americans are struggling.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Hope you're enjoying Halloween Weekend! Tomorrow is the actual day of Halloween AND our first end-of-month deadline 👻🎃

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38125602/314023551/1761773496?refcode=211030_FR_eom1team-corrected_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODc0YWZhOC05ODM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBx8CKq32blMsl-GxEDxX1MjhQKxOUA1VkbOizgbt9Q=)
---
Hopefully you're enjoying the Halloween weekend, folks. Tomorrow is Halloween day, and there are a lot of spooky things going on in the spirit of celebration for this fun holiday.

**But what’s truly giving us nightmares isn’t ghosts, goblins, or horror movies. It’s the imminent threat of a far-right takeover.**

**_The frightening reality is that working-class Americans are struggling._** They are struggling to make ends meet because of starvation wages and skyrocketing health care costs. They’re struggling to stay healthy because of polluted air and water. They’re struggling to put food on the table, to put a roof over their heads, to receive a quality education, and so much more.

We’re a part of this team led by Senator Nina Turner because she’s building a movement that brings together like-minded organizers, activists, progressives, Democrats, and leaders to champion the causes that we care about — the ones that serve everyday, ordinary Americans — not the rich and powerful.

**As she says, “ _Our collective success is rooted in organizing._ ” That means that in order to achieve our shared goals, our power is in our voices. And together we are louder, and we are stronger.**

[**But if we’re going to keep mobilizing and engaging with folks whose values align with ours, we need to hit our online fundraising goal of $16,000 by tomorrow’s critical end-of-month deadline. clean_body: Hope you're enjoying Halloween Weekend! Tomorrow is the actual day of Halloween AND our first end-of-month deadline 👻🎃 | | | = Hopefully you're enjoying the Halloween weekend, folks. Tomorrow is Halloween day, and there are a lot of spooky things going on in the spirit of celebration for this fun holiday. But what’s truly giving us nightmares isn’t ghosts, goblins, or horror movies. It’s the imminent threat of a far-right takeover. The frightening reality is that working-class Americans are struggling. They are struggling to make ends meet because of starvation wages and skyrocketing health care costs. They’re struggling to stay healthy because of polluted air and water. They’re struggling to put food on the table, to put a roof over their heads, to receive a quality education, and so much more. We’re a part of this team led by Senator Nina Turner because she’s building a movement that brings together like-minded organizers, activists, progressives, Democrats, and leaders to champion the causes that we care about — the ones that serve everyday, ordinary Americans — not the rich and powerful. As she says, “ Our collective success is rooted in organizing. ” That means that in order to achieve our shared goals, our power is in our voices. And together we are louder, and we are stronger. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ******=**** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** | ******=****** **** **** | | ******=****** **** **** Thanks for being a part of our movement. **Team Turner** ************ ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Nina Turner**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- Nina Turner is **building a movement to empower working families and mobilize Democrats on key progressive issues that impact everyday Americans who have been left behind. # **Friend — This is HUGE. A judge has barred Joe Biden from firing federal employees who refuse the vaccine!**

---
This ruling shows why it’s so important that Republicans win back the U.S. Senate, so that we can get back to confirming judges who put the Constitution FIRST. **There’s no better time than now to join the Kansans and Americans who are speaking up against Biden’s tyrannical regime. Will you stand with us? Chip in now!**
---
[**CHIP IN NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/446e538564d9030b/aab938deebbe721bc3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
**From day one, I’ve led the fight against Biden’s un-American vaccine mandate.**** ** I believe the vaccine has saved lives, but I also believe it’s a personal choice. No one should be fired — and our veterans shouldn’t be discharged like felons — for refusing it. This is a major victory for individual liberty, but now it’s more important than ever that we double down. **I’m going to keep speaking up, and I need YOU to join me in the fight to win back the Senate.** Our End of Month fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and for us to have the resources to win, we MUST continue to reach our fundraising goals. [**I hope you’ll help us now by chipping in whatever you can.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/446e538564d9030b/142bc715e6234ae2c3d6b838967d376c/37973)** ** Let’s keep up the fight!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
I’m asking for your help to stop it | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38125711/314024750/-411286019?refcode=20211030_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmU4ZGUxMy05YTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NishXI52Hbx6Bw0JE-cYpOiEpukKmv-N71Pe2o6SKSM=)
Friends, I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out of time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021. Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the Pledge of Allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. Friends, we only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. [**If you’re with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38125712/314024751/-411286019?refcode=20211030_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmU4ZGUxMy05YTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NishXI52Hbx6Bw0JE-cYpOiEpukKmv-N71Pe2o6SKSM=) This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now. We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday. With polls _STILL_ tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. _And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism_. [**Will you split a donation right now between Seth Moulton and my campaign to ensure we turn out all the voters we need on Tuesday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38125713/314024752/-411286019?refcode=20211030_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmU4ZGUxMy05YTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NishXI52Hbx6Bw0JE-cYpOiEpukKmv-N71Pe2o6SKSM=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38125714/314024753/1844317363?refcode=20211030_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmU4ZGUxMy05YTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NishXI52Hbx6Bw0JE-cYpOiEpukKmv-N71Pe2o6SKSM=)
I’m up against a Trump-loving guy who has promised to go on offense and ban abortion if he’s elected. The only way the stakes could be higher would be if I were up against Donald Trump himself. Now I’ve got to get back on the road, but I’ll ask one last time, [**please, split a donation right now to ensure that we keep Virginia blue this Tuesday.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38125715/314024754/-411286019?refcode=20211030_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmU4ZGUxMy05YTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NishXI52Hbx6Bw0JE-cYpOiEpukKmv-N71Pe2o6SKSM=) \-- Terry

# **It's GOTV time 🎉✊🚪**

**We need our voters fired up and ready to #Flipthe15th, and we need your help to make that happen!** Sign up to join our GOTV events, and then invite your family, friends, neighbors and coworkers to join you!

| **Weekend Early Voting is OPEN this Saturday from 8am-4pm and Sunday from 1pm-5pm.** The _LAST_ day to vote early is this Monday, Nov. 1st. You can vote in person at your Board of Elections from 8am-12pm on Monday, or _**postmark your absentee ballot before your local post office closes**_!!

Only about 5% of registered voters in OH-15 have early voted in the OH-15 special election so far, **.** We’re going to be knocking on doors and making calls all weekend long to **remind Democratic voters and Russo supporters to VOTE by Election Day on Nov. 2!**

Greater Georgia has officially launched an [internship program](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nCeR6CNHmmVkHwcXxf3F_uEB2KPlwpeziWxHiCqFhq3hBiJnYMNmvMLxOnJG3QJLDNshmGP4k-KwnlpjZREXXmERsbMGr0PFd_hLKqCrShxEELFrqKqiENalKxtGwKA_dq6cW352F-f94-fZkA-FGGbOK-QftDlfQG-tpTv0jKE=&c=KrbrUwwBpVaUWyF_22XpwjDl5MiUncQ5FyTuJsxtBeLh_Wfhch8dgQ==&ch=5AxHvVne_Lm72WU0fzT5_GFEYG8VMXnpFUBtDb6SFpzRodK-TCLV5g==)! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress.
If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application.
The full internship application can be found [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nCeR6CNHmmVkHwcXxf3F_uEB2KPlwpeziWxHiCqFhq3hBiJnYMNmvMLxOnJG3QJL2EAnmKIcqbhlfEyUOk5CIVTiUIkSABcvdZyca-ypBqfUtM2jgDSNSeyByhQEHRnM-mjoblYNn7kkOsuqQ8PIOW1BPLCqsBLEy3X84M76meWOnODfQzoQRxXIeQ8fsq0UxZvGU7mq0qcp8ztkAhOfmfSCXVRB9J9mGc8UlUp4kng=&c=KrbrUwwBpVaUWyF_22XpwjDl5MiUncQ5FyTuJsxtBeLh_Wfhch8dgQ==&ch=5AxHvVne_Lm72WU0fzT5_GFEYG8VMXnpFUBtDb6SFpzRodK-TCLV5g==).

| Kelly Loeffler wants Republicans to vote. Is she the right person to ask them? Oct. 28, 2021 - [GPB](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nCeR6CNHmmVkHwcXxf3F_uEB2KPlwpeziWxHiCqFhq3hBiJnYMNmvGkpE--anMe5kGCx_omxDajf3ufAlTw9IEzs3Y1sHEA652KYQYW0Nycw8n69Y7CBRmlcSiwa5-TIfPE0Dpdg6z0IkSp1Lgt4lSsnje8MA-UbPdLPxO5iU8PTKHJ4Tza3f6nDBaOuJu9Glqy9NoWMtR1m5lnRMGc5rV1bLY1wLzm3H92OHq3VZkvknDMLNjZn1e4kAPYaPh4GHutHix_8rbc=&c=KrbrUwwBpVaUWyF_22XpwjDl5MiUncQ5FyTuJsxtBeLh_Wfhch8dgQ==&ch=5AxHvVne_Lm72WU0fzT5_GFEYG8VMXnpFUBtDb6SFpzRodK-TCLV5g==)
---
| "'A lot of people ask me, 'Kelly, you could be doing anything you want; why are you doing what you're doing?'' she said. 'We know what's at stake in this country.' ...
For her part, Loeffler has targeted her conservative voter mobilization efforts to those rural [North Georgia] counties, all of them traditional GOP strongholds. Last month, Greater Georgia launched a 'Red Belt Blitz' in Bartow, Cherokee, Floyd, Forsyth and Hall counties to train local party members on how to canvas and register voters ...
'My focus is on growing the tent and keeping the tent up, so it's not about saying that we are in a place where we need this type of conservative or that type of conservative,' she said. 'We need everyone. And so it's not just growing the tent; it's keeping it up outside of an election year, which is something new for our movement.'"

Click == to find your polling place or check your county's board of elections website for more information. | | | | As part of our Red Belt Blitz, we have been knocking doors across North Georgia to register and engage more voters. Thank you to all of our wonderful volunteers who have worked so hard alongside Greater Georgia to defend conservative values! See photos from our recent efforts in Hall County below: | == | == | == | == | This work is critical to defending conservative values, and it will only be possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. We need your help! -- Click == or the button below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values. | | | == | | | | | | UPDATES: | INTERNSHIP PROGRAM Greater Georgia has officially launched an ==! We are recruiting interns to assist with voter registration and engagement. This opportunity will be great to learn the ropes of political organizing, including how to get out the vote, how to engage with voters in a variety of communities, and more. Possible areas of compensation include class credit, milage reimbursement, and cash incentives based on goal-oriented progress. If you or someone you know is interested, please contact Outreach Coordinator Terry Fye at terry@greatergeorgia.com with questions or to submit a completed application. The full internship application can be found ==. | | | == | | | | IN THE NEWS: | Kelly Loeffler wants Republicans to vote. Is she the right person to ask them? Oct. 28, 2021 - == | "'A lot of people ask me, 'Kelly, you could be doing anything you want; why are you doing what you're doing?'' she said. 'We know what's at stake in this country.' ... For her part, Loeffler has targeted her conservative voter mobilization efforts to those rural [North Georgia] counties, all of them traditional GOP strongholds. Last month, Greater Georgia launched a 'Red Belt Blitz' in Bartow, Cherokee, Floyd, Forsyth and Hall counties to train local party members on how to canvas and register voters ... 'My focus is on growing the tent and keeping the tent up, so it's not about saying that we are in a place where we need this type of conservative or that type of conservative,' she said. 'We need everyone. And so it's not just growing the tent; it's keeping it up outside of an election year, which is something new for our movement.'" name: Team Kilmer
subject: Let's compare records
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

In case you didn't already know what's at stake with the House majority, let's look at what majorities mean.

Having the majority has meant that, during this session of Congress, Derek and House Democrats have been able to pass:
* The American Rescue Plan;
* The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act;
* The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act;
* The For the People Act (H.R. 1);
* The Paycheck Fairness Act;
* The Women's Health Protection Act;
* The Bipartisan Background Checks Act;
* The Wild Olympics Wilderness and Wild and Scenic Rivers Act;
* And more.

Sadly, each one of those proposals faced fierce opposition from House Republicans.

Folks, we can't afford to risk the Democratic majority. Too much is at stake. Republicans are only FIVE seats away from taking back control of the House, so we need all hands on deck.

**[Help us hit our $15,000 goal before the deadline. We know that the BEST way to defeat the GOP extremism sweeping our state is by replacing failed Republican leaders with a Democratic governor. The Washington Post confirmed it, and we've seen it work in other states. **Marco Lopez (D-AZ) is ready to be that Democratic governor who finally reclaims Arizona's future. He's an Obama administration alum, voting rights champion and small business owner with the experience and leadership we need to flip Arizona blue and defend our democracy.**
**But unless we turn our fundraising around before our crucial end-of-month deadline, we won't have the resources we need to win this race and stop Trump-backed extremists from steamrolling Arizona's potential.**

Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. clean_body: it's not looking good | | | = Friend, after Trump endorsed our extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R), = – especially with our end-of-month deadline looming. We expected a surge in grassroots support from people who understand how seriously we need to flip Arizona blue. But we took a look at our ActBlue page and it turns out the opposite is true. Online fundraising is dramatically slowing DOWN as our end-of-month deadline gets CLOSER: = We know that the BEST way to defeat the GOP extremism sweeping our state is by replacing failed Republican leaders with a Democratic governor. The Washington Post confirmed it, and we've seen it work in other states. Marco Lopez (D-AZ) is ready to be that Democratic governor who finally reclaims Arizona's future. He's an Obama administration alum, voting rights champion and small business owner with the experience and leadership we need to flip Arizona blue and defend our democracy. But unless we turn our fundraising around before our crucial end-of-month deadline, we won't have the resources we need to win this race and stop Trump-backed extremists from steamrolling Arizona's potential. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for refusing to let this extremism go unanswered, Team Lopez Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez = | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Dena Cranley
subject: John and I have a bet going...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
– | Hey there, John and I were meeting with the campaign team earlier today and they mentioned that we still need to raise about **$5,500** online before midnight tomorrow to meet our end-of-month goal, so I thought we might play a little game. I bet John that I could raise more money in 12 hours today than he can in 12 hours tomorrow, and I can’t wait to prove I’m right. If you could donate $15 or more right now it’d really help me out — here’s a link to give: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DenaChallenge?refcode=BeatJohn](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38127014/314031853/264534582?amount=15&refcode=ea.ca5d3025-9c39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.ca5d3025-9c39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTVkMzAyNS05YzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4JYFwEkNaCGYW-mReX7zeFbvpSLM2_V8meYErQ9PF9g=)_** Campaigns definitely aren’t all fun and games. We’re on a mission to bring responsible governance and real leadership back to Ohio — and that’s serious business. I will _always_ do what I can to help John and hardworking Ohioans turn this state around and write a comeback story for our communities. If you’re able to support our campaign to elect my husband, I’ll be so grateful. And if you give today through this email, I’d appreciate it that much more. So please, chip in whatever you’re able in the next 12 hours, and remember to use THIS link: **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/DenaChallenge?refcode=BeatJohn](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38127015/314031881/264534582?amount=15&refcode=ea.ca5d3025-9c39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.ca5d3025-9c39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTVkMzAyNS05YzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4JYFwEkNaCGYW-mReX7zeFbvpSLM2_V8meYErQ9PF9g=)_** Thanks so much, Dena Cranley
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38127016/314031882/264534582?amount=15&refcode=ea.ca5d3025-9c39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.ca5d3025-9c39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTVkMzAyNS05YzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4JYFwEkNaCGYW-mReX7zeFbvpSLM2_V8meYErQ9PF9g=)**
---
John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**
