clean_body: – | Hey there, John and I were meeting with the campaign team earlier today and they mentioned that we still need to raise about $5,500 online before midnight tomorrow to meet our end-of-month goal, so I thought we might play a little game. I bet John that I could raise more money in 12 hours today than he can in 12 hours tomorrow, and I can’t wait to prove I’m right. If you could donate $15 or more right now it’d really help me out — here’s a link to give: = Campaigns definitely aren’t all fun and games. We’re on a mission to bring responsible governance and real leadership back to Ohio — and that’s serious business. I will always do what I can to help John and hardworking Ohioans turn this state around and write a comeback story for our communities. If you’re able to support our campaign to elect my husband, I’ll be so grateful. And if you give today through this email, I’d appreciate it that much more. So please, chip in whatever you’re able in the next 12 hours, and remember to use THIS link: = Thanks so much, Dena Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

name: Team Holly
subject: On the campaign trail!
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] Join the #MackPack [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] https://www.hollyforcongress.org [https://www.hollyforcongress.org]

Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St
PO Box 1035
Ringgold, GA 30736
United States

subject: Fwd: Did you see Annika’s message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Not the news I wanted to share.
Friends,

Did you see Annika’s message below? This is not the news I wanted to share with you this Saturday morning: **We still need to raise $2,105 to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal.**[**Will you help us close the gap?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38127309/314033562/1053376810?refcode=em_fr_2021.10.30_b1_TOH_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWI0YmRmNS05ZDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MbaI2YSfcEqx3HOOJtVfV4QoDuMXTtaIZyUApZ6e0Cc=)

During my meeting with Annika yesterday, we talked about the reasons why it’s so important to hit this goal:
* We have several far right candidates in this race including one who is the believed leader of QAnon. They represent the worst of politics, and we need to push back against dangerous, democracy-endangering conspiracy theories.
* Dark Money groups have been spending big money against me -- including a recent investment of **$4.5 million** in attack ads.
* This race is going to be one of the most competitive elections in the country next year. We need to start now if we’re going to win.

I’m bringing you into this conversation today to ask you to contribute to our campaign. If we all chip in what we can, I know we can hit our benchmarks. You can donate to my campaign using this link:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/to-em-oct21?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38127310/314033563/1053376810?refcode=em_fr_2021.10.30_b1_TOH_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWI0YmRmNS05ZDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MbaI2YSfcEqx3HOOJtVfV4QoDuMXTtaIZyUApZ6e0Cc=)

Thank you,

Tom

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Annika, Team O’Halleran**
Date: Thu, Oct 29, 2021 at 4:19 PM

clean_body: Not the news I wanted to share. Friends, Did you see Annika’s message below? This is not the news I wanted to share with you this Saturday morning: We still need to raise $2,105 to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal.= During my meeting with Annika yesterday, we talked about the reasons why it’s so important to hit this goal: We have several far right candidates in this race including one who is the believed leader of QAnon. They represent the worst of politics, and we need to push back against dangerous, democracy-endangering conspiracy theories. Dark Money groups have been spending big money against me -- including a recent investment of $4.5 million in attack ads. This race is going to be one of the most competitive elections in the country next year. We need to start now if we’re going to win. I’m bringing you into this conversation today to ask you to contribute to our campaign. If we all chip in what we can, I know we can hit our benchmarks. You can donate to my campaign using this link: = Thank you, Tom \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Annika, Team O’Halleran Date: Thu, Oct 29, 2021 at 4:19 PM Subject: Going into a meeting with Tom this afternoon To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> = Hey there, team -- I’m about to head into a meeting with Tom to give him an update on how we’re pacing toward our end-of-month fundraising target, and as of now, it’s not good news. = To be honest, I’m not sure what I will tell Tom if we continue to fall behind. I’m hoping I can say to him that folks like you stepped up to help us put a dent in our $5,000 fundraising goal. clean_body: It’s not a fluke | | | = | | Glenn Youngkin and I are TIED, Derek. It’s not just one or two fluke polls — top-rated pollsters have consistently shown a dead heat in this must-win race for Democrats: Suffolk University, 10/26/2021: TIE Emerson College, 10/25/2021: TIE Monmouth University, 10/20/2021: TIE Republicans are fired up to elect their guy because they know it’s the only way Donald Trump will be able to launch his 2024 comeback. Trump knows it too — that’s why he announced he’s campaigning in Virginia to give his handpicked candidate Glenn Youngkin a boost before Election Day. With just 3 days left in this race, this is looking like it will all come down to voter turnout. So truthfully, I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up and donating to our final voter mobilization fundraising goal. We need to get fired up, Derek — it’s the only way we’ll be able to STOP Donald Trump’s comeback. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s do this, Derek. As we take a moment to reflect on the campaign so far, = | | = First, we made a name for ourselves by launching David’s campaign. = = Then, we started making even more headlines with David’s unique story and passion for his community. = Now, we’re making headlines because of our huge endorsements from organizations like the Collective PAC. = As you can see, we have been making big waves here in Illinois and around the country, and we are excited to continue our work. But in order to win this race and expand our Democratic Majority in the House, we need your help. = | = Thank you for being part of this team, Peter. And keep your eyes peeled for even more headlines coming soon. — Team Palmer David Palmer is running for Congress in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District. After years of hearing from entrenched D.C. politicians who care more about re-election than sticking up for the people they represent, David is ready to serve, listen, and do everything he can to make life better for the people here in Central Illinois. Our campaign runs on support from people like you, not special interests, so anything you can chip in will help give Illinoisans a leader they can count on.** = Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails , or you can . | Paid for by Palmer for Illinois Palmer for Illinois PO Box 164 Champaign, IL 61874 United States

Peter,

I could not be more proud of Virginia Democrats’ accomplishments in the General Assembly over the past two years.

From increasing the minimum wage and abolishing the death penalty to expanding early voting and legalizing marijuana, we’ve delivered important wins for our Commonwealth.

But our work doesn’t end there. Virginia has some of the shortest legislative sessions in the country, which means there’s only so much that can be accomplished during each session. **We’ve come a long way in undoing harmful right wing policies in our state, but there’s still so much work to do.**

Our progress is improving the lives of folks across the Commonwealth, but we could lose it all if Republicans win a majority in the House on Tuesday.

subject: Fiscal Insanity in D.C. - Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8129940?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
**_Front line in the fight for liberty!_**
**_MCPP unveils big, bold office sign in downtown Jackson_**
|
Dear Friend,

If you happened to have a spare $15,000, would you spend it on climate change? I doubt it. With the cost of living increasing, there aren’t many folk with much cash to spare at all.

Would you chose to spend any of your hard earned money on expanding child tax credits or collectivizing childcare? Again, I doubt it.

Yet this is precisely what Washington is seeking to do with the Social Security and Climate bill. By spending $1.75 trillion of your tax dollars, they are not simply proposing to splurge $15,000 per household. They are throwing that money at their priorities - not yours.

**The social security bill is really a bill to socialize America.** It will raise debt and taxes, undermine America’s energy security, and make the United States less competitive.

**Thanks to progressive politicians in DC, America is set to have a higher corporate tax rate (28%) than Communist China (25%).** If they get their way, America’s energy supply will become as unreliable as Europe’s.

America desperately needs a return of fiscal sanity. Here at the MCPP, we are in the front line in the fight. We are helping mobilize a mass movement. Our policy papers are helping shift the argument in favor of free markets and limited government.

Thank you for supporting our fight back! Have a great weekend.
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

**Ps. Our November 9 th event on Critical Race Theory with the Heritage Foundation is almost sold out! clean_body: | | | | | | Front line in the fight for liberty! MCPP unveils big, bold office sign in downtown Jackson | Dear Friend, If you happened to have a spare $15,000, would you spend it on climate change? I doubt it. With the cost of living increasing, there aren’t many folk with much cash to spare at all. Would you chose to spend any of your hard earned money on expanding child tax credits or collectivizing childcare? Again, I doubt it. Yet this is precisely what Washington is seeking to do with the Social Security and Climate bill. By spending $1.75 trillion of your tax dollars, they are not simply proposing to splurge $15,000 per household. They are throwing that money at their priorities - not yours. The social security bill is really a bill to socialize America. It will raise debt and taxes, undermine America’s energy security, and make the United States less competitive. Thanks to progressive politicians in DC, America is set to have a higher corporate tax rate (28%) than Communist China (25%). If they get their way, America’s energy supply will become as unreliable as Europe’s. America desperately needs a return of fiscal sanity. Here at the MCPP, we are in the front line in the fight. We are helping mobilize a mass movement. Our policy papers are helping shift the argument in favor of free markets and limited government. Thank you for supporting our fight back! Have a great weekend. | | Warm Regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO Ps. Our November 9 th event on Critical Race Theory with the Heritage Foundation is almost sold out! body:
Democrats turned their backs on America. Now, Americans are turning their backs on Democrats. [](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=d15f7efbee384511a3c1e73cdb7c3d96&_e=dt8nwOqwwsvnjjKsZYSlptbEkmdrHYN-wVR5oHgC4m8vH7sqcbMjNqZd7J4_fa0apjbdVGXwxj7SZZ0GOqljVqSby9UNrKLc3cPaWPcB6VaPX8z9WvAwUrKxjy4CJ4bytnN715UC1R2R9t2XiBdnmc55twLiduSx0Jy6E9xZQvpcbykYAtdI8P1oJ6960QNJcOqX2LumhBuH6phKph1PctdfvvMsmNxDYJXvFDd4x0SNPFIYYlIkEUt9ceRL6YcDY1DZ_f-SoGfHlEtmuJFv9KLyNosmFUUgJqmxtkBvQus8x8YnSiz7cKnsa-LXgSFTgn9fx1V69r5-Jpburh1bUPWbc2ufyxyvr2gwgLC0xgGIAyEtdmlIWD0iu6pwy1-sjdt-r6T8KlOBExzeyrisA0cLSNInPCcDOMilBlkeWq0UVHCP6f0O5m1fm-Ud02GZhmangVkH4j3DqDcqSxBtm0RKGiP2jtL7xHE3XJvkxaqi2Bz_ztEmDxiAh7KKWV9j) | |

Peter,

**Democrats turned their backs on America.**

_Opening our borders, spending trillions on socialist programs, and corrupting our schools with Critical Race Theory was just the start._

**Now, Americans are turning their backs on Democrats.**

_Joe Biden’s poll numbers are dismal, his unlawful vaccine mandate is being strongly rejected, and Americans are fleeing blue states in droves._

**2022 is going to be a rough year for Democrats. **

Everywhere we go in Ohio, we see patriots who love our country and are fired up to take back Washington. Our freedoms are on the line – and we MUST do everything we can to ensure they are not stolen from us by power-hungry career politicians.
[**DEFEND FREEDOM: DONATE NOW**](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=d15f7efbee384511a3c1e73cdb7c3d96&_e=dt8nwOqwwsvnjjKsZYSlptbEkmdrHYN-wVR5oHgC4m8vH7sqcbMjNqZd7J4_fa0apjbdVGXwxj7SZZ0GOqljVqSby9UNrKLc3cPaWPcB6VaPX8z9WvAwUrKxjy4CJ4bytnN715UC1R2R9t2XiBdnmc55twLiduSx0Jy6E9xZQvpcbykYAtdI8P1oJ6960QNJcOqX2LumhBuH6phKph1PctdfvvMsmNxDYJXvFDd4x0SNPFIYYlIkEUt9ceRL6YcDY1DZ_f-SoGfHlEtmuJFv9KLyNosmFUUgJqmxtkBvQusxoYs7xhl-Q0UTeJ4jeRDjhvaAZSsH1l3KxGWZrpq7LM8gX9V8jTuaWUPeu7Ua4txveW7HffNgqAEE41cEeUQ0FYCaoiK6XzTw8hUFyLvFIy7z5rKaMFu92QlgBkFb02D9lfz70XAkW-vTpzVJrVAEUs9s3RelQViv4Obrnee9o1GrgXJ0ykehw-m4rlVTadEn-O2lFsJBrVlqBaRkzmhw)
Career politicians got our country into this mess.

They have no plan to lead us back to a prosperous and secure future.

**We need OUTSIDER business leaders in Washington to create jobs, grow our economy, and protect our freedoms from the threat of big government socialism.**

[_**_Will you contribute before tomorrow’s MIDNIGHT deadline to help Bernie defeat the career politicians? >>>_**_](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=d15f7efbee384511a3c1e73cdb7c3d96&_e=dt8nwOqwwsvnjjKsZYSlptbEkmdrHYN-wVR5oHgC4m8vH7sqcbMjNqZd7J4_fa0apjbdVGXwxj7SZZ0GOqljVqSby9UNrKLc3cPaWPcB6VaPX8z9WvAwUrKxjy4CJ4bytnN715UC1R2R9t2XiBdnmc55twLiduSx0Jy6E9xZQvpcbykYAtdI8P1oJ6960QNJcOqX2LumhBuH6phKph1PctdfvvMsmNxDYJXvFDd4x0SNPFIYYlIkEUt9ceRL6YcDY1DZ_f-SoGfHlEtmuJFv9KLyNosmFUUgJqmxtkBvQuuG0xLBk9iaT1D97wjuF9AK9ypEzOPFgAfajCmsiDGKBudMZafuzornUpvVsBMTSMgkdT1-CdG2Ex2NOzl3oXUQbAf1lj_LO9lqjZbe37Sr9qhAV14JIopgu8UphE2J1_SXbRFZ9H3DxOu624BvJONUxK94S_kniGKuzwl7-ZB6ozj0LX45GfKVIEc7ANmS-uzR1K5YTVp9h9dGgvHUfiZZ)

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Don’t be afraid, just vote them out.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

When you think about the laws being proposed in this state to restrict our rights and threaten our safety, it’s right to first be very afraid.

But then you have to do something about it.

Keystone Progress is working with partners around PA to vote on Election Day this Nov. 2, and vote out the people who want to let Pennsylvanians carry a firearm without a license and take away a person’s right to end an unwanted pregnancy. We are fighting for a more equitable, just, and progressive PA.

But we need your help before things get even scarier.

Please donate to help our organizing and Get Out the Vote efforts before our end-of-month deadline at MIDNIGHT tomorrow on Halloween. Every dollar helps! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=103021]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=103021&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=103021&amount=10] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=103021&amount=30 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=103021&amount=30] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=103021&amount=50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=103021&amount=50]
Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=103021]

Thank you for standing with us -- and we'll see you at the polls on Nov. 2!

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: are you with us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for Senate
body:
|
#
As former Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee and the DCCC, Chris has worked tirelessly over the years to elect Democrats. He knows better than anyone how important it is to make early investments in organizing that can withstand the GOP's high-dollar super-PAC politics. That's why, with just 24 hours to go before our important end-of-month deadline, we are working hard to meet our key fundraising goal. LaMalfa seems to be banking on apathy from young people to keep getting elected. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38129762/314044664/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWY4OGQ2MC1hNjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cvz8uGc4hGAoEyGyndyn4mvTsoh4bluAGpYeLGtgUHM=)
Hi, friend. 👋 It's Holley again with a quick update on the project I'm working on and our end-of-month goal.

I came on board Team Max earlier this month to help reach young people and college students across the North State. So far, I'm pleased to report that my conversations are going really well!

**LaMalfa seems to be banking on apathy from young people to keep getting elected.** He thinks his comments discrediting the 2020 election results -- not to mention the moon-landing -- fly beneath the radar. But he'd be surprised to hear that a lot of people I'm talking to know what an embarrassment he’s been.

It's a myth that young people are apathetic, but speaking from experience, we need to do more work to reach my peers where they're at. That's why I joined Max and his team, and it's why one of my first orders of business is securing financial support from the California Democratic Party (CDP) to bolster our efforts.

**Here's how I see it: If you're able to chip in $3 today, that will prove to the CDP that we have grassroots fundraising momentum, and it will unlock a grant from them. Your donation is a two-for-one.**

**[So what do you say, friend? Can you chip in $3 toward our end-of-month goal to help us demonstrate that we've got what it takes to reach more young people and students? name: =?utf-8?Q?Tina=20Ramirez?=
subject: This is scary
body:
What the Democrats are doing. |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/october-end-of-month?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20211030_tinaramirez_october-end-of-month-one-day
Friend,
Sorry to bother you on Saturday, but before I take my daughter trick-or-treating tomorrow, I wanted to tell you something that is scarier than Halloween: the consequences if we don’t stop Radical Progressives from ruining our country.

Right now, not only are we fighting for a Republican majority in the House, but our individual freedoms are now at stake. Here is what’s on the line:
* Our Pro-Life rights
* The Second Amendment
* Our Constitutional rights and liberties
* The security of our elections
* Parental choice for our children’s education

We cannot afford to go backward and lose everything that we are fighting for. Not only is the Biden Administration willing to forgo your Constitutional rights, but they want to force their FAR-LEFT views on you.

That is why this October End-of-Month goal is so important. Every contribution towards this goal is one more ally in fighting back and supporting a Pro-Republican, Pro-Life, Pro-Second Amendment vision!

clean_body: What the Democrats are doing. | Friend, Sorry to bother you on Saturday, but before I take my daughter trick-or-treating tomorrow, I wanted to tell you something that is scarier than Halloween: the consequences if we don’t stop Radical Progressives from ruining our country. Right now, not only are we fighting for a Republican majority in the House, but our individual freedoms are now at stake. Here is what’s on the line: Our Pro-Life rights The Second Amendment Our Constitutional rights and liberties The security of our elections Parental choice for our children’s education We cannot afford to go backward and lose everything that we are fighting for. Not only is the Biden Administration willing to forgo your Constitutional rights, but they want to force their FAR-LEFT views on you. That is why this October End-of-Month goal is so important. Every contribution towards this goal is one more ally in fighting back and supporting a Pro-Republican, Pro-Life, Pro-Second Amendment vision! FIGHT BACK HERE! () CONTRIBUTE $100 () CONTRIBUTE $50 () CONTRIBUTE $25 () CONTRIBUTE $10 () CONTRIBUTE NOW () Thank you, Tina Ramirez Republican Candidate Virginia's 7 Congressional District CONTRIBUTE $25 () ============================================================ Twitter () Facebook () Website () Tina Ramirez for Congress | Copyright © 2021 Tina Ramirez for Congress, Inc., All rights reserved.

Fellow Conservative,

**Welp, October certainly flew by!**

I’ve now been running for congress in Virginia’s 7th District for 7 months – which is longer than my newborn son has been alive – you’ll know that time takes on a new meaning altogether if you’re a parent yourself.

**My son is now the main reason I’m running for elected office**. I don’t know if you’re still reading about the goings-on in Congress these days, but it’s like every single Democrat drank crazy juice at exactly the same time, resulting in their newfound zest to raise taxes on the middle class and taken the economy.

$1,500 SHORT OF HITTING OUR OCTOBER GOAL

subject: What’s gone from Build Back Better 😢
body:
There's too much at stake. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38130145/314046048/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmRhNWJkMi1hODM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itK7zGH8ItMcGizCJgaTNjAItcb7N54BGPdeKeygKdc=)
Friend,

There's a lot going on in Washington DC, so I want to take this opportunity to cut through the noise. Before I ask for [**$3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38130146/314046049/1898666321?refcode=em-103021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmRhNWJkMi1hODM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itK7zGH8ItMcGizCJgaTNjAItcb7N54BGPdeKeygKdc=) toward our end-of-month deadline that hits tomorrow night at 11:59 pm, I'd like to address what's still in and what seems to be out of the Build Back Better Act and how that will impact working families.

On Thursday, President Biden introduced a $1.75 trillion framework for Build Back Better that gained agreement from Democrats in the House and Senate -- progressives and more moderate Democrats alike. Just yesterday, the Congressional Progressive Caucus -- a group made up of progressive members of Congress in the House -- reaffirmed their commitment to passing both the infrastructure bill and the Build Back Better Act at the same time.

That's because they're concerned that Senate Democrats like Joe Manchin and Krysten Sinema may try to gain further concessions from the Build Back Better Act -- if the infrastructure bill is passed first.

**The new framework is down from $3.5 to $1.75 trillion and solutions I would like to see pass are no longer included due to no margin for Democratic votes in the Senate:** \- Medicare expansion to cover dental and vision
\- Lowering prescription drug prices
\- Paid family leave
\- Tuition-free community college
\- Child tax credit beyond 2022 Democrats like Manchin and Sinema have extracted too many concessions already. However, let's not forget that the GOP hasn't made any effort to help working families either. We must stand up to their disregard for what the American people need just to survive.

We need to elect Democrats with the expertise to make a case for investing in the future of our country and those who will deliver for working families.

**Tomorrow marks the end of the month of October and our fundraising deadline. We need to raise an additional $9,091 before tomorrow at 11:59 pm to stay on track. As a grassroots campaign, we don’t take corporate PAC money, we depend on individuals like you.**

[**Will you chip in $3 so I can go to Washington and be a determined advocate for our working families and this Austin community? The importance of electing champions, and not just any Democrat, has become more clear through these negotiations.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38130147/314046050/1898666321?refcode=em-103021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmRhNWJkMi1hODM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=itK7zGH8ItMcGizCJgaTNjAItcb7N54BGPdeKeygKdc=)

Thanks,

Donna

name: Team Never Again
subject: BREAKING: Jan 6 protestors met with White House Staff and Members of Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
"EXCLUSIVE: Jan. 6 Protest Organizers Say They Participated in ‘Dozens’ of Planning Meetings With Members of Congress and White House Staff" \-- Rolling Stone [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38130587/314048638/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiODViYjM5LWFiMzktZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=l10hV_c_RjaPkR3ZY3u4g7_6_mEQLwpAqILgFqbZtZs=&emci=c1c058f8-5c37-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2b85bb39-ab39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001) **"EXCLUSIVE: Jan. 6 Protest Organizers Say They Participated in ‘Dozens’ of Planning Meetings With Members of Congress and White House Staff"**
\-- _Rolling Stone_
Huge breaking news regarding the January 6 investigation, team.

Several organizers of the January 6 insurrection at our Capitol have begun cooperating with congressional investigators and what they have shared is damning.

These sources claim that members of Congress and White House staff held "dozens" of planning briefings with the protest organizers. Included in these meetings were Treason Caucus members Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Mo Brooks, Madison Cawthorn, Andy Biggs, and Louie Gohmert, as well as White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows.

The organizers claim that Gosar went so far as to "guarantee" blanket pardons for participants of the insurrection.

It's becoming more clear every day that Donald Trump and his allies in Congress played a direct role in the violent attack on our democracy. Their involvement in the planning of the insurrection is criminal and we will not stop fighting until they are held accountable -- but we need your help.

subject: I hope you read this

body:
We know how important your time is

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38130719/314048780/-793144256?refcode=dpva-em-211030-long&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjg1YmIzOS1hYjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z2d_I-10o9jUI4FKr2Ehh1DucDoGZyN4zieHDDpfopY=&emci=cfa36f6d-9039-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3b85bb39-ab39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15759664)

| | I know we send you a lot of emails — _I also know how valuable your time is_ — but **we only have three days left in this election.** But I hope that you’ll take a moment to read this email and I hope you’ll find it convincing enough to join our team and donate to help us get out the vote on November 2nd. Derek, I know Terry McAuliffe. He actually cares about the future of the Commonwealth of Virginia. He cares whether folks have good high-paying jobs and a quality education. He cares about building people up. He did it before as Governor and I’m confident he’ll do it again after he’s elected in November. **Terry and his running mates, Hala Ayala and Mark Herring, are responsible for some of the greatest accomplishments this Commonwealth has seen in decades.** While Terry was Governor he pulled Virginia’s economy out of the Great Recession, created over 200,000 new jobs, oversaw personal incomes rising, and made record investments in education. Hala Ayala was elected to the House of Delegates in 2017, and has passed bills that have redesigned the fabric of our Commonwealth for the better. From expanding medicaid, caping the price of insulin, and ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment, to ending the death penalty and codifying the Voting Rights Act of Virginia, Hala has been a leading voice in this new Progressive movement in the General Assembly and will be an amazing leader as Lieutenant Governor and as the President of the Virginia Senate. Mark Herring has been our Attorney General for the last 8 years, and I’m proud of the work his office has done since he was elected. Suing the Trump administration’s Muslim ban, fighting the opioid epidemic, going after the groups like the NRA, creating a Civil Rights division in the Attorney General’s office, and defending the Governor’s decision to remove the hateful statue of Robert E. Lee from Richmond’s Monument Avenue. Mark Herring has defended Virginia at every turn and will continue to do so when we re-elect him to another term on the 2nd. Derek, this isn’t just about not electing the guy Trump endorsed — _this is about electing the right people to do the job_ — Terry, Hala, and Mark. This is about sending them back to Richmond with a Democratic House of Delegates. **This is about moving Virginia forward as a Commonwealth.** I believe that with your support, and the support of other folks just like you, we can win in 3 days — I hope you’ll join us. clean_body: We know how important your time is | | | I know we send you a lot of emails — I also know how valuable your time is — but we only have three days left in this election. But I hope that you’ll take a moment to read this email and I hope you’ll find it convincing enough to join our team and donate to help us get out the vote on November 2nd. Derek, I know Terry McAuliffe. He actually cares about the future of the Commonwealth of Virginia. He cares whether folks have good high-paying jobs and a quality education. He cares about building people up. He did it before as Governor and I’m confident he’ll do it again after he’s elected in November. Terry and his running mates, Hala Ayala and Mark Herring, are responsible for some of the greatest accomplishments this Commonwealth has seen in decades. While Terry was Governor he pulled Virginia’s economy out of the Great Recession, created over 200,000 new jobs, oversaw personal incomes rising, and made record investments in education. Hala Ayala was elected to the House of Delegates in 2017, and has passed bills that have redesigned the fabric of our Commonwealth for the better. From expanding medicaid, caping the price of insulin, and ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment, to ending the death penalty and codifying the Voting Rights Act of Virginia, Hala has been a leading voice in this new Progressive movement in the General Assembly and will be an amazing leader as Lieutenant Governor and as the President of the Virginia Senate. Mark Herring has been our Attorney General for the last 8 years, and I’m proud of the work his office has done since he was elected. Suing the Trump administration’s Muslim ban, fighting the opioid epidemic, going after the groups like the NRA, creating a Civil Rights division in the Attorney General’s office, and defending the Governor’s decision to remove the hateful statue of Robert E. Lee from Richmond’s Monument Avenue. Mark Herring has defended Virginia at every turn and will continue to do so when we re-elect him to another term on the 2nd. Derek, this isn’t just about not electing the guy Trump endorsed — this is about electing the right people to do the job — Terry, Hala, and Mark. This is about sending them back to Richmond with a Democratic House of Delegates. This is about moving Virginia forward as a Commonwealth. I believe that with your support, and the support of other folks just like you, we can win in 3 days — I hope you’ll join us. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: updating you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |

**Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) recently announced he's running for reelection and was just endorsed by Donald Trump at a rally here in Iowa. I fully intend to defeat him and flip Iowa blue, Peter – but I need you with me. Here's the latest:**
**First** , the momentum is on _our_ side. Nearly two-thirds of Iowa voters _don't_ want to reelect Sen. Grassley, which means we have a unique opportunity and advantage that we must harness to flip this Senate seat blue.
**But** defeating Sen. Grassley – in what the Des Moines Register is calling a "marquee matchup" – will come down to resources, and the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has already hauled in $76 million this year. They are well equipped to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and attack competitive challengers like me.
**So right now,** ahead of our next big fundraising deadline at midnight, my team and I need to raise another $6,489 to keep pace with our fundraising. This is a grassroots campaign, and hitting these goals and building up resources is how we will flip Iowa blue.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
_Sponsored message_
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkt3amqu37iih7dtoisgaadl7mdujreg411jq6b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdi66o72cdh2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqcgatnohnn202fmt2hoq6mk3tg6689jagg6ior0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdi66o72cdh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoelj2jl4iq14o639ec9loin0hafktgepgki4lng_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdi66o72cdh2bs)

Larry P. Arnn

She’s lived without healthcare. She’s faced enormous amounts of student loan debt. She’s not some politician living far away from the daily lives of everyday working people. She has walked the same path many of us have.
This is why grassroots donations are incredibly important to Maggie because she knows how important every single contribution from every single person matters. When Maggie speaks out about voting rights, ensuring everyone’s voice is heard, she carries all of our voices with her in this grassroots movement. [**Can you pitch in $10 right now? We only have 24 hours left to reach our $500 end-of-month goal -- and we’re still $350 short.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38131649/314052751/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_211030EOM2_EOM_TEAM_90DO_4_G_TESTB_L2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTBlYmFjMy1hYzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFBjVx7ImEzaA-zTVSkblk9tdZn9ldkBH95KhX8Fnck=)

---|---|---|---|---
| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek,****

****Congratulations to the NH Federation of Republican Women, and especially to re-elected NHFRW President Elizabeth Girard, on an incredible Leadership retreat. Featuring speakers from across the country, the event held unique panels, informative presentations and ample networking opportunities. Make sure to check out their full event recap farther down this newsletter!****

This Tuesday is Election Day, so be sure to get out in support of your local Republican candidates. If you’d like to volunteer, click this**[**LINK**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Felection_day/1/0100017cd18c9d9f-6c8b80ad-8d42-476e-bfc7-8478f173f914-000000/nt8UrP8OahujsX_IMQs-d3e7nsE=242)**to learn more.

The Granite State also experienced a terrible loss this past week. Staff Sergeant Jesse Sherrill passed away following the **[**collision**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fboston.cbslocal.com%2F2021%2F10%2F29%2Fjesse-sherill-nh-state-police-procession-crash%2F/1/0100017cd18c9d9f-6c8b80ad-8d42-476e-bfc7-8478f173f914-000000/GMec_gQWRzfRhGay15Xt6X_9ke8=242)**of his cruiser and a tractor trailer. Staff Sgt. Sherrill was highly regarded by his colleagues, and on behalf of the Party I would like to offer my sincerest condolences to his family. He spent everyday working to keep New Hampshire residents safe, and his loss is felt by all of us.

In the words of our Governor Chris Sununu,"****He was an individual who nobly answered that call to service and who was steadfast and devoted to the safety and well-being of all of his fellow Granite Staters,". **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **Rep. Judy Aron Responds to Anti-Semitic Comments**

Concord, NH- Representative Judy Aron (R-South Acworth) released the following statement in response to anti-Semitic comments made by Representative Maria Perez (D-Milford). Rep. Perez on October 23rd commented, “from the river to the sea, Palestine will be free!”

**Rep. Judy Aron (R-South Acworth):** "Israel is the ancient homeland of the Jewish people and has been recognized as such for centuries. Zionism is the natural yearning of the Jewish people to return to their homeland to enjoy their self governance and sovereignty. Anti-Zionism is Anti-Semitism and should be repudiated.”“I am very concerned that Rep. Perez has made such a declaration and I hope she will study some history to understand the natural, historical, and rightful claim to the land of Israel by the Jewish people. It is my hope that both sides of the current conflict can find a peaceful resolution and comments like hers do not further that goal."

**Background: **_The American Jewish Committee states ([LINK](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.ajc.org%2Ftranslatehate%2FFrom-the-River-to-the-Sea/1/0100017cd18c9d9f-6c8b80ad-8d42-476e-bfc7-8478f173f914-000000/nzL1qDRj7763usVlkrhtJL0Y6GQ=242)) that “From the River to the Sea” “...calls for the establishment of a State of Palestine from the Jordan River to the Mediterranean Sea, erasing the State of Israel and its people. It is also a rallying cry for terrorist groups and their sympathizers...which called for Israel’s destruction in its original governing charter in 1988.”_**

**Republican Spotlight - Candidate Paul Callaghan**
---
| |
---
| | **Today's Republican Spotlight shines on Rochester Mayoral Candidate Paul Callaghan!

Paul is an outstanding member of the community, having spent over 25 years serving Rochester as a police officer and now as a prosecutor and lieutenant in the Strafford County Sheriff Department.

Since the start of his campaign, Paul has made it a point to be super active, and spends his weekends connecting with voters - knocking on doors across the community and getting to have one on one conversations.

We appreciate Paul's willingness to remain active within the Rochester community, and would like everyone's help in supporting his campaign! Check out his [Facebook](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fm.facebook.com%2Fhome.php/1/0100017cd18c9d9f-6c8b80ad-8d42-476e-bfc7-8478f173f914-000000/8j9ktHvRrJZpTwiOwlRsY-OADJY=242) page, and consider providing a donation or ordering a yard sign. Even better, repost his page on your own wall, and share his page with friends and family around Rochester.
**_
“I have lived my entire life in Rochester. My wife and I have raised three wonderful children in this community. I have served this city as a police officer for 25 years, held leadership roles on many boards and committees, and I have coached youth sports. _

_"I want to say to all the residents of Rochester, after serving our community for many years, it would be one of the greatest honors of my life to continue to serve you, the people of Rochester, as your mayor." - Paul Callaghan_

| | **T****hank you to everyone who made our first ever NH Republican Women’s Leadership Conference & Retreat a massive success! This is the first time New Hampshire has held an event of this size entirely dedicated to GOP women. NHFRW is operating at our highest capacity ever, producing consistent results for our members and raising more money than we have in years past which we are utilizing strategically to spread our message and build our bench of Republican women! **

**We'd like to thank Jay Lucas & Karen Ballou Lucas for hosting our Opening Night Welcome Party in Portsmouth, NH featuring US Senator Kelly Ayotte, Executive Councillor Janet Stevens & our Lilac Society Sponsors: Corky Messner & the NH Advantage PAC and Gail Huff Brown. **

**We'd also like to thank NHGOP Vice Chair Pamela Tucker for hosting our Cocktails & Capitalism Closing Reception in Rye Beach, NH featuring Karoline Leavitt, Gail Huff Brown, Matt Mowers, Tim Baxter and Julian Acciard! **

**During our conference, we heard from NHFRW President Elizabeth Girard, Governor Chris Sununu, Speaker Pro Tempore Rep Kim Rice, RNC National Committeewoman Juliana Bergeron, RNC Director of Women's Engagement Vanessa Faura and Speaker Linda Upmeyer from the Iowa GOP - among others! We received publicity from the National Federation of Republican Women, WMUR, Governor Chris Sununu and so many of you! We are so appreciative of all the support within our organization! **

**Congratulations to NHFRW President Elizabeth Girard on being reelected unanimously for a second term as the youngest State President nationwide and the 2022-2023 Executive Officers: Rep Deb Hobson (1st VP), Hon. Jane Johnson (2nd VP), Nicole Martin (3rd VP), Donni Hodgkins (4th VP), Hon. Linda Rea Camarota (Secretary), Danielle Rieger (Assistant Secretary), Virginia Drye (Communications Director), Jessica Kallipolites (Treasurer), Elizabeth Ann Moreau (Assistant Treasurer), Christine Peters (Director), Rep. Jeanine Notter (Director) and Hon. Jane Lane (Director). We are currently building our Advisory Board of appointed chairs for 2022-2023! If you're interested in serving in a larger role within the Federation - you can join for 2022 and apply **[**HERE**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nhfrw.org%2Fjoin/1/0100017cd18c9d9f-6c8b80ad-8d42-476e-bfc7-8478f173f914-000000/O3MZ0ffgIOaa2N01nsegYTDjR20=242)

---
| |
---
| |
---

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

| | | We need to move NOW.

**Virginia 's MONUMENTAL election is just four days away, and Trump's cronies are pulling out all the stops to turn the state bright red.**

And we know that if they win in Virginia, our Democratic House Majority would be their next target.

So at this make-or-break moment for Democrats everywhere, it's critical that we answer President Obama's STUNNING call to action:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

President Obama couldn't be more right.

**We need to do whatever it takes to protect Democrats nationwide --_starting with our House Democrats and our razor-thin House Majority. _**

****[That's why we're calling on 10,310 grassroots supporters to come to our defense, protect our House Majority, and help prevent a total Republican takeover. Will you rush $3 before our End of Month Deadline in 24 hours to show Republicans that no matter what happens in Virginia, our House Majority is here to stay? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)****

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Working people are counting on us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Right now, the establishment is stripping away progressive priorities in
the reconciliation package, all just to appease Corporate Democrats
negotiating in bad faith. Working people across the country are counting
on Congress to expand the social safety net and invest in climate action —
but right now, Justice Democrats in Congress are the only ones prepared to
deliver.

Earlier this week, we let you know that we need to raise $25,000 to the
Primary Power Fund to support our progressive primary challengers who are
running for Congress in working-class communities. But with just one day
until our end-of-month deadline, we’re still $9,373 short.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81465?refcode=em20211030-20246&t=1002&akid=20246%2E1203867%2EPuaBLS ]We’re counting on three grassroots supporters from 18326 to
rush in and chip in just $3, $16, or $27 to the Primary Power Fund so we
can provide Justice Democrats the finance, digital, and field
infrastructure needed to get elected.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81465?refcode=em20211030-20246&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20246%2E1203867%2EPuaBLS ]Primary Power Fund

When the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) and their
corporate candidates are behind on fundraising, wealthy donors can rush in
— but unlike the establishment, we rely on grassroots contributions from
all over the country to make up the difference.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81465?refcode=em20211030-20246&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20246%2E1203867%2EPuaBLS ]Will you be one of the three people we need from 18326 to
chip in towards our $25,000 goal? Any amount will make a meaningful
difference.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81465?refcode=em20211030-20246&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=20246%2E1203867%2EPuaBLS ]Contribute $3

Many establishment donations come from just the wealthiest zip codes, but
our grassroots supporters give what they can, when they can, from
communities nationwide.

We are fighting for a better future, not just for 18326, but
for working-class communities across the nation. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81465?refcode=em20211030-20246&t=1025&akid=20246%2E1203867%2EPuaBLS ]That is why we’re
asking if you’ll chip in $3 to help us meet our $25,000
fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=20246%2E1203867%2EPuaBLS ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=20246%2E1203867%2EPuaBLS ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211030-20246-footer&t=1028&refcode2=20246_1203867_PuaBLS&akid=20246%2E1203867%2EPuaBLS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=20246%2E1203867%2EPuaBLS

Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Working people across the country are counting on Congress to expand the social safety net and invest in climate action — but right now, Justice Democrats in Congress are the only ones prepared to deliver. Earlier this week, we let you know that we need to raise $25,000 to the Primary Power Fund to support our progressive primary challengers who are running for Congress in working-class communities. But with just one day until our end-of-month deadline, we’re still $9,373 short. [ ]We’re counting on three grassroots supporters from 18326 to rush in and chip in just $3, $16, or $27 to the Primary Power Fund so we can provide Justice Democrats the finance, digital, and field infrastructure needed to get elected. [ ]Primary Power Fund When the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) and their corporate candidates are behind on fundraising, wealthy donors can rush in — but unlike the establishment, we rely on grassroots contributions from all over the country to make up the difference. [ ]Will you be one of the three people we need from 18326 to chip in towards our $25,000 goal? Any amount will make a meaningful difference. [ ]Contribute $3 Many establishment donations come from just the wealthiest zip codes, but our grassroots supporters give what they can, when they can, from communities nationwide. We are fighting for a better future, not just for 18326, but for working-class communities across the nation. [ ]That is why we’re asking if you’ll chip in $3 to help us meet our $25,000 fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: ICYMI News
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlr1khbn2bi4ja2ba0sg928e7g8th0le18bg6ovo_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdi66o72c1h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkrdq2g4uulcoc0vigm0sreho5q39j3fo5lu8as0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdi66o72c1h2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztptdl3nfk31hn49aejife9387sitk1srsaaflo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdi66o72c1h2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Team Franken
subject: Chuck Grassley’s assault on our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC
body:
Chip in and help us elect a leader who cares about our right to vote. | | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xnpPS9ElAtCH4oZLR7595Zq09gnDzcRbJCOrFmiHYHnjglxkrrsFzhU9svWvmQSA3sZHxIYp6JjDa_vZoWYkwBLWhv2xsgphINN1i_gsk7-IctYGmnz2-pG5NIBJ4PO_4XYpzutPUvFOgBnFtLs71ZWb_jNZ2IRNsisJthiyYs8RzOYIkiCmjrRUiRIZ-XaI-bAEtYXtl260BDxR2pHSvng-XiZcPJGfbbzGf2Ja-qWB3johMjbCWXgAmHG-oqRS7YSZeJB04l_RXQV6OsXI710-lAfW9M6q6dmo059xAZHwlrf_OBBxs8-mzzDXoOHWdIobJrK2EhlFPps7YcHPadAhY3Cz9X2tb6EK2xeOXTF7Ck9MNUxyhPrPoHTJQW3Gpy9z-Nd_lMhCyrYY_mCfCLbu7UuUZQpKdK1sBdcPWa2A/3gl/AjA8StFRTza2NjsMULjvpw/h0/mKXhQbgk6-Egg596V7MjIWKuiuRSTIs_T6IZSNSpUYg)
---
**Friends, nothing is more sacred in our democracy than our right — your right — to vote.**
But Chuck Grassley clearly doesn't agree. We can't think of any other reason why he, and _every other Republican Senator_ , voted AGAINST the Freedom to Vote Act last week.
The bill would’ve:
* Made Election Day a national holiday
* Expanded vote by mail
* Set minimum days for early voting
* Prevented illegal voter roll purging
* Restored rights to the formerly incarcerated
* And much, much more.

Listen, Mike respects Sen. Grassley's years of service to our state. But if Grassley doesn't have the courage to vote yes on securing basic rights for American citizens, it's time to show him the barn door!
**[Can you chip in $3 to our campaign before tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline? We'd love to tell you that last week's vote was Chuck Grassley's only assault on our democracy. But we'd be fibbing.
Just a few weeks ago, Grassley stood silently on stage alongside Donald Trump at a rally right here in Iowa, all while Trump repeated his lie that President Biden stole the election. Then, he accepted Trump’s endorsement.
Grassley has also been silent as Iowa's own state legislature passed a law that **restricts** your ability to return a mail ballot on behalf of another voter (such as someone with a disability)... **limits** your access to mail ballot drop boxes... and **reduces** the availability of polling places for you to vote.
**It's clear: Your right to vote in Iowa is on the ballot next fall.**
**[That's why we're asking you, if you're in a place where you can make a donation, to chip in $3 or whatever you can to Mike's campaign. clean_body: Chip in and help us elect a leader who cares about our right to vote. | | | | Friends, nothing is more sacred in our democracy than our right — your right — to vote. But Chuck Grassley clearly doesn't agree. We can't think of any other reason why he, and every other Republican Senator , voted AGAINST the Freedom to Vote Act last week. The bill would’ve: Made Election Day a national holiday Expanded vote by mail Set minimum days for early voting Prevented illegal voter roll purging Restored rights to the formerly incarcerated And much, much more. Listen, Mike respects Sen. Grassley's years of service to our state. But if Grassley doesn't have the courage to vote yes on securing basic rights for American citizens, it's time to show him the barn door! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | We'd love to tell you that last week's vote was Chuck Grassley's only assault on our democracy. But we'd be fibbing. Just a few weeks ago, Grassley stood silently on stage alongside Donald Trump at a rally right here in Iowa, all while Trump repeated his lie that President Biden stole the election. Then, he accepted Trump’s endorsement. Grassley has also been silent as Iowa's own state legislature passed a law that restricts your ability to return a mail ballot on behalf of another voter (such as someone with a disability)... limits your access to mail ballot drop boxes... and reduces the availability of polling places for you to vote. It's clear: Your right to vote in Iowa is on the ballot next fall. name: Mark Kelly and Gabby Giffords
subject: We are writing together to humbly ask if you can chip in $3 before midnight tomorrow.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
An important (and interesting) message from Gabby Giffords and Mark Kelly.
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hey everybody it’s Mark Kelly.Mark Kelly
And Gabby Giffords.Gabby Giffords |
| Gabby and I are coming to you today to ask if you’d help us hold this Senate seat in Arizona by [**making a $20.22 donation to my campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline is over.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211030-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1601_6688874_nyjzCG&akid=1601%2E6688874%2EnyjzCG)** Mark Kelly
This is important.Gabby Giffords |
| Grassroots donations like yours are what keep our campaign moving ahead. And not just ahead...Mark Kelly
Full speed ahead!Gabby Giffords |
| Because that’s exactly how we’re going to win this race. One donation at a time.Mark Kelly
It means so much to me and Mark. This is so important for Arizona, and for our country. We cannot do it alone.Gabby Giffords |
| Like Gabby says, we cannot do this alone. It requires a team.Mark Kelly
Yes, a team.Gabby Giffords |
| So please...Mark Kelly
[**Can you please make a $20.22 contribution — or whatever amount you can afford — to Mark Kelly’s Senate campaign before our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline is over tomorrow at midnight? This is so important.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211030-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1601_6688874_nyjzCG&akid=1601%2E6688874%2EnyjzCG)**

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Pennsylvania ranks #1 for *this*
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Peter, do you want to hear one fact that feels hard to believe some days?
**CNN ranked Our Commonwealth of Pennsylvania as the Senate seat most likely to flip in the upcoming midterm elections.** 😱
Take a look for yourself:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35546?refcode=em20211030-3260&t=1&akid=3260%2E434096%2E4aI8ci)
Believe it or not, Peter, we’ve been consistently ranked first in this list since early 2020. Seriously, there’s _already_ consensus that Pennsylvania will be the single-most important Senate seat to flip in 2022.
**This is important, because tomorrow at 11:59 p.m. our campaign is up against our end-of-month deadline.** It’s absolutely mission-critical that we establish John Fetterman as the candidate that can win not just the primary — but also a tough and expensive general election against the PA GOP.
[**_If you’re in a place to do so, will you make your very first $5 donation right now to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate? This isn't your average Senate race, Peter,_****_and if you make a contribution to our campaign you’ll help us pass our historic goal tomorrow at 11:59 p.m. — surpassing $10M raised over this *entire* campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35546?refcode=em20211030-3260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3260%2E434096%2E4aI8ci)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35546?refcode=em20211030-3260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3260%2E434096%2E4aI8ci)**
We’re incredibly humbled + grateful to share that our campaign is closing in on $10 *million* raised since we first announced, **and that we're pushing really hard to get there by our deadline tomorrow, October 31 at 11:59 p.m.**
**$10 million is a lot of money** , Peter. **But as CNN shows, flipping this Senate seat is within reach.**
Every dollar we raise in this early stage helps:
✅ Build our organizing program
✅ Hire key organizers + staff
✅ And build a movement capable of overcoming the deep-pocketed GOP in the general election.
[**This race couldn’t be more important. Would you consider making your first-ever $5 donation before tomorrow’s deadline at 11:59 p.m.?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35546?refcode=em20211030-3260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3260%2E434096%2E4aI8ci)
Thanks for everything,
Team Fetterman
P.S. Winning the #1 most likely to flip seat in America is going to take a LOT of support — _and we're especially looking for a surge of support from Cresco_. [** _Click here to donate directly to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate. Any amount you give today will have an immediate impact on the campaign work we can fund _this month.__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/35546?refcode=em20211030-3260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3260%2E434096%2E4aI8ci)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Will you take our Trump poll today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership – including President Trump – as we work to take back the house from s We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Fellow American,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=2a025ef1d7c943e6a30f6b42bc2f10ad&_e=a8f4_sPWySvhahXkoUSmWvYaAu0yNUKKROX5U54Eqmq_LTP11oFaehdMb39X2HNw0qou53M7Kfq7OGxQbTfaoA46mCsxkut_bo31UO90aRHuD069qZVlaIXuV5lNP0X3l5hrLPZL3lbg9pdgZlAAgrhvWpAv0yNc3PI41078xEdtRWbsdJ7UvFTsTwALKn1NM7fLSJlvoo22J8Rxe10yTRiCy0fjLYXWvvEO3KfC6OpLxs0A2R16QuF6D1F6WduaOKy-X8Jzz7fzyNnIT1obHa1mvRomdl7-rYTsCW5DNd0e57ZQBJXyD6RVLAuRk7Zrkj6Ni2fVqr8tJylGMZqWp3UkzjjV7TDIvf9EMJbwK5w-Y-oevItWteQDI6NcpEc-GH3joLFnfncv8lPwR20n-AUK7C8GayF3NclbFliwnvwwoSjQ892hVVPXrOQ95WVT0y_xuYnjRfA61cCL4bcWL8BRTGxf-7qWokYm171BrjEryGbEle2eZtwyuiHJ-dY1u84BE0dQ5KzzlEfr2nHIRQ%3D%3D)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 2,578 votes short. **

Fellow American, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=2a025ef1d7c943e6a30f6b42bc2f10ad&_e=a8f4_sPWySvhahXkoUSmWvYaAu0yNUKKROX5U54Eqmq_LTP11oFaehdMb39X2HNw0qou53M7Kfq7OGxQbTfaoA46mCsxkut_bo31UO90aRHuD069qZVlaIXuV5lNP0X3l5hrLPZL3lbg9pdgZlAAgrhvWpAv0yNc3PI41078xEdtRWbsdJ7UvFTsTwALKn1NM7fLSJlvoo22J8Rxe10yTRiCy0fjLYXWvvEO3KfC6OpLxs0A2R16QuF6D1F6WduaOKy-X8Jzz7fzyNnIT1obHa1mvRomdl7-rYTsCW5DNd0e57ZQBJXyD6RVLAuRk7ZrU8xISfi95H1Q-3X30LlXg-76Ek6S05OeEOTF7h9zwo_Df0rp0A7fY9d7NSrtMENBgyG7EewAitgxl7_dwpfXJDgO4EV5QUsUWkobe8M4RLnkL0tKNqvxwoIyScKNSIFF6CB732ky7IX6Ea3ANJGROgwbrbNWvfv7bMdQYuvawV1AVK5q0raZXpgJv2f_nTzuqYW4cR44_1niY6v-EsC8QQ%3D%3D)**

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=2a025ef1d7c943e6a30f6b42bc2f10ad&_e=a8f4_sPWySvhahXkoUSmWvYaAu0yNUKKROX5U54Eqmq_LTP11oFaehdMb39X2HNw0qou53M7Kfq7OGxQbTfaoA46mCsxkut_bo31UO90aRHuD069qZVlaIXuV5lNP0X3l5hrLPZL3lbg9pdgZlAAgrhvWpAv0yNc3PI41078xEdtRWbsdJ7UvFTsTwALKn1NM7fLSJlvoo22J8Rxe10yTRiCy0fjLYXWvvEO3KfC6OpLxs0A2R16QuF6D1F6WduaOKy-X8Jzz7fzyNnIT1obHa1mvRomdl7-rYTsCW5DNd0e57ZQBJXyD6RVLAuRk7ZrGDaajWrUoEQh5QM9rkTcBv5ceeJKTC4Sg0nnIc6XUN_OJa0LHNB-X5wdQjRrmwFCy8bzHtbbUDojJGjDfaCMIFF4q8PaeUD8-b7mR-GWtsEHYdlhw-WJaSy3LkskZAmbuoMUefCHWXfbeaH01rAprcHvcNhR223kHSNqQuVbkteGNL1GHaDkNzZHyAECNObZj_6bf71fS_xLdjbW4MlpKw%3D%3D)**

subject: WATCH: First TV Ad of the Michigan Gov Race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We're taking We the People's Campaign to the Next Level, Peter. | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=1d46276158&e=fe4b890356)
---
| Peter,

Today, we're taking WE THE PEOPLE's campaign for Governor to the next level.

_**Our campaign is airing the first TV ad of the Michigan Governor's race.**_

After six months of Big Tech censorship and establishment attacks, our grassroots movement is taking to the TV screen - you'll see it today during the Michigan vs. Michigan State Game on FOX!

[**Watch our New Ad "REAL DEAL" by clicking below **](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=37de9c0ec2&e=fe4b890356)👇
---
| | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5ec3789d90&e=fe4b890356)
---
| It wasn't the poll-tested politicians or establishment insiders who led the fight against Governor Whitmer's tyrannical lockdown policies. It was WE THE PEOPLE - the business owners, parents, regular Michigan citizens who took a stand.

**Michigan deserves a __Real-Deal_ _Conservative__** \- a political outsider with business experience - to take on Gretchen Whitmer and rebuild our economy.

This HUGE step forward for our campaign was made possible by our Monthly Members and donors who have helped build this grassroots movement from the ground up. TV is expensive folks, but it's the best way to reach new people with our message.

If you can, sign up to become a Card-Carrying Movement Member or pitch in a few bucks to help us keep spreading the word to new Michiganders -->
---
| [Become a Card-Carrying Movement Member](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7b0608903e&e=fe4b890356 "Become a Card-Carrying Movement Member")
---
| [Pitch in $25](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=62338b422f&e=fe4b890356 "Pitch in $25")
---
| I'm going to ask you to go one step further, Peter.

As you may have heard, Facebook brought its hammer down yesterday when it REMOVED our group of 87,000 patriots, "Michigan Needs an Adjustment." (Right after[ the Detroit News published their article](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=0d6fbb88fb&e=fe4b890356) about our TV Ad - coincidence? 🤔)

Censorship is real - that is why we're going up on TV early where Zuckerberg can't silence our voice. **But for those on social media,__I need your help to share our new ad to your Facebook friends.__**

[Click here to see our New Ad on Facebook](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=f1910f323a&e=fe4b890356) \- like and share to keep up this incredible momentum!

I am so honored to be surrounded by such amazing and dedicated patriots who share our mission to Make Michigan Free Again. **Thank you Peter for being a part of our grassroots movement!**
---
| **Go Broncos,
[](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=e750b669dd&e=fe4b890356)**
**Garrett Soldano**
---
| | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=dc9fc25535&e=fe4b890356)
---
| P.S. - make sure to follow our campaign on [Facebook](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=d909070474&e=fe4b890356), [Twitter](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8a5399cf4b&e=fe4b890356), and [Instagram](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=ff04317c3b&e=fe4b890356) and spread the word of our campaign to your friends and neighbors.
---

Since announcing my run for Governor, we’ve seen an incredible outpouring of support from all corners of the state. I’m inspired that so many of you have stood up to say you refuse to go back to “normal” and are ready for a stronger, more resilient Massachusetts that works for everyone. We’re building this campaign with the people who recognize we need a leader who has the will, urgency, and empathy to act, and who isn’t afraid to fight for climate action, economic justice, and racial equity. That’s why we’re growing our movement the right way — not by taking money or marching orders from corporate interests and the wealthy few — but with grassroots supporters giving $3, $5, and $10 when they can. **In these early days of our campaign, it’s critical that we show the strength of this team. body:
Peter,
**We’re coming up against our monthly deadline with just 36 hours left to go.** We’re catching up and our October goal is within reach. _**[Your donation today could help us get across that finish line and finish strong for the month. Can you rush a contribution RIGHT NOW?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38132517/314057809/-536301564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTAzZjQ5YS1iMzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HdRGpAGqPebrZ9NQFf8yonQ4L6o2nzEVMyDTk1Mv2fs=)**_

I’m sure you get lots of emails from political campaigns vying for your attention. I know the drill, and I understand you can’t donate to everyone. **Here’s why I think you should donate to us: **
1. We’re a strong, viable campaign that’s raised over a quarter million dollars to date from thousands of individual donors.
2. My opponent is a Trump-endorsed Republican who’s voted against everything from LGBTQ+ and gender equality, to voting rights, to clean water (in a district known for drought). This is the same guy whose first vote in Congress was for sedition.
3. I’m a political organizer and veteran of campaigns like Senator Bernie Sanders’ and Congresswoman AOC’s. I know what it takes to win and I’m already investing in the deep, relational organizing that leads campaigns like ours to victory.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38132519/314057818/-536301564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTAzZjQ5YS1iMzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HdRGpAGqPebrZ9NQFf8yonQ4L6o2nzEVMyDTk1Mv2fs=)

Our grassroots movement depends on strong fundraising numbers. **[With enough resources, we’ll flip this district blue& win a seat back from the Republicans to maintain our House majority. Can you chip in any amount to help us across the finish line?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38132522/314057821/-536301564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTAzZjQ5YS1iMzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HdRGpAGqPebrZ9NQFf8yonQ4L6o2nzEVMyDTk1Mv2fs=)**

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

**Here's something else:** We have more people imprisoned in the state of Arizona than the _entire population of Prescott_.

clean_body: | | | | Did you get my last email? Friend, Did you get my last email? We have a HUGE fundraising deadline coming up TOMORROW! Liz Cheney is tapping DC, Virginia, California, and New York for donations to her war chest. If I am going to outraise her, I need YOUR HELP! President Donald Trump has endorsed my campaign because he knows the fight we are up against—and it isn’t just happening in Congress. Around our country Leftists and their allies in the Liberal Media, are trying to fundamentally change America. They want to demolish the nuclear family, destroy energy jobs, and teach our children to hate each other based on their race, while also confusing them about their gender. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |
