name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I’m counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We have a bunch of tough races ahead -- and if we don’t protect our razor-thin majority, all the progress we’re making right now could be rolled back.
#
Team,
Democrats are on the cusp of passing historic investments in rebuilding our infrastructure, fighting climate change, delivering universal pre-K, making health care and child care more affordable, cutting taxes for the middle class, and so much more. We’re going to pay for it by making sure the biggest corporations and the ultra-rich pay their fair share. We’re not there yet, but this is major progress that will help millions of Americans -- and it’s only possible because of our Democratic majority.
But here’s the thing: with a 50-50 majority, **_we can’t afford to lose a single Senate seat._** And as we fight for progress on Capitol Hill, Senate Democrats urgently need your support ahead of our October deadline.
**[Chip in $5 before midnight tomorrow to defend the Democratic Senate majority and keep up the progress we’re making for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38132599/314058009/-540320945?refcode=jr_em_nd_211030_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWFlNDQ4ZS1iMzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=atkenMBRpH4E9sFkY8p2vJjkg0ws8VklKLvHorkXn5g=)**
We have a critical Senate race next year in my home state of Nevada. We have to defend two of our newest senators, Mark Kelly and Raphael Warnock. And as chair of the DSCC’s Women’s Senate Network, I’m especially focused on defending our Democratic women like Catherine Cortez Masto and Maggie Hassan -- and adding even more women to the Senate next year.
**We have a bunch of tough races ahead -- and if we don’t protect our razor-thin majority, all the progress we’re making right now could be rolled back. I’m counting on you:**
**[Can you contribute $5 before midnight tomorrow to elect Senate Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38132601/314058010/-540320945?refcode=jr_em_nd_211030_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWFlNDQ4ZS1iMzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=atkenMBRpH4E9sFkY8p2vJjkg0ws8VklKLvHorkXn5g=)**
Thank you,
Jacky

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38132602/314058011/-540320945?refcode=jr_em_nd_211030_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWFlNDQ4ZS1iMzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=atkenMBRpH4E9sFkY8p2vJjkg0ws8VklKLvHorkXn5g=)**

subject: Tomorrow isn't just Halloween

body:
Tomorrow is an important day, and I'm not talking about Halloween -- it's our end-of-month fundraising deadline. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38132755/314058206/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzM3ZjhhMC1iMzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yngyHyFmGbnX1FZ8-k8BowPNkM4xJ0fr1D7BT3PC4GY=&emci=f13e02e7-0239-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9737f8a0-b339-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

Tomorrow is an important day, and I'm not talking about Halloween -- it's our end-of-month fundraising deadline. We have just over 24 hours left to hit our goal, but we're still coming up a bit short.

But I’m not afraid to defy the odds.
When I was 3 years old, my father went to the hospital seeking help.
The hospital turned him away -- and a few hours later, I watched my dad die from a completely treatable illness.
My family’s life changed forever that day. My mother was left to raise my sisters and me all on her own.
[**I swore to devote my life to ensuring that what happened to my father and mother would never happen to anyone again.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38132791/314058248/-711004501?refcode=20211031_em_fr_b1_moore_30&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTAzZjQ5YS1iMzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HIDszR1vHJw6dSMSLAdVlyNZkiIHQFnG93xWsMoeYFQ=)

clean_body: | | I’m blown away: Just this morning, I was at risk of falling short of my critical End of Month fundraising goal. = = | = = = Look, I’m under no impression this election will be easy. But I’m not afraid to defy the odds. When I was 3 years old, my father went to the hospital seeking help. The hospital turned him away -- and a few hours later, I watched my dad die from a completely treatable illness. My family’s life changed forever that day. My mother was left to raise my sisters and me all on her own. = That’s why I’m running for Governor. Because if we don’t fix the broken systems that cause so much despair -- we’ll forever be stuck cleaning up the debris. But tonight’s End of Month deadline is one of the biggest I’ve ever faced. = = | = = = = = I’m running for people like my mom, people like my dad, and Marylanders in every corner of this state. With your help, I know we can win this race and change the course of state’s history. Elevate, Wes Moore Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. We know you receive a lot of emails -- but that’s because winning this race is going to take a massive grassroots campaign. We need to educate, empower, and register thousands of new Democrats. We need to turn out every voter in every corner of Maryland. And we need your help to do it. | | = Making your gift monthly will maximize the resources to help Wes bring change to Maryland. Make your donation monthly right now! | = It’s supporters like you who fuel Wes’ campaign and we’re so thankful for your support. We’re committed to ensuring your contact information is up to date and accurate. If you are not dpwillis67@gmail.com, please update your preferred name and email . Any contact information here reflects the donor information we have on file for this specific email. If you donated with a spouse, with a check, or with a different email address, it may not be reflected in our records just yet. Thank you so much for your support and understanding while we work to update our records. If you’d prefer to receive fewer emails, we understand. Please update your preferences We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please do so below: Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States | | BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, LISSA MUSCATINE, TREASURER. | | Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense.

The NRA, NSSF, and the rest of the gun lobby are currently spending millions of dollars working to roll back decades of progress on gun safety.

**FIRST:** David Chipman reached out to you asking you to donate before our October 31st fundraising deadline. We’ve set a goal of raising $115,000 and we won’t hit it without your help.

**NOW:** We’re reaching out to see if you can make a donation before tomorrow at midnight. This is important.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Get vaccinated or starve
body:
Peter, **The Biden Administration just announced that all businesses with more than 100 employees will be FORCED to require COVID-19 vaccines for all employees.** In other words, Joe Biden is basically saying: _**" Get the**** ****vaccine or**** ****starve. "** _ **_I 'll be_**** _ _****_clear_**** _ _****_with you; The Center_**** _ _****_for_**** _ _****_American Liberty WILL sue the Biden Administration the second he enforces this outrageous, totalitarian mandate._** [**Will you support the Center for American**** ****Liberty**** ****to help us sue the Biden Administration for this completely unconstitutional vaccine order** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58652306:JjIvzP2N2:m:1:3253819041:61AA63BA563DF03B70A8348FB59FC35C:r) This isn't an empty threat. _**This is a PROMISE.** _ And the writing has been on the wall for months. First they locked you out of your houses of worship, schools, and closed small businesses... ...then they forced you to wear masks. Now Joe Biden and the rest of his authoritarian minions are going to stop you from making a living and _**feeding your family if you don 't get the COVID vaccine.** _ They don't care about your right to religious freedom... They don't care about your right to medical privacy... They don't care about your right to determine how you should live your life... The only thing that matters to Joe Biden and the radical Left is that you obey. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to help us stop this totalitarian takeover of our lives by sending a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58652306:JjIvzP2N2:m:1:3253819041:61AA63BA563DF03B70A8348FB59FC35C:r) If we don't stand up HERE and NOW it will never end. But we can't do this without you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon, and I founded the Center for American Liberty to push back against these kinds of threats to our civil liberties. And Biden's UNCONSTITUTIONAL order mandating that employers require COVID-19 vaccination is perhaps his worst offense yet. Forget about the astounding hypocrisy. For years they've shouted, "my body, my choice." But it's clear that they only care about "your body" and "your choice" when it fits their political narrative. And if we don't take immediate action against the Biden Administration's new vaccine mandate - your right to make your own medical decisions... your right to individual freedom will disappear overnight. [**That 's why I'm asking you to help us prepare for one of the most important legal battles of our lives with a gift of $35 or more today.** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58652306:JjIvzP2N2:m:1:3253819041:61AA63BA563DF03B70A8348FB59FC35C:r) If we don't fight to keep our freedoms today, they'll be gone tomorrow. Thank you in advance for standing with us and for liberty. Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58652306:JjIvzP2N2:m:1:3253819041:61AA63BA563DF03B70A8348FB59FC35C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58652306:JjIvzP2N2:m:1:3253819041:61AA63BA563DF03B70A8348FB59FC35C:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58652306:JjIvzP2N2:m:1:3253819041:61AA63BA563DF03B70A8348FB59FC35C:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58652307:JjIvzP2N2:m:1:3253819041:61AA63BA563DF03B70A8348FB59FC35C:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Trumpism is on the march in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I’m asking for your help to stop it | | |
---
Team, I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out of time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021. Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the Pledge of Allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. Folks, we only have THREE days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. **[If you’re with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38133249/314060728/1415752491?refcode=e20211030_trm-split3&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzU3MzIxMi1iNjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CwxRedJLL6JuV2-2nu62jeyoGhyMrxz1l7_MMW87jno=)** This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now. We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday. With polls _STILL_ tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. _And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism._ **[Will you split a donation right now between Maggie Hassan’s and my campaign to ensure we turn out all the voters we need on Tuesday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38133250/314060729/1415752491?refcode=e20211030_trm-split3&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzU3MzIxMi1iNjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CwxRedJLL6JuV2-2nu62jeyoGhyMrxz1l7_MMW87jno=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38133251/314060730/1415752491?refcode=e20211030_trm-split3&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzU3MzIxMi1iNjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CwxRedJLL6JuV2-2nu62jeyoGhyMrxz1l7_MMW87jno=)

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Especially for us single parents
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
My Sisters and Brothers,

It’s horrific that the United States of America is one of only 8 countries in the world without national paid maternity leave.

As a single mom, I know how valuable paid maternity leave is for families. We need the Senate keep paid maternity leave in the Build Back Better Act!

After giving birth, new mothers need between 6-8 weeks to recover, but any paid leave is better than none. That’s why it’s so critical that paid maternity leave be included in Biden’s Build Back Better Act. Help me keep fighting for paid maternity leave! Donate here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenoctober21?refcode=102921

Together #WeRepresent,

Gwen Moore
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Incredible news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
October has been an exciting month for our campaign.
#
October has been an exciting month for our campaign. So, we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss the incredible news about our race to elect Erica to the U.S. Senate:
**This month, Elect Black Women PAC *and* Nina Turner announced their official endorsement of Erica.**
Our unapologetic, scrappy campaign to flip North Carolina blue and replace Richard Burr is gaining real momentum, national attention, and broad on-the-ground support — without the help of the DSCC or corporate donors.
**Erica has what it takes to win — but only if we channel this momentum into the race ahead. So we’re asking:**
[**Will you chip in $5 — or anything you can — to our campaign and help us close our $2,500 fundraising gap before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline? Every donation will help fund the ads, events, and voter outreach necessary to build a winning campaign to send Erica to the U.S. Senate.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/24611?refcode=em20211030-597&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=597%2E3698%2E4HYrtO)

We’re almost out of time in the Virginia elections.

Today is the last day of early voting.

Tuesday is Election Day.

**_And right now, Trump’s hand-picked candidate is WINNING._**

Polls have Glenn Youngkin ahead in the Virginia Governor’s race, and if he wins, he could sweep extremist Republicans into power in Virginia for decades.

That’s why we’re coming to you right now -- we need to make sure Trump’s guy doesn’t win on Tuesday. We may be almost out of time, but there’s a whole lot we can still do.

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GvsB4ASAdzBMwUbhbjZGDsp-hfQwPTGD5owYWulwtjU=/8L5Ax22UcVjHV51t4rzkC0NFWeTGA8oU05w9b5N4xXQ=?refcode=E12179-20211030-Redistricting-header-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) | Peter, I know there is a lot of concern right now around redistricting since California is losing a Congressional seat. The first draft map was released this week and it was what we feared - it takes my district and makes it _even redder._ I'm advising folks to stay calm and remain patient because we won't know the official lines until December. **But, there 's one thing we _can_ do right now and it's to prepare for what's to come. We have to raise money now, so that we are ready to reach new voters right when the maps are official in December.** [**My team and I want to raise $15,000 this weekend towards a New Voter Outreach Fund, but we 'll need your help and support. Can you please rush in a donation right now so that we can be ready to reach new voters on day one?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GvsB4ASAdzBMwUbhbjZGDsp-hfQwPTGD5owYWulwtjU=/8L5Ax22UcVjHV51t4rzkC0NFWeTGA8oU05w9b5N4xXQ=?refcode=E12179-20211030-Redistricting-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15) **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/GvsB4ASAdzBMwUbhbjZGDsp-hfQwPTGD5owYWulwtjU=/8L5Ax22UcVjHV51t4rzkC0NFWeTGA8oU05w9b5N4xXQ=?refcode=E12179-20211030-Redistricting-graphic-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/GvsB4ASAdzBMwUbhbjZGDsp-hfQwPTGD5owYWulwtjU=/8L5Ax22UcVjHV51t4rzkC0NFWeTGA8oU05w9b5N4xXQ=?express_lane=true&refcode=E12179-20211030-Redistricting-EL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

We can't wait until the new lines are released to start preparing. We're taking action now with the help of our amazing grassroots supporters to fill a $15,000 New Voter Outreach Fund so we have all the resources we need for our new voter contact efforts.
[**Will you send in a generous donation right now to help us reach this goal?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GvsB4ASAdzBMwUbhbjZGDsp-hfQwPTGD5owYWulwtjU=/8L5Ax22UcVjHV51t4rzkC0NFWeTGA8oU05w9b5N4xXQ=?refcode=E12179-20211030-Redistricting-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

name: Brandon Mosely
subject: I’m sounding the alarm on Republican Ken Calvert!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Mosely For Congress
body:
Listen,

I’m sounding the alarm on MAGA Republican Ken Calvert:

✖ He voted to overturn the free and fair election of President Biden.
✖ He voted against COVID relief for millions of Americans.
✖ He’s openly against LGBTQ+ and immigrant rights.

For too long, Republican Rep. Ken Calvert has been able to hide in the shadows of the louder and prouder members of his MAGA caucus. Not anymore.

We’re only 1 day away from the end of the month. If I’m going to defeat Ken Calvert, I can't afford any setbacks this early in the race. I still need $3,531 by tomorrow at midnight to do that. Chip in $3 now! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q42021_df

We’re only 4 days away from the end of month. If I’m going to defeat Ken Calvert’s mountain of dark money, I MUST kick my ad campaign into overdrive on September 1st. But, I need $10,000 by August 31st to do that. Chip in $3 now! » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q42021_df

Look, Ken Calvert and I couldn’t be more different:

✔ I believe we should provide small businesses with the relief they need to hire workers and pay a fair wage.
✔ I believe we should expand access to quality and affordable healthcare and bring down the soaring costs of prescription drug pricing.
✔ I believe we should eliminate student loan debt and give all students the tools they need to succeed in the 21st Century economy.

With a slim majority in the House, all of those things are within reach. But we actually lost critical House seats in the last election. If we lose control of the House next year, we can kiss all of our progressive plans goodbye.

Look, we must fight harder than ever. So please, chip in $3 right now to help me defeat Ken Calvert >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q42021_df

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CONTRIBUTE $3 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q42021_df?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true]

CONTRIBUTE $7 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q42021_df?amount=7&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true]

Or a custom donation » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_mosely_q42021_df?amount=10&amounts=3,7,10]

Thank you so much for your support.

Brandon Mosely

Democratic Candidate for Congress, CA-42

P.O. Box 1495, Romoland, CA 92585
www.brandonmosely.com

name: Team Inslee
subject: 3 spooky facts on the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Let's continue the fight for bold climate action together.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/RaxXsVKdrNfq/UFhTaVVqdVJGeUZrVmJwT29lRmFlcVhYMnEvTWtYWjk0OHFZSVp3T3F2NmlvVStrZXpjcktmLzF4SGJxT0pBdThkWmpEUDYzdXNoR1B6cHZxRmF5cHFFOUo5dlpVakRUWTNkTjRXRnUzQm89S0/TnY3WmRlR2dkS1ZWSTBGcStiRXlWZnh3WExlM0lnNFBWM1cyZnJhZ2FmRT0S1) Ready to be scared, friend? With Halloween around the corner, we wanted to share a few spooky facts that should motivate all of us to take action on the climate crisis:
1. The last seven years have been the warmest in recorded human history.

2. These rising temperatures are already having human consequences, including more wildfires and more frequent high-intensity hurricanes.

3. Right now, no G20 country is on-track to contain global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius -- including the United States.

There is still time to take aggressive action -- grounded in science -- to combat the climate crisis and protect our shared future. But we have to act now. [_**If those facts spooked you, chip in $10 right now, before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight. Let 's continue the fight for bold climate action together.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/j~ejh-~4yvHb/UFhTaVVqdVJGeUZrVmJwT29lRmFlcVhYMnEvTWtYWjk0OHFZSVp3T3F2NmlvVStrZXpjcktmLzF4SGJxT0pBdThkWmpEUDYzdXNoR1B6cHZxRmF5cHFFOUo5dlpVakRUWTNkTjRXRnUzQm89S0/TnY3WmRlR2dkS1ZWSTBGcStiRXlWZnh3WExlM0lnNFBWM1cyZnJhZ2FmRT0S1) Thank you, Team Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/erqjJVX6DYfR/UFhTaVVqdVJGeUZrVmJwT29lRmFlcVhYMnEvTWtYWjk0OHFZSVp3T3F2NmlvVStrZXpjcktmLzF4SGJxT0pBdThkWmpEUDYzdXNoR1B6cHZxRmF5cHFFOUo5dlpVakRUWTNkTjRXRnUzQm89S0/TnY3WmRlR2dkS1ZWSTBGcStiRXlWZnh3WExlM0lnNFBWM1cyZnJhZ2FmRT0S1)

# These shortages are a contrived crisis
---
The Biden Administration is creating unnecessary problems that threaten our economy and way of life. You have heard about the supply chain shortages--a contrived crisis due to unconstitutional and inhumane vaccine mandates leading to unnecessary labor shortages. This shortage is impacting more than just holiday shopping--food prices and the costs of essentials are climbing while everyday items grow scarce.
This can be stopped, but Michael Bennet sits idly by, kowtowing to a reckless administration.
In my positions as Global Logistics Manager and Procurement Manager for Noble Energy, I became an expert in Supply Chain Management. I understand the critical importance of maintaining an efficient flow of goods and materials, and the significant impact degrading the global supply chain has on our economy.
We must rescind this unconstitutional vaccine mandate and any undue restrictions on our labor force to reopen our ports immediately. Now is not the time to play chicken with freedom-loving American workers who are essential to our economic well-being.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: From The Desk Of Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
Is There Hope For America? I get asked all the time: "Do you still believe there is hope for our nation to turn things around?" If we are honest we
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=718867.511.1.287b64d3c70e072dfac577162400b36e)
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=718867.512.1.6d0b12487b2c1dc687ef150b84caeb68) |
---
## Is There Hope For America?
---
I get asked all the time: "Do you still believe there is hope for our nation to turn things around?" If we are honest we would have to say things are not well. Vaccine Mandates. Inflation. Corruption. Stolen Elections. And much more... However, I believe we still have tremendous hope as a country which is why I am running for the US Senate in Oklahoma. Job 8:13 says, "Those who forget God have no hope." The reason so many Americans feel HOPELESS is because America has forgotten God. If those who forget God have no hope that would mean that those who REMEMBER God would have hope. In the midst of the chaos remember God. Remember what God has done in this country before when it seemed like the end/ What He did then, He can do again. God wants to use you to bring hope to America. Utilize your TIME, TALENT & TREASURE to advance hope. God is not finished with our country just yet. Let's hold onto hope and do our part in the fight to #SaveAmerica. Be sure to checkout these 2 important updates I have at:
www.rumble.com/vohdtz-pastor-jackson-lahmeyer-how-to-request-your-covid-19-vaccine-religious-exem.html Thank you - Jackson Lahmeyer
---

Peter,

We know it's hard to believe, but in less than 48 hours, our campaign is facing another MAJOR deadline. _We need your urgent help._

Herschel Walker

Steve and I have visited hundreds of thousands of Nevadans and we’ve been able to listen to their concerns, answer their questions, and hear about their hopes for the future.
I couldn’t be more grateful for this opportunity to serve alongside Steve — and I love working together to create a stronger Nevada.
Steve is always willing to go the extra mile for his family and his community — and that’s why I’m hoping this team will come through for him as we approach this important deadline.
**Steve’s team told me that reaching our goal of 5,000 grassroots donors is crucial for the strength of our campaign.****[If everyone who reads this chips in, we’ll make up the remaining 208 grassroots donors in no time. clean_body: | | | | | | | Below is a personal message from the First Lady of Nevada, Kathy Sisolak, on behalf of Governor Steve Sisolak. Kathy and Steve are committed to working together to create a brighter future for Nevada — and they need your help. | | Folks, it’s Kathy Sisolak. It’s been a while since I reached out and I wanted to give this team an update. Tomorrow is Steve’s October fundraising deadline, and he still needs 208 grassroots donors to chip in so he can make his goal. | | | | | | | | | | | | Steve and I have visited hundreds of thousands of Nevadans and we’ve been able to listen to their concerns, answer their questions, and hear about their hopes for the future. I couldn’t be more grateful for this opportunity to serve alongside Steve — and I love working together to create a stronger Nevada. Steve is always willing to go the extra mile for his family and his community — and that’s why I’m hoping this team will come through for him as we approach this important deadline. Steve’s team told me that reaching our goal of 5,000 grassroots donors is crucial for the strength of our campaign. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Kathy Sisolak First Lady of Nevada | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. body:
Yesterday was Day 7 of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour and I can't think of a better way to finish out some of the last few days of the campaign
| [ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VWNS4S2qF5xCW5V3f_Z4K39P5W7Pgndt4zhxR-N4dVQby3lSbtV1-WJV7CgMcRW8-fzQg6fHS-tW7PQwkz6fLb7LW7XS1F-6ZkC3JW2G9SrK5MQsjqW3BS9Xf7k883CW5HsGjF68JkFrW4tK9qf4j9S7jW5yw7S23fWZtLW6M0pF2679R5SW5YLL7t3n7XyjN6ClCQ28TtF0W1xRX6q3sPxbTW491FK02DHd38W2KdZmh5j4b1FW2Nynl86MkgMTW5c04K-7dFd9WN8g2Q20pF6XYW4FQhVH87n8wVN23z9RQnvhMQVhZYlT17jYbD3cJd1)

| | |

Dear Friend, Yesterday was Day 7 of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour and I can't think of a better way to finish out some of the last few days of the campaign than with the people of Albemarle, Greene, and Fluvanna Counties! Everyone there had fantastic energy and their momentum is pushing me towards the finish line. Our movement is growing stronger as we move towards November 2nd, and I cannot wait to get to work for you as your next Governor.
---
---
| [ **BUS TOUR** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VWNS4S2qF5xCW5V3f_Z4K39P5W7Pgndt4zhxR-N4dVQbS3lSbNV1-WJV7Cg-JHW3YkZ867ln3jhW294cvN69-ZYvW5fFFGG249Gf5W2DhSN154nWc0W5YtyYn2yCqgpW5r_cSq99L2ZYW4tZ1h11m10-KW2qXtDn38y7QQW2t25Jk1WkjrXW3KrjBQ3vKL5QW8jVJLm2RGRkMW1q168r3mHgxGW7YRgpl8tn71gW66j5GL7WwMDhW6sTJMW4GRcHCN1sv9dXM1vfKW8bDdPK5bbbDvW8NHHyY7_mc7PW4qrztN1gDyDwN62rCYbZl4PyN8VgwGStxykqW4hc2dL3DMl2C36751)
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
---
People all over the Commonwealth know how to show up! Between our stops in Charlottesville, Ruckersville, Fork Union, and Warrenton, it is clear that Virginians everywhere are ready for a new kind of leader: one who does not play dirty tricks to win elections like failed 40-year career politicians. On November 2nd, we will make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.
---
---
Day 7 ended with our stop at the Inn in Vint Hill in Warrenton and it is clear that people there are ready to soar, not settle. The last day of early voting is _today! _If you have not already voted, make a plan to bring 10 friends with you and head to the polls.
---
There are only 2 more days left of the #WinWithGlenn Bus Tour as we roll into Day 8. Today, we are making stops in Alexandria, Chantilly, Fredericksburg, West Springfield, and Manassas Park. The #WinWithGlenn bus is filling up fast with signatures, but there is still space for yours! I can't wait to see you there. For Virginia,
---
---
Glenn Youngkin

Peter,
Pramila is working hard to secure economic relief and climate action in the Build Back Better Act. In order to support her in this critical fight, we need to hit our $25,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. We can’t risk falling short.
If just 1 out of every 10 people reading this email chipped in, we would hit our goal in no time. We must continue showing that the progressive movement for an expansive Build Back Better Act that invests in our communities is strong. **Can you use this personalized link to donate $3 or whatever you can afford right now, so Pramila knows that it was you who chipped in to get us to our goal? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pramila-oct-deadline?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20211030](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8510?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20211030-1&amount=3&t=20&akid=763%2E420207%2EQHxzAz)**

body:
I wanted to give you this peek into our fundraising this month
#

Hey folks! It’s Malcolm’s Finance Director, Catherine.
I wanted to give you this peek into our fundraising this month. Here’s the first thing I see on my dashboard:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38135291/314073268/-360183459?refcode2=b7e1b060-c439-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-2-15d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2UxYjA2MC1jNDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AQ6ajQrEdPMy1awff9h6LZlth78zDz19x8EiWfZLDxs=)
Now that’s a number I’m proud of — our average contribution of $25 is a true testament to our small-dollar, grassroots movement!
Malcolm is not a self-funded candidate, and he’s not taking money from corporate PACs, either.
That means our campaign is powered by lots of people chipping in a few dollars at a time, including these folks:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38135294/314073271/-360183459?refcode2=b7e1b060-c439-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-2-15d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2UxYjA2MC1jNDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AQ6ajQrEdPMy1awff9h6LZlth78zDz19x8EiWfZLDxs=)
I haven’t seen your name on this list yet, but I hope I will soon! Every donation ensures we have the resources to build a coalition of voters in all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties.
And if we’re going to elect Malcolm to be the champion working families need in the U.S. Senate, we absolutely must hit our fundraising targets, including our ambitious October fundraising goal.
[So before you close this email, I have to ask. Can Malcolm count on you to make your first contribution — of $3 or any amount — to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38135296/314073274/-360183459?refcode2=b7e1b060-c439-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-2-15d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2UxYjA2MC1jNDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AQ6ajQrEdPMy1awff9h6LZlth78zDz19x8EiWfZLDxs=)

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: This couldn’t be more urgent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

The work that Powered by People is doing in Texas couldn’t be more urgent.

Texas has a long and dark history of voter suppression. But in the past
months, we’ve seen Republican lawmakers take attacks on democracy to a new
level — passing extreme voting restrictions and approving a new electoral
map that consolidates GOP power.

With democracy at stake, we can’t afford to slow down. Right now, Powered
by People is organizing volunteers, registering voters, and laying the
groundwork for a blue Texas. That’s why we’re setting a goal of raising
another $20,000 in grassroots donations before the end of October — to
make sure we don’t miss a beat in our critical work to counter
Republican-led voter suppression.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48175?refcode=ema20211030-160232&t=1001&akid=160232%2E444211%2Ev0eLBS ]It’s going to take all of us to reach our $20,000 grassroots goal
before midnight tomorrow. Will you chip in your
first
$5 donation to Powered by People’s October goal and join
our work to preserve democracy?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48175?refcode=ema20211030-160232&t=1020&akid=160232%2E444211%2Ev0eLBS ]Contribute $5

The 2022 election might be over a year away, but Beto and Powered by
People volunteers are fighting for Texas as if it's tomorrow. The stakes
are just that high.

Now, with our October 31 deadline just one day away, we’re counting on
this grassroots movement to support our work, so we can continue to create
the change we want to see in Texas despite Republicans’ best efforts to
silence our voices.

Meeting our $20,000 end-of-month goal will ensure we can stay on track
with our goals to connect with, register, and turn out voters in all 254
Texas counties. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48175?refcode=ema20211030-160232&t=1021&akid=160232%2E444211%2Ev0eLBS ]You can play a vital role in our work as a grassroots
donor. Consider chipping
in to put us one contribution closer to our goal — any amount helps.

Thank you for helping make history in Texas.

—Kate Roberts, Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48175?refcode=ema20211030-160232&t=1022&akid=160232%2E444211%2Ev0eLBS ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=160232%2E444211%2Ev0eLBS

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1274%2E3611125%2EmyKS6T ][IMG]

Folks --

Want to hear a 3-word horror story?

Republican-controlled Senate.

Thinking about what a Republican-controlled Senate would mean for Ohio --
and the country -- is very, very scary.

The GOP only needs to flip a single Senate seat to regain control and
unleash their nightmare on main street.

But we have what it takes to stop them. Tim has been called the Democrats’
most important 2022 candidate, so it’s up to us to flip this seat and
expand the Senate majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5728?t=1007&akid=1274%2E3611125%2EmyKS6T ]We’ve set a $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal -- the deadline is
tomorrow at midnight -- and we can’t afford to fall short. Can we count on
you to carve out what you can and spook the GOP with our grassroots
fundraising power?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

clean_body: We need your help to fight back and end one-party Democrat control! | | | Peter, Our nation is in trouble, and we know who is to blame. It only took a matter of weeks for President Biden and the radical Democrats to overturn all that was going right under President Trump’s leadership. Now, under one-party Democrat rule, we’re on a path to total disaster. That is why we MUST take back the Senate next November, and I need you in my corner for this critical end-of-October fundraising drive. This is last call! Our October Fundraising deadline is closing in, and we are still short of our $16,750 goal. Together, we can break the Democrats’ grip on power and hold the Biden Administration accountable for the damage they're doing to our country – but I need your support TODAY to make it happen. Stay in the fight, -Mark Walker | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Walker4NC | |

body:
We are working overtime to hit our $5,500 October fundraising goal and we need just a bit more of a boost before the month is up. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38135720/314075143/1632799110?refcode=211030-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDgwZWY5OC1jNzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2P1aAO2couuY_Rcxkl6uE6LqJ3mk4ky2TEF34-b9zU=) I will be brief, Peter. We are working overtime to hit our $5,500 October fundraising goal and we need just a bit more of a boost before the month is up. **[So I’m asking: will you pitch in $10 to my campaign before tomorrow night so that we can surpass our goal and head into November on a high note?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38135721/314075144/-143031652?refcode=211028-email&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDgwZWY5OC1jNzM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2P1aAO2couuY_Rcxkl6uE6LqJ3mk4ky2TEF34-b9zU=)** Anything you’re able to give means so much to me. We’re building something special here. Now, I’m running for Governor to defeat Ron DeSantis and bring something new to Tallahassee. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = Let me explain what I’m up against, Peter. DeSantis is raising MILLIONS each month from Republican donors across the country as he prepares for his Presidential campaign. Meanwhile, he’s far more concerned with scoring points with Fox News viewers than protecting Floridians. DeSantis is even calling a special legislative session to ban private businesses from requiring vaccinations for employees. He’s gone so far as to PREVENT private businesses from protecting employees and customers. We need to win this race to keep Floridians safe and ensure DeSantis can NEVER become President. That’s why I’m asking for your support today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Ron DeSantis is attacking our rights, putting our health at risk, and continuing to erode our democracy. name: Great America Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Hillsdale College now offers our full online course “The Second World Wars” [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c434%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8iJ2mPWQ7E3xSmSqepNSLA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67607%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KivpI478WdkXWWAYzb9Zrw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College now offers our full online course **“The Second World Wars” as a special DVD box set** for your home library or to give as a gift. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from renowned military historian Victor Davis Hanson of the Allied and Axis strategies in the air, by water, and on earth that led to the victory of the Allies. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67607%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KivpI478WdkXWWAYzb9Zrw&sysid=1) If you would like to secure a DVD set before they’re no longer available, you can do so by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. You can give a gift and reserve your DVD box set of **“The Second World Wars”** using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67608%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xLPzoAfzYJrkxeFYA4UXag&sysid=1)** Thank you for defending liberty through education with Hillsdale College. Warm regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

We’re not getting that with Rosendale because he’d prefer to obstruct progress for our state and our country. **[So if you’re able, please chip in any amount to my campaign today so I can go to Washington and work for YOU.](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=f1b6bc3ae605422dbae90078d096b988&_e=REnZuqJIqByy1RiERDPT45jxUMLnbiB20TKYNW_6-yrZYFAjx-eV4CGlIUhkZvnR0T6t-zqJ9q6o8sblyE_Edoi9Z2I3P9--59nINC8sXD_CQeuj1wBLk_hT5iewSud_5iRVvHMGWmjLxvnXkWwRp3WOSiHIC3V0Ril_iLQNfXJsOo_71B7q0MrDhDJsqJJy9ScS60BKjAGzEUTZPrya_tTXGJVy47cOblLVeunhEWng3fDVBdV7Xbc8O8jIqfcr6fNNJ1_0IyuDQlXXs2VXIKue4uLHi5Hq7oAjDR_ZVkoI1kHi9qbhlQKQBu0dQFDRwIIItP6_OFvjwBqFdmPlOJDqlFY2OJUeV_rCR5qTsINPNzabHGDeTLdPDh0btEqYErHV-MFnDSRBLutqKnn0ZfEECfuHaUQxdjhZzQXifzsfOdJm26Mwfsi7aSW_judnHR8VpMVpIbutMKS-b8icb6OJcM4wX1vz8X-xQ-pR6PU%3D)** Thank you, Jack Ballard

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Trumpism is on the march in Virginia
body:
I’m asking for your help to stop it
|
---

I’m going to get to the point because we’re running out of time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021. Just last week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. We only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. We’re just 1** day out from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re $9,770 short of our goal. And if everyone who reads this email pitches in**$10 or more, we can close the gap and get back on track fending off National GOP attacks against Michael and build the campaign infrastructure it will take to keep Colorado blue. Michael rejects corporate PAC and federal lobbyist contributions, so he counts on grassroots supporters like you to chip in what you can to help keep our campaign humming. Will you chip in $10 or more now before Sunday’s end-of-month-fundraising deadline to help us close the gap? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= — Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Dr. Mary L. Trump
subject: It’s official: My uncle is campaigning in Virginia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
He’ll do anything to get his candidate elected | | |

Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg4NFkdwp3UCIhxmL-pzZ0khw7WmWUx9b7CI4ipQFlg2VnY9EdptnFD_60ltITHjWjkACwqTacrX2pCvqzOxh271BymYPmXu6a38zlRXVU9xBVS8ExkXEI1S2DQRZLRxD_xsGvo-DlWVNEvMdYEwsGN-0GHrRkuvzXtad5nY6W6KqGIkb5IW533uxzRbKiO0-hzVPMyysjdXEGZQFntjt-p0/3gl/FXUY2E_iQJW5CYN9k0xI9A/h0/4b31Etqrq4RAgoounp_6Koq-xaJZG9FMRl6mftsQduU) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
It’s official: my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia governor’s race.

Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now — more than ever. [**_He set a rapid response goal of raising 10,000 grassroots contributions before my uncle’s rally in Virginia, and he needs your help. Will you split a donation between Terry’s campaign and Democrat Dr. Raul Ruiz's right now?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6UFjMxBEfCZEB7ixWqYz-IQhw2LhCg7_yd8uZZd1tm3xRG5EW03s4b4xQ92WlFTOCK44LW3C6EwoSAGxyv0XjyIfOhj1DHJyO9jQtEqJZQQ83y0dGqmaQR4flSBJZvTUggcE3w0Edgnm7-4ksF5WmxHLCd3pz38wcnYZbSMumXgb4hvK4I8wii2y2EGsh5jydpv7MV6fwZqA5KqocDcvTpUAYNmm5P44kwJlPIxmnTIJ_d3pCT1amw1k4X--ED96IAI7PwB9ICKXUrWYS6iBR75_-8h8lM-FBy6Daz1ku9VnCALdThQuFRZNxQXCRNcc6a82d29flYfVHTb79gXwJ5la7mP_rh433Gkv02ZME_Yqfa2i5JhsgRwo8mW9IovKHm2zSkTwE8UahYgqlAGCubLCc-daROjTNRniqeVCjFQ-pFXCyi2sRCEHJiC3bnm16n3Pa7t1uXIeM4Yg2mJYfgayDv_wuzARkg5k4-MXma_X4/3gl/FXUY2E_iQJW5CYN9k0xI9A/h1/06kr9PjlIK638NoI1kwvd9SzXmncwhKn_rvowSyufzI)

Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican.

But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has endorsed him [**_eight times._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE0Vd8nKqW85ZXV9rlZ14r6UFjMxBEfCZEB7ixWqYz-IQhw2LhCg7_yd8uZZd1tm3xRG5EW03s4b4xQ92WlFTOCK44LW3C6EwoSAGxyv0XjyIfOhj1DHJyO9jQtEqJZQQ83y0dGqmaQR4flSBJZvTUggcE3w0Edgnm7-4ksF5WmxHLCd3pz38wcnYZbSMumXgb5T6NsPpVud4ew2sSsGpxChEHuNEGSWcg0Yek7vdtEYdHCwfsnu2gSJxajran3iKaaal7AgJ3m5PngNjux0saqw0Yfob7S99WOiiOdUCQyjkbpO55ame8YJTLlYc2fUkMaf5Wrc4d5rLdVA1tFJHzWjk3wD9uFPm0_Wm_oOUzwSqUid6LWMO1dBVmDrLhNZBKY1bGioomHlgzglOemit5C_Y-E9JK9bLoHdqe4Q0dGqiUz92KCR6WvEpJr1_IONd9YPpE6q4IQowl_pQ6gyOnOrDd_N0RynN5E8i4xuwLio_HFWrAp4yTCzltGVgEC0Uqg/3gl/FXUY2E_iQJW5CYN9k0xI9A/h2/NdxJPiFbk1Gckq-Rwz8wOfsNFvoYF7bOSnBVd0kwfLA)

And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip — they’re gone now. [**Donald Trump is _all in_ for Youngkin.**

We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year — and I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain power.

clean_body: He’ll do anything to get his candidate elected | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. It’s official: my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia governor’s race. Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now — more than ever. Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican. But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump — that’s why Donald has endorsed him And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip — they’re gone now. | | | | | | | Thank you, Dr. Mary L. Trump, PhD | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress , please .

We are SO CLOSE to hitting the 1 million donor mark \- we 're getting closer as you're reading this email - and I need to tell you something...something I'm not telling ANYONE else. I want YOU to be our 1 MILLIONTH ONLINE DONOR. As soon as we hit 1 MILLION, I 've told my team I want to see a PRINTED donor list IMMEDIATELY. Will your name be in the 1 millionth spot? Peter, this ad is all about the historic nature of my Democratic campaign.

For four hundred years, every single Lt. Governor of Virginia has been a man — _until now!_

**I’m ready to shatter this glass ceiling, but I need your help to get it done.**

It matters which woman Virginia elects to this position. Winsome Sears is running to turn back the clock on the progress of our Democratic majority.

I won’t stand for it, Peter! But I can’t do it alone.

[**Will I see your $3 donation toward our $5,000 ad fund goal tonight? clean_body: | = A few days ago, one of the final ads of my campaign for Lt. Governor launched: You can take a look here! = This is a big moment, and I’m so glad you’re in the fight with me — keeping our ads up is critical to reaching voters until the very last minute. = | = Peter, this ad is all about the historic nature of my Democratic campaign. For four hundred years, every single Lt. Governor of Virginia has been a man — until now! I’m ready to shatter this glass ceiling, but I need your help to get it done. It matters which woman Virginia elects to this position. Winsome Sears is running to turn back the clock on the progress of our Democratic majority. I won’t stand for it, Peter! But I can’t do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you! Let’s win this thing in three days. = Hala Ayala Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. Governor | | Paid for by Hala For Virginia P.O. Box 7434, Woodbridge, VA 22195 www.halaforvirginia.com Hala Ayala is the Democratic nominee running for Virginia Lt. Governor. name: GOP Presidential
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7h8k5uvrmfd4atro4dj21m9tort0b8kocpvdfq0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8phkssp66db4suprfc72cqr39d9h6tij8p3l6lq6cphl6gqr5chimjg60s5je1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaqmcc9imdgefclhcoon1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpim6pj4c9i6eoh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zou783ifdc6i9d3l0l4h1kjcrogdbtnqo0qqreu8_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdj68oj4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf1bp22n3bs8a15hilt5dd9a4oonlvcvmsqhbthg_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdj68oj4cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z16fitderqe1t8lfm6hflv2q8o74bcjkvjq79as0_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdj68oj4cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znee3hv7op73a5nkr5uik8alfgs7k7fg64rrob3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj5cdj68oj4cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Trumpism is on the march in Virginia.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I’m asking for your help to stop it.
#

I'm going to get to the point because we’re running out time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021.
Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection.
We only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong.
**[If you’re with me, and you want to keep Virginia blue, pitch in right now by making a split donation between my campaign and Cheri Beasley’s race for U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38136774/314080158/-2021074642?refcode2=0151136f-cd39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTUxMTM2Zi1jZDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rq2LMA_vMoviOZolKEifL4pc6metS0y9RsQ_doaxJpY=)**
This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now.
We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday.
With polls _STILL_ tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. _And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism._
**[Will you split a donation right now between Cheri Beasley’s campaign and my campaign to ensure we turn out all the voters we need on Tuesday?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38136775/314080160/-2021074642?refcode2=0151136f-cd39-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211030-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTUxMTM2Zi1jZDM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rq2LMA_vMoviOZolKEifL4pc6metS0y9RsQ_doaxJpY=)**

clean_body: I’m asking for your help to stop it. I'm going to get to the point because we’re running out time. The Virginia Governor’s race is a must win for Democrats in 2021. Just this week, a new Emerson College poll showed me TIED with Trump-backed Glenn Youngkin. That’s right, TIED with the guy whose extreme supporters threw a rally where they said the pledge of allegiance to a flag they took from the January 6th insurrection. We only have days left to stop Trumpism in Virginia. Experts are saying Democrats have lost the momentum, and I’m asking for your help to prove them wrong. = This is the FINAL weekend before Election Day, and if you’ve been waiting for the best time to donate, it’s right now. We’re literally counting down the hours until Election Day on Tuesday. With polls STILL tied, anything can happen -- but here’s the thing, every dollar that we raise this weekend makes it that much more likely that we’ll turn out the voters we need to win. And the country is counting on Virginia to stop Trumpism. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = I’m up against a Trump-loving guy who has promised to go on offense and ban abortion if he’s elected. Our fundraising deadlines aren’t arbitrary — we set them at the beginning of each FEC quarter so we can keep up our work for a stronger New Mexico and country. Martin shows up to lead each and every day, month after month, year after year — not just when he’s on the ballot. This grassroots team not only helps re-elect Martin, but also builds Democratic leadership at every level of government.
Earlier this week, Martin endorsed two dozen candidates in New Mexico — from candidates for mayor and school boards, to soil and water conservation boards and city council. Supporting these candidates means that we can make a **real, direct difference in your day-to-day lives**.
We also offer support to candidates in U.S. Senate and House races. **With our Democratic majorities hanging by a thread nationally, it couldn’t be more important to support battleground races like Gabe Vasquez’s House election in New Mexico and Mark Kelly’s Senate race in Arizona.**
While we do all of this, Martin is also working hard in the U.S. Senate to secure a climate-centered Build Back Better deal that lowers costs and cuts your taxes, and builds America’s economy of the future. It’s because of his relentless work with his fellow Democrats that this legislative package will include the**biggest investment in addressing climate change in the history of our country.**
**So, now that you know a bit more about what your donation goes toward, will you chip in any amount before our end-of-month deadline expires tomorrow? Any amount will make a real difference.**

clean_body: Folks, it’s been a busy week for Team Heinrich — on top of endorsing dozens of local candidates and supporting Martin’s fight for a strong Build Back Better package in the U.S. Senate, we’re also up against tomorrow’s October fundraising deadline. Can you add a donation of $10 or any amount to make sure we meet our goal? We’re falling short, but we have just enough time to catch up. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Our fundraising deadlines aren’t arbitrary — we set them at the beginning of each FEC quarter so we can keep up our work for a stronger New Mexico and country. Martin shows up to lead each and every day, month after month, year after year — not just when he’s on the ballot. This grassroots team not only helps re-elect Martin, but also builds Democratic leadership at every level of government. Earlier this week, Martin endorsed two dozen candidates in New Mexico — from candidates for mayor and school boards, to soil and water conservation boards and city council. Supporting these candidates means that we can make a real, direct difference in your day-to-day lives. We also offer support to candidates in U.S. Senate and House races. With our Democratic majorities hanging by a thread nationally, it couldn’t be more important to support battleground races like Gabe Vasquez’s House election in New Mexico and Mark Kelly’s Senate race in Arizona. While we do all of this, Martin is also working hard in the U.S. Senate to secure a climate-centered Build Back Better deal that lowers costs and cuts your taxes, and builds America’s economy of the future. It’s because of his relentless work with his fellow Democrats that this legislative package will include thebiggest investment in addressing climate change in the history of our country. So, now that you know a bit more about what your donation goes toward, will you chip in any amount before our end-of-month deadline expires tomorrow? Any amount will make a real difference. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you. Rebecca Avitia | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. Hi team, When we ask people in IL-07 what they want most from their representative in congress, they always say the same thing: They want somebody who is present in the community, someone who fights for them, and speaks up when they are being mistreated. When Rahm Emanuel was nominated to be ambassador to Japan, despite every way he had wronged the people of IL-7, Rep. Danny Davis was silent. When Emanuel testified before the Senate, and was asked about Laquan McDonald, we heard nothing from Davis. **That’s why on WVON’s Egonmwan and Buchanan show they said, “the only person I’ve seen is Kina Collins, running in the 7th district against Danny Davis, saying anything.”** ******[IL-7 deserves better!! ****
Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

name: Matt Jacobs for Congress
subject: Defending the American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Peter, This is Matt Jacobs, candidate for U.S. Congress in CA-26, writing you again. I emailed you recently to tell you about my candidacy and my career as a federal prosecutor—and to ask if you’d to consider making a donation within your means to help us build on our early momentum. Now, I’d like to share with you a little more about my family’s history and why I believe so believe so deeply in this country. My grandparents were Holocaust survivors who came to the United States as refugees. When they arrived in America after the War, they didn’t speak a word of English and didn’t have a penny to their name. **But this country invited them in, gave them a second shot at life**. They worked incredibly hard to make that second shot count. My grandfather was a tailor and my grandmother was a seamstress. As a result of their hard work—and the opportunity this country provided—they built a beautiful life for themselves and their children. They achieved their American Dream. [**FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=b22353959cd041a18e0591243e75c084&_e=-Gsekh8wRh6vzhkSHQq0JKARW7_zHjkgSZghUwH5f9w1yuXqKLcEDQgdJKAEIorzXz1CgxCuNcQPPwQ7ouH5NqxTScSONLqo8c3q2UtyqWj2ls0mNgnDdlB8MdNC3ll9HEQ81sWGSpO0j5X-i5euHZyfCG1qi-VgdotJbN37pknvPpRIfGOAnO5hcEfjL68HIiBSc8xB2dXMkMo5xEAEVdZrxTq7fS5saTzVThGK8HOsTLAkd_1bFQGsO6LvClAqDFVDko69C2gzAtrcr4Qe0V3M3K3jghCjefAFkWmhfKAydXYJ9uBAoTTSb5QscvJIkv5apVdCggwWHqaMe74OzJ2sMR10X6Ele9Rp3AAo6V-5IoCoSTZAZnSRNAwrx8lvr-ZBxQeczWxXxTtBQuKRIAWqPC5h03C7VDxz7ZxQJa0r1fak4xrq0tM0gZaTLJU9GluIj3o6mXMijy923t-Wvoo0KK_-YwoZGDYS-fkjim4%3D) I’m a passionate believer in the American Dream, and I’m running for Congress to make sure that everyone in our community has the freedom and opportunity to make their American Dream a reality. Radical politicians keep telling us America is bad. They tell us the American Dream is dead. Or worse—that it never really existed in the first place. Well, they couldn’t be more wrong. And we need leaders in Congress who will stand up to them. We need leaders in Congress who will defend America and the American Dream for our generation and future generations. [**HELP ME FIGHT**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=b22353959cd041a18e0591243e75c084&_e=-Gsekh8wRh6vzhkSHQq0JKARW7_zHjkgSZghUwH5f9w1yuXqKLcEDQgdJKAEIorzXz1CgxCuNcQPPwQ7ouH5NqxTScSONLqo8c3q2UtyqWj2ls0mNgnDdlB8MdNC3ll9HEQ81sWGSpO0j5X-i5euHZyfCG1qi-VgdotJbN37pknvPpRIfGOAnO5hcEfjL68HIiBSc8xB2dXMkMo5xEAEVdZrxTq7fS5saTzVThGK8HOsTLAkd_1bFQGsO6LvClAqDFVDko69C2gzAtrcr4Qe0TTitH_LWMWfs17ym7eg6EszE2M88JiK2ya5yxbG0rFxHL3FhLK439wyWaOWsugYhNFVUAQcKj1Qc_Syk2WIMVobn4ndwQLgsZWMSl-NNZPRAXuQSM04t76mUv5gFdPf9WVUWYYd61T_6SR1W4RVgOn8evP-8mBdbcV61-6iVw6L2Wg2IAPRBDZ-YaKHlFFUbgB2N3g5Tvi_7rJVDGVU3jA%3D) Our campaign is off to a phenomenal start. But we can’t take our foot off the gas pedal now. We must continue working tirelessly to deliver our pro-America message—a message of freedom and opportunity—to the people of this district. And for that, I need YOUR help. Will you please step up right now and make a donation within your means if you haven’t already to help us deliver our message to as many voters as possible. [**DONATE HERE**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=b22353959cd041a18e0591243e75c084&_e=-Gsekh8wRh6vzhkSHQq0JKARW7_zHjkgSZghUwH5f9w1yuXqKLcEDQgdJKAEIorzXz1CgxCuNcQPPwQ7ouH5NqxTScSONLqo8c3q2UtyqWj2ls0mNgnDdlB8MdNC3ll9HEQ81sWGSpO0j5X-i5euHZyfCG1qi-VgdotJbN37pknvPpRIfGOAnO5hcEfjL68HIiBSc8xB2dXMkMo5xEAEVdZrxTq7fS5saTzVThGK8HOsTLAkd_1bFQGsO6LvClAqDFVDko69C2gzAtrcr4Qe0Sv6y6xf0P4KpFI9gY7hEyg1C4YKBYzzq-g7uhwpnKy_-Ht7yKw6_TRI9F47r6QildsAgRBykQE8es8F4onwR_sgPZLcTM3a_3PLUqSz9H5F8sVZQkFNOjSC66tndvmqdE21vnN5yFU8PjAsrbFuHYyTEdcDZa4_gzAaXpnSadryWA7oWeqKJI_XyRj29c_TSYRX6Ln1oTaef2YEmxxhY58%3D) Thank you so much for taking the time to read this email and for considering stepping up to help my campaign. Let’s go out and WIN! body:
I’m running for Congress to keep America safe by securing our border and supporting our military and law enforcement. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7f1ff2c48c3f4c3fb5b96c55fe3ea623&_e=jX-MIv0JsU8iY0UkGdVWb_abEETP7N5Gl36Ir-TQVzbFfz-jhmc19_eIIiLFIm8yCJJv_0JSvFX0C4G0JgnglPio935MNKJ9VLxWwbkaU_Z32WILB-yHEVWhJk_y0wEotMrNFMms57Qq9JTgaD2yHf49a_okU4Zlsm-E0E99bLkPmmiOZEysQsCIqPqpz7mPHdabKdz0T_bKTKMBCf4gqbaPeVmxBqm0QglDQ_MPIaQ5OlXGoiIp2d_EYsadp0-3umgDwAneaFjl_S_YWUFOk7SCjuakLbpIGP9HuFOdrzq2dJz6diJ8QsSzM9erYyuxqBo8pEWCGeEIHkEnuNnYJloKPza_7KKJ7Rk3iSzl4vz_hMn6oxKOrezguQQyD0jbgMePfnSGKcL8qpspKxpPw2Zz6i3seuBm5tyGafWfMAgDVmRPP_6frVp6LCDkY58FiUuJLtW-e4bdVF0ntzaVOQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

I’m Shawn Collins – **a proud black conservative Republican, Navy combat veteran, and active Navy reservist running for Congress in California’s 45th District.**

I’m running against liberal Congresswoman Katie Porter – a self-proclaimed socialist who hangs out with the squad and co-chaired Elizabeth Warren’s presidential campaign.

[**I need help from grassroots conservatives like you to flip this top-target House seat and win back a Republican House majority so we can put a stop to the Biden agenda.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7f1ff2c48c3f4c3fb5b96c55fe3ea623&_e=jX-MIv0JsU8iY0UkGdVWb_abEETP7N5Gl36Ir-TQVzbFfz-jhmc19_eIIiLFIm8yCJJv_0JSvFX0C4G0JgnglPio935MNKJ9VLxWwbkaU_Z32WILB-yHEVWhJk_y0wEotMrNFMms57Qq9JTgaD2yHf49a_okU4Zlsm-E0E99bLkPmmiOZEysQsCIqPqpz7mPHdabKdz0T_bKTKMBCf4gqbaPeVmxBqm0QglDQ_MPIaQ5OlXGoiIp2d_EYsadp0-3Unt6f551afaCGWMxpeu0nPdil3GOkEtbReFGtYaDVVcMlao2HQupBTXQSeRAH-TvFEayWN9aqFnTnSXqZQWe18FxzyT7iApO0ATLI5sBu0X0ioAQoHipRPYAxVU8Mj3c8GjhMJtxSkZGCWrVQ55k34QiD0GCEAh58hxdcX35FpkO51XaFhCWHd6Kz-Zxh_BgFKgaTIpsYnFX7qLs5idfhw%3D%3D)

But first, I want to tell you about my service in the Navy...

After I graduated from law school, I answered the call to serve my country and enlisted in the United States Navy.

Just one year after my wife Zeina and I got married, I volunteered for a combat deployment to Afghanistan.

While stationed near Kandahar City, Afghanistan – the birthplace of the Taliban – I coordinated with Special Forces units to help them track down and arrest suspected terrorist suicide bombers. Our work saved countless lives.

But wearing the American flag on my sleeve made me a target, **and I was fortunate to survive two suicide bombing attacks.**

Now, everything I and thousands of other soldiers fought for – and even died for – in Afghanistan has been undone by Biden’s failed military withdrawal.

This failure has left Americans and our allies stranded, left our weaponry and supplies in the hands of the Taliban, and resulted in more deaths of innocent civilians – including woman and children – along with American troops.

Yet Biden, my opponent Katie Porter, and the Democrats have moved on and are seemingly ignoring what happened and what is still happening.

**This failure, combined with the lack of security at our southern border which would permit even terrorists to cross unnoticed, means America is less safe than it was a year ago.**

There’s absolutely no doubt – [**American needs new leadership, and I’m running for Congress to give it to us.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7f1ff2c48c3f4c3fb5b96c55fe3ea623&_e=jX-MIv0JsU8iY0UkGdVWb_abEETP7N5Gl36Ir-TQVzbFfz-jhmc19_eIIiLFIm8yCJJv_0JSvFX0C4G0JgnglPio935MNKJ9VLxWwbkaU_Z32WILB-yHEVWhJk_y0wEotMrNFMms57Qq9JTgaD2yHf49a_okU4Zlsm-E0E99bLkPmmiOZEysQsCIqPqpz7mPHdabKdz0T_bKTKMBCf4gqbaPeVmxBqm0QglDQ_MPIaQ5OlXGoiIp2d_EYsadp0-3rAsqrr81CTkukTmZgqZJPzxR9iEss8HFL3JwRqW6JiqWVR4QkjvfUpGUlWsAQlePk4sD6fEe36J83vorpjmOfazlYX8AxAw65ORX5zUGD96fRLkgtq7d6gz8-LsM0rT-h2nGJ9oGBH9rXoujlOUeYiG1hfBeZuu53s_JrChvyJJSwRR3GylH84dqIA93G6TaZBjTOh1VFqO22pyjV1yauQ%3D%3D)

But I need your help. The Left knows that a **black, conservative, Navy veteran with Afghanistan combat experience who is focused on real solutions** is exactly the kind of candidate who can defeat them in this current climate, _which is why they’re already targeting me._

I’m running for Congress to keep America safe by securing our border and supporting our military and law enforcement.

[**Will you help me fend off attacks from the Left and restore responsible conservative leadership in America by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or more to my campaign today?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7f1ff2c48c3f4c3fb5b96c55fe3ea623&_e=jX-MIv0JsU8iY0UkGdVWb_abEETP7N5Gl36Ir-TQVzbFfz-jhmc19_eIIiLFIm8yCJJv_0JSvFX0C4G0JgnglPio935MNKJ9VLxWwbkaU_Z32WILB-yHEVWhJk_y0wEotMrNFMms57Qq9JTgaD2yHf49a_okU4Zlsm-E0E99bLkPmmiOZEysQsCIqPqpz7mPHdabKdz0T_bKTKMBCf4gqbaPeVmxBqm0QglDQ_MPIaQ5OlXGoiIp2d_EYsadp0-3gdBXNgGSCbHR23RA8IJCDgsWEW6zJbczp6eZJOo7x6pJBakVODgOk8Ii8sdf006wjmkHykHAtp36LXo6Ax7G58epaqO-IRT55wKwBTuftlBmE_G-ESU9JkUHd9YNH7bs6Jzs57vPLo-s67e0zl9IQDCqgCrDYtGNp_g-NUEN1t7k1n5JyPMNMslZzS38cnGrgqQFCAstkuZAPBilqRgCdw%3D%3D)

Thanks,

Shawn Collins
U.S. Navy veteran
Republican for Congress

name: Marco Rubio
subject: 🇨🇺 🇺🇸My endorsement for Virginia’s AG race goes to...
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
My friend Jason Miyares is in a DEAD HEAT in the upcoming election | |
---
|
---
Friend,

Virginia’s election is just a few days away, and my friend Jason Miyares is in a DEAD HEAT against his liberal Attorney General opponent.

Jason is the man for the job. Like me, he’s a Cuban-American conservative who understands our fight against socialism.

---
Dear friend,
Republicans are coming after us. And this isn't your father's Republican Party. This is something far more sinister....

Sure, there are still many very fine Republicans in Arizona, and nationwide. But it's hard to ignore the fact the people they elect are increasingly more radicalized than they were a few years ago. **The party of the Honorable Jim Kolbe and the late, great Pima County Supervisor Ann Day looks a lot different today, and frankly it's scary.**

**Gov. Doug Ducey's** anemic response to the COVID crisis was bad enough, but his decision to wage war on cities, towns, and school boards trying to keep their communities safe is reckless and irresponsible. **And it's the Governor's right-hand man who is leading the Republican field to try and take back THIS SEAT.**

Then there's former Superintendent of Public Instruction and Attorney General **Tom Horne** (yes, THAT Tom Horne), who made a career out of attacking communities of color, including **banning ethnic studies in Tucson schools.** Now, like a zombie from the dead, Horne has risen and is once again running for Superintendent of Public Instruction.
**Kari Lake** is the frontrunner for the Republican Party's nomination for Governor and arguably the most popular figure in the AZ GOP. Lake's meteoric rise through her party's ranks is due largely to her **unquestioning loyalty to Trump** and penchant for spreading conspiracy theories that feed an increasingly unhinged base. I'll admit, her desire to scare her base is effective, but let's be clear: her election would lead our state down a very dark path.

Insurrectionist and Q-anon supporter **Mark Finchem** , who not only attended, but helped coordinate the January 6 attack on our Capitol, is the GOP's frontrunner for Secretary of State. Lowlights of Finchem's legislative career include attacking public school teachers and amassing an impressive **82 ethics complaints.** His election would put him a heartbeat away from the Governor's office. If that doesn't send a chill down your spine, nothing will.

Attorney General and US Senate candidate **Mark Brnovich** **has failed to protect Arizona voters from the fraudulent "Cyber Ninja" audit,** choosing instead to enable them to curry favor with the Q-anon crowd. While we understand why he's terrified of his primary voters, the idea he could replace a leader as effective and hard working as Mark Kelly is what's really scary.

Now for the truly terrifying part: this new wave of GOP extremists is better funded and well-positioned to win races like ours. **Here in AZ-02 we have to get behind the most qualified, the most experienced, and the absolute best choice to keep this seat blue -- Kirsten Engel. **

THEN: The GOP LASHED OUT, bringing some of the worst conspiracy theorists and extremists to Arizona to defeat us. Donald Trump endorsed our extremist opponent after she called for a total ban on abortion in our state, and major GOP super PACs plan to spend MILLIONS to keep Arizona red. NOW: With time running out before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we're falling short of the resources we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win this race. Experts at The Washington Post say the best way to protect our democracy from this out-of-control extremism is by flipping the governorship blue – and Marco Lopez (D) is the one to do it. But he can only win if we hit every goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for joining the fight against GOP extremism. – Team Lopez Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
