name: Team Schiff
subject: Less than 48 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, Nearly one year out from the midterm elections, we’re beginning to get a clear idea of what we’re up against in the effort to protect our House and Senate majorities. This time around, it’s not just Donald Trump’s fundraising machine. Mitch McConnell, Kevin McCarthy, and the GOP’s wealthy donors are clearly willing to spend whatever it takes to end our Democratic majorities. Last quarter, the GOP raised $25.8 million, giving them a **$65 million cash-on-hand advantage**. In addition, Republican-controlled state legislatures are passing voter suppression laws and gerrymandering districts to help GOP candidates win. They are trying to bend the rules rather than win over voters. It’s pathetic. But it could succeed and that would mean calamity. After we lost seats in the House despite President Biden’s win last fall, we must shore up all our remaining incumbent Democrats. It’s going to be tough, but we can do it. We must also help new challengers win their races and build on our extremely narrow majority. There’s no margin for error. _Absolutely none._ This grassroots team helped Democrats send President Biden to the White House and win the Senate majority by electing Senators Warnock and Ossoff. While the president’s party typically loses seats during the midterm elections, last year’s losses in the House mean we need to win back many of the seats we gained in 2018 that gave the Speaker’s gavel back to Nancy Pelosi. Right now, expanding our House and Senate majorities is critical. Without that, we won’t be able to continue working on President Biden’s agenda beyond 2022. Delivering real change on behalf of our nation is the only effective counter to Donald Trump’s campaign in 2024. We have to deliver. We may not get another opportunity for decades otherwise. **With our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight — can you chip in right now to our campaign so we have the resources to help new and incumbent Democrats get elected next November?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38137892/314084631/-827659615?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20211030_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTgzZjYyNS1kNTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjR3nirkPddaE-mpo5Dfs4L4xTbJQqlvchguPZXPZi0=)

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: something *historic* I need your help with
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I realize you get a lot of requests from my team + me, so I feel like I owe you an explanation.
#
Peter,
I'm coming to you with just one day left in the month to personally ask if you'd be willing to [** _kick in your first $5 to our campaign to flip this Senate seat._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34703?refcode=em20211030-3265&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3265%2E434096%2EN4-RjN)
I realize you get _a lot_ of requests from me + our team, so I feel like I owe you an explanation.
**Peter, last time this seat was up in Pennsylvania, it wound up being the single *most expensive* Senate race in history at that time.** It set a new record for statewide campaigns in PA — but ultimately we were outspent by the GOP, losing by just over 1% of the vote. 🙄
Now's our chance to finish the job. But in order to pull this off it's clear we'll have to smash some records of our own. That's why I'm incredibly humbled + grateful to share with you that our campaign is closing in on $10 *million* raised since we first announced, **and that we're pushing really hard to get there by our deadline tomorrow, October 31 at 11:59 p.m.**
If we do, we'll be able to expedite our plan to hire enough organizers to reach every one of PA's 67 counties, so I'm asking for your help today:
[**_Will you be among the 22 more folks from Cresco we need in order to reach our historic goal of $10 million raised before tomorrow's deadline? My team + I crunched the numbers, and we think we can get there if enough of yinz are willing to help out._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34703?refcode=em20211030-3265&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3265%2E434096%2EN4-RjN)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34703?refcode=em20211030-3265&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3265%2E434096%2EN4-RjN)**
It's mind-blowing to me that we're closing in on this historic milestone. The fact that we're even close is honestly surreal — and a true testament to the folks who've chipped in to our campaign in small amounts whenever possible.
It's proof of our undeniable strength in numbers. 💪
I fully realize that $10 million is a staggering amount of money to be spent to flip one Senate seat — but our grassroots fundraising is so critical because **every dollar we raise in this early stage gets put straight towards our organizing program, hiring key staff, and building a movement capable of overcoming the deep-pocketed GOP in the general election.**
[**_Now that you've heard what your support today would mean, would you be able to donate your first-ever $5 before tomorrow's deadline at 11:59 p.m.? We're ~99% to our goal, so any amount at all will play a role in reaching this huge benchmark._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34703?refcode=em20211030-3265&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3265%2E434096%2EN4-RjN)
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU. 😭
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. It feels surreal to even type it out, Peter, but I'm deeply grateful to share that our team is closing in on $10 *million* raised over the course of our campaign — **and that we think we could get there by Sunday at midnight if around 22 more folks from Cresco are able to chip in.****_[Could I count on you to be among them?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/34703?refcode=em20211030-3265&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3265%2E434096%2EN4-RjN)_**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211030-3265-footer&t=24&refcode2=3265_434096_N4-RjN&akid=3265%2E434096%2EN4-RjN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=3265%2E434096%2EN4-RjN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3265%2E434096%2EN4-RjN)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:

Peter, State Republicans have SHATTERED fundraising records the past three quarters, but the Democrats are still outraising us. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

Dear Friend,
Tomorrow is the last day of October - and we’re SO close to our goal!
The latest [Goucher Poll](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuNwId5BSVlzWSMMB7NQrAKn-2BJvgkOh8I-2BiR5pMDACJmCMiqyNue6kEO-2FOeC25d2P97-2B3qfwFNzxmJgsq-2BKgIu9PFTlxO7AQ6bN7hfTr9ly8QBhmWz24nq48JUhsGNS0RNg-3D-3DKHis_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz62ZGQ1m6R0-2FczKdAjzzRpuVlO4Wgpn6bCtV7JLwmUSppjUQ9GS9ztQM3J96-2FL9xcHuHHRFDdRu7CyX9PMTYSca7-2FKymQ6InZVNl-2F1-2Fgm-2BSgdo1gB7j6xDURJWdKm2FlX-2BVHij5DJ0vukXm2TaGSEVn7WHihZ41muLIBRqG7Az5rKpS8mp6-2FmuOigsmsEHKWXDP-2F7BYoR6b-2Fer8GlSMsHDBWf6boyOFOUlo82kpM0ePzv2C6jitrrQR-2F9jorO-2BEjVTztbQ1sks0QI-2Fy-2Biq81N-2FUtI0KaPbRrLEVGG2UDhWGUF-2FunUPydpGLmGWnDORcKsUBpq0mYPTEChXYbO2cfs8skyUq61VGS18AefIk-2BZGH3eqmtNEKgfWi9f5sxtSqQzpCzVFLzXIa7WJgjo8A081mFIBjEoKTh1fAu4vZHMS1GdZI2AsIyBkK4e6P-2FpcRfJvByBbXzpUF5K81CkgAp83QlBWssavVZ6Nsgcj4gZq6s0NGuBdXiaObLVA-2Fg1JWibIXPclsckfnvvE1vVZL1mXPWZiN-2BSVPDmCvjrYvhHmMRRBFr3OkMiC8jfrgUsLpUaDV21edZSXBzWa5PxDmuen6IJX8CYf-2FEe2oJkvvcAzEpoDdZ3ElD7EpnHr89ohWOsA295rUNBYMLSH4KfB3tk0DWtPo1RKZMuRJzFg85XaQ4DjZy1LR3y7xcq4nB9u35jIwt3Pa8tvwiBcgG4BrO-2Fx7CLu5GRb56b95Qhh3U-2FlWvZcDaoDz6O238oE545fCicrjonaH4hkfRa-2FxJ0fzIjmbgx1NYhsAZEbV5G1PmjKzyR7dzB-2BWzYLmVeV1mgQ116K5spkUPWgsmW6D-2BcxvvuUHA-3D-3D) shows a majority of Marylanders want to see another Republican win the governor's race in 2022!
**Marylanders do not want to go back to the days of one-party rule and Martin O'Malley's 43 tax increases.**
**Because you know every one of my opponents is going to raise your taxes.**

You remember what it felt like when one party controlled all branches of government in Maryland -- your taxes went up time and time again because there was no one to stop them... and because they could.
**As****your governor, I will not only fight against tax increases, I will fight for tax relief every year I am in office.**

I am running to stand up for every hardworking Marylander -- every working family -- every parent who wants to give the best opportunity to your children -- and every retiree who wants to stay in the state they love.

_But I cannot do it without you._

[**The last day of October is tomorrow and our average contribution is $42! clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Tomorrow is the last day of October - and we’re SO close to our goal! The latest shows a majority of Marylanders want to see another Republican win the governor's race in 2022! Marylanders do not want to go back to the days of one-party rule and Martin O'Malley's 43 tax increases. Because you know every one of my opponents is going to raise your taxes. You remember what it felt like when one party controlled all branches of government in Maryland -- your taxes went up time and time again because there was no one to stop them... and because they could. Asyour governor, I will not only fight against tax increases, I will fight for tax relief every year I am in office. I am running to stand up for every hardworking Marylander -- every working family -- every parent who wants to give the best opportunity to your children -- and every retiree who wants to stay in the state they love. But I cannot do it without you. Thank you for your support and commitment to making Maryland the best place to live, work and raise a family. Sincerely, Kelly Schulz | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

body:
| | | **[With the Virginia Governor's race just THREE days away, all-star Democrats are rising up to help get Terry McAuliffe over the finish line. But we know this race matters beyond just Virginia -- because if Democrats lose, Republicans nationwide will think that our House Majority is theirs for the taking. That's why we're calling on 8,000 more grassroots supporters to rise up in HISTORIC numbers before our End of Month Deadline in 24 hours to defend our House Majority. Can you chip in $3 to elect House Democrats straight away?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

We're fired up like never before.

_**FIRST: **_

First Lady Jill Biden went to Virginia to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot -- _and called on grassroots Democrats to join the fight:_

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcX_dY~)

_**THEN: **_

Stacey Abrams jumped into action -- _and reminded us that the stakes are sky high:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/NaPAfrezm_J_)_

**_NOW:_**

**[We need to join Jill and Stacey in the fight to defeat Trump's Republicans -- _wherever they 're running for office._ And since our House Majority is one of their top targets, it's on us to show the world that we're prepared to defend our House Democrats -- no matter what happens in Virginia in just three days. So please, can you chip in $3 before our End of Month Deadline to defeat House Republicans and protect our House Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)

---

Right now the world is watching and waiting to see if we have the support we need to defend our House Democrats from Trump's Republicans.

And we know the GOP is hoping Virginia's election will boost their chances of taking back the House Majority next year.

**That 's why we need to be prepared for any outcome -- _good or bad. _**__

****[So we're calling for a MASSIVE fundraising surge -- 8,000 more grassroots gifts before our End of Month Deadline -- to defend our House Democrats. Can you help us send Republicans a message that our House Majority isn't going anywhere?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf493yZH_)****

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: 🚨 ALERT: I’m suing Joe Biden.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
No Americans should be threatened by their federal government with losing their jobs because their health care decisions differ from those preferred b Friend, No Americans should be threatened by their federal government with losing their jobs because their health care decisions differ from those preferred by the president of the United States. Nothing in the U.S. Constitution authorizes this unprecedented intrusion by the federal government into the personal health care decisions of millions of American workers. The president certainly does not possess power to decree it on his own. [**That’s why I’m officially taking Joe Biden to court.****I’m suing to STOP the administration’s illegal and unconstitutional COVID mandate for federal contractors.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=3a0e75435683465d868cc1588ea4adf1&_e=QJ3dOtmF3wWeB6YufFPHt1tZMzFmR1p85ZnnTNUyG4xwMYNXe2jqpml9tHfYUUjcVpmCSD5KTIk27ldhAq9taFRUPJCUU11jSY2k-2w62NFdyQPwjd1ZNWpdvoY77lpk9Wb3NNbx7WnOuDdT0gghIjnlzfWiJDAlKsS_mKIUvaZyqdrLR1J5TlxGz2OS7xaVzHeIwyVkj7N8witP7VAN768XbztliAYGs3I2tPsMMIlkjK_uNFPhrX5BrrU3_B4QLh9ABThkMLPmqE5DYOc1JEL4oBhA2kc1kzqf_T_axTAnsyiqw2Hz_LSorR1v_r5JqRtZphpKkgAYwboCrLcpCAHEZHoz01LrpjnjA1zg6XCJZu2e3HDe9Ulg0ZI5_W5Kb0B72iL1OGjwUs-eETazukgq5Xg4fWcMWQ1m2QcBHp75ktcifIxZzAvnhaU7BDA4aYkYQ1aTg8R3eeTyIIeadrfsmT8_lhLLZqQxTQC_V1A%3D) I wanted to let you know first, and make sure you had an opportunity to show whether you agree. Please, ADD YOUR NAME now to show that you’re with me! [**OPPOSE BIDEN’S MANDATES**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=3a0e75435683465d868cc1588ea4adf1&_e=QJ3dOtmF3wWeB6YufFPHt1tZMzFmR1p85ZnnTNUyG4xwMYNXe2jqpml9tHfYUUjcVpmCSD5KTIk27ldhAq9taFRUPJCUU11jSY2k-2w62NFdyQPwjd1ZNWpdvoY77lpk9Wb3NNbx7WnOuDdT0gghIjnlzfWiJDAlKsS_mKIUvaZyqdrLR1J5TlxGz2OS7xaVzHeIwyVkj7N8witP7VAN768XbztliAYGs3I2tPsMMIlkjK_uNFPhrX5BrrU3_B4QLh9ABThkMLPmqE5DYOc1JIgPIcmeKQ9KpGTzLAZTUXTQKHV94CJoA0jz5KMb0oCq0oDs_7qrrLNEp16AWtlvWnskenQNukIHTd5Ami-ulaeBFQSSozBDU9jVlGh31zo5GFnk_IveIQ0jLcfebtq1vmPk_jeqDktkRUn5BHjyoFWMHc7TU-OgG-n_sNi9fq7MJvuE5Qezud33HCHwa2-zu0rU7s0J3PmMZTLFA4Kk6ZQ%3D) [**STAND WITH DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=3a0e75435683465d868cc1588ea4adf1&_e=QJ3dOtmF3wWeB6YufFPHt1tZMzFmR1p85ZnnTNUyG4xwMYNXe2jqpml9tHfYUUjcVpmCSD5KTIk27ldhAq9taFRUPJCUU11jSY2k-2w62NFdyQPwjd1ZNWpdvoY77lpk9Wb3NNbx7WnOuDdT0gghIjnlzfWiJDAlKsS_mKIUvaZyqdrLR1J5TlxGz2OS7xaVzHeIwyVkj7N8witP7VAN768XbztliAYGs3I2tPsMMIlkjK_uNFPhrX5BrrU3_B4QLh9ABThkMLPmqE5DYOc1JDFdTbq-1kmfEDmwEuA7mZ3YN22y5MxGbI15OZApsCrZiKPPSVBxEQd8T3NLy5p5XyDQU0ihA-QcJGfzl3xjNTcpR1JstrxcKxSIE8SgjdMZUEtaOezT93k_u5aWIuEmuOSA9hv0s0bk-ddJ6x96gfiBM9NFOa0aZvqHUED4rlNbx1LZPBilOTU9O8EejFOrHR8U8SBQzqhP-XreMetAHFs%3D) We’ve already seen several major Kansas employers that rely on federal contracts, such as research universities and defense contractors, threaten their unvaccinated employees as a result of this mandate. We have to stop it. We MUST trust Kansans to make decisions for themselves and their families, and we MUST leave the federal government out of the equation. In America, concepts like rule of law, limited government, freedom and liberty still have cherished meaning and remain worth respecting and, when necessary, defending even during a pandemic. **I’m taking this fight to court. But I need to know that you’re with me.

** **[Please, friend, sign your name now to join me, and to show that you are on board with our efforts to END Biden’s illegal and unconstitutional mandates.](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=3a0e75435683465d868cc1588ea4adf1&_e=QJ3dOtmF3wWeB6YufFPHt1tZMzFmR1p85ZnnTNUyG4xwMYNXe2jqpml9tHfYUUjcVpmCSD5KTIk27ldhAq9taFRUPJCUU11jSY2k-2w62NFdyQPwjd1ZNWpdvoY77lpk9Wb3NNbx7WnOuDdT0gghIjnlzfWiJDAlKsS_mKIUvaZyqdrLR1J5TlxGz2OS7xaVzHeIwyVkj7N8witP7VAN768XbztliAYGs3I2tPsMMIlkjK_uNFPhrX5BrrU3_B4QLh9ABThkMLPmqE5DYOc1JCxrDuVAFBNXxlR9Rh5Yz6gXeMzrCS99dp5uuK9FdGY8XfoVw4nOeribOXc5ZfHFckVn1B-wZDba0jDMpYzTc3Kd8cpUxtFOPDVZv4CcoB08fKEqhdaMpm5iY3irKRa2IFye9DZDrg1wryD43Y_g8baUTAb7vZKrLvCtVggax0iyREmHD5r_i3-Z9DlsPto-7Lsl3ESHyRII1sm7C0JqbVE%3D)** Derek Schmidt | |

clean_body: No Americans should be threatened by their federal government with losing their jobs because their health care decisions differ from those preferred b Friend, No Americans should be threatened by their federal government with losing their jobs because their health care decisions differ from those preferred by the president of the United States. Nothing in the U.S. Constitution authorizes this unprecedented intrusion by the federal government into the personal health care decisions of millions of American workers. The president certainly does not possess power to decree it on his own. I wanted to let you know first, and make sure you had an opportunity to show whether you agree. Please, ADD YOUR NAME now to show that you’re with me! We’ve already seen several major Kansas employers that rely on federal contracts, such as research universities and defense contractors, threaten their unvaccinated employees as a result of this mandate. We have to stop it. We MUST trust Kansans to make decisions for themselves and their families, and we MUST leave the federal government out of the equation. In America, concepts like rule of law, limited government, freedom and liberty still have cherished meaning and remain worth respecting and, when necessary, defending even during a pandemic. I’m taking this fight to court. But I need to know that you’re with me. Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Mysteriously Cancels
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom Grounded](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorESRLqiAQqrbBif7Lp5qFsQKoiw3jWoC-KrOXjxycUYA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=real_final_oct_30&n=1) Following my criticism, Gavin Newsom has suddenly cancelled his trip to Scotland for the UN Climate Change conference. The California Globe asked: “Did Kevin Kiley shame Gov. Newsom into cancelling his much-anticipated UN trip?” A spokesperson “declined to comment about what prompted Newsom to change his plans.” Granted, the Glasgow “delegation” still includes cabinet members, legislators, and the lieutenant governor. But Newsom is grounded in California. Not that he's doing anything useful. His hapless response to the port crisis is threatening the U.S. economy. I’ve [issued a formal request](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharMTrRTIDCCsewmq9fywNJ5z1uorsKlXMISnr9m9-Do-YQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=real_final_oct_30&n=2), signed by other Republican Assembly Members, for a Special Session of the Legislature to alleviate the backlog. At the same time, five more In-N-Out locations have been shut down in the Bay Area. Florida, home to the nation's lowest COVID case rate, is telling the burger joint it’s welcome there. But it’s getting harder to fully leave California’s problems behind: Our ports throttle the national economy. Our fires pollute the rest of the country. Our political leaders fail up to the White House. In many ways, the fight for California’s future is a fight for America’s. [Support the fight against Newsom](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0KOu7WTw5uuSoUQzsIZxhqw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=real_final_oct_30&n=3) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxNGWuRc1HyXMcKYcej_YLs17Eo3ChIAEQb8joSoBD7ew&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=real_final_oct_30&n=4) Kevin Kiley

_The Washington Post_ said, **"Glenn Youngkin has failed the test of character"** and he has **"proved himself unfit for office."**

_The New York Times_ called him **"a Culture Warrior."**

subject: Will you help us match what Republicans have raised against AOC this year?

body:
In just the last few months alone, Republicans have raised a cumulative $174,249 to run against us in next year’s midterm elections.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211030-2618-header&t=1&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot)
Not many people know this, but Alexandria’s re-election was **the second-most expensive** congressional race in last year’s midterms.
Her Republican opponent raised over $10 million against our movement from corporate interests and wealthy, conservative donors. They plastered lies and insults about Alexandria on right-wing news stations and on mailers delivered to thousands of residences across the district.
Now the same forces are coming together to try and defeat Alexandria and our movement in 2022. **In just the last few months alone, Republicans have raised a cumulative $174,249 to run against us in next year’s midterm elections.**
That’s why we’ve set a goal to match that amount before the end of this month. If we can raise $174,249 in less than two days, we’ll show Republicans that their corporate and special interest dollars are still no match for our grassroots, people-powered movement.
[Can you make a $3 contribution today to help us match what Republicans have raised against us and hit our $174,249 goal before Sunday?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211030-2?refcode=em20211030-2618-P_FND_EOM_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2618_2526796_e_rqot&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211030-2?refcode=em20211030-2618-P_FND_EOM_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2618_2526796_e_rqot&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot)**
Our people-powered campaign has proven that candidates no longer need to be beholden to special interests in order to win. By making your first contribution today, you’ll be helping build momentum for progressive change, and immediately become part of a team of individuals all coming together for a common purpose: _to keep Alexandria in Congress where she can continue to fight for us and our families._
**The midterms are just around the corner, so we need to do everything we can right now to prepare for what we know will be another expensive race.**
[Please make a $3 contribution today to help us match the $174,249 that Republicans have already raised against us. We have less than two days to show them just how powerful our grassroots movement continues to be.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211030-2?refcode=em20211030-2618-P_FND_EOM_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2618_2526796_e_rqot&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211030-2?refcode=em20211030-2618-P_FND_EOM_OPP&t=23&refcode2=2618_2526796_e_rqot&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211030-2618-P_FND_EOM_OPP&t=24&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2618%2E2526796%2Ee_rqot)

body:
| | |
---
It’s official, Peter: my uncle, the most dangerous man in America, just announced he’s going to campaign for Glenn Youngkin in the Virginia governor’s race.
Terry McAuliffe needs your support right now – more than ever. **[He set a rapid response goal of raising 10,000 grassroots contributions before my uncle’s rally in Virginia, and he needs your help. Will you split a donation between Terry’s campaign and Abby Finkenauer right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38138757/314090238/-688926594?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk368-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWQyODEzOS1kZTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lwRLzjGvr65_zVlfY9tN9fOmmKYPek7qqU_LkLavl-U=)**
Glenn Youngkin might pretend he’s a moderate, pragmatic Republican.

But the truth is, he’s just as bad as Donald Trump – that’s why Donald has endorsed him eight times.

And if there were still any doubts that Glenn Youngkin and Donald are attached at the hip – they’re gone now. Donald Trump is all in for Youngkin.
We worked much too hard to stomp out right-wing extremism last year – and I’m stunned that more people aren’t stepping up to make sure my uncle’s radical followers, like Glenn Youngkin, aren’t given the chance to gain power.
**[We need your support right now. body:
Republicans are continuing to take aim at voting rights

| | | **ADD YOUR NAME: TELL THE SENATE TO END VOTER SUPPRESSION**
---

Team —

It is absolutely unconscionable that, in the year 2021, politicians are still trying to hinder voting rights and access. But after losing the House, the Senate, and the White House in 2020, Republicans are continuing to take aim at voting rights in order to undercut our Democratic House Majority — because they know that when more people vote, Democrats win.

I was so proud to cosponsor the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act through the House this summer, a historic piece of legislation which would restore the full protections of the 1965 Voting Rights Act and outlaw racially discriminatory voting practices.

**If you agree that voting rights for all must be restored and reaffirmed now,[_add your name to demand that the Senate pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and put an end to voter suppression._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38138932/314097618/672267804?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQxODA0ZS1lMTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tKogkWRkZZNVAHiil8KoSSwCcCQt9DMqXoCEUYl50Mg=&emci=5f908f94-fd38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d641804e-e139-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14239920)**

In 2021 alone, we have seen over 400 bills restricting voting access introduced in GOP-led state legislatures. Not only do these bills erode the right to vote, but these thinly veiled voter suppression bills will make it that much harder for Democrats to win and compete in competitive districts in 2022. We need to take action now to ensure that every single American can make their voices heard in the midterm elections so that we can hold Democratic control of Congress.

[_**The future of our democracy is at stake: add your name now to demand that the Senate pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and put an end to voter suppression.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38138934/314097620/672267804?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQxODA0ZS1lMTM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tKogkWRkZZNVAHiil8KoSSwCcCQt9DMqXoCEUYl50Mg=&emci=5f908f94-fd38-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d641804e-e139-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14239920)

clean_body: Republicans are continuing to take aim at voting rights | | | ADD YOUR NAME: TELL THE SENATE TO END VOTER SUPPRESSION | Team — It is absolutely unconscionable that, in the year 2021, politicians are still trying to hinder voting rights and access. But after losing the House, the Senate, and the White House in 2020, Republicans are continuing to take aim at voting rights in order to undercut our Democratic House Majority — because they know that when more people vote, Democrats win. I was so proud to cosponsor the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act through the House this summer, a historic piece of legislation which would restore the full protections of the 1965 Voting Rights Act and outlaw racially discriminatory voting practices. If you agree that voting rights for all must be restored and reaffirmed now, | In 2021 alone, we have seen over 400 bills restricting voting access introduced in GOP-led state legislatures. Not only do these bills erode the right to vote, but these thinly veiled voter suppression bills will make it that much harder for Democrats to win and compete in competitive districts in 2022. We need to take action now to ensure that every single American can make their voices heard in the midterm elections so that we can hold Democratic control of Congress. | Thank you for standing with me on this crucial issue, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

| | In 2010, I was supposed to lose, you know. It was the first midterm since the election of Barack Obama, America was pulling itself out of a recession, and the pundits all said Republicans were predestined to flip the Senate red. And me? I was the Democratic Senate Majority Leader in swing state Nevada. **I had a giant target on my back.** But we ran a disciplined people-powered campaign -- _and we kept Nevada blue._ Now the pundits are saying there are echoes of 2010 and my friend Governor Steve Sisolak has a giant target on his back. [I know Steve is running a campaign to keep Nevada blue, but he needs your help to hit his end-of-month goal -- will you rush a donation immediately?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3GlhGrUsr-IDnwcvkmf23jpcVIoirpJ6l1IxsuqYTdCnvf1vV8fquVcnViyy5INEawfZOACfngeh6EomciII5etFUIT0FRcX5oFCxDExpLifyIkQBxrm8Jq5qGKRIJH7f2G2DiEc_o6x9u6pX-1ybcJL7HPK8pUxtdtv6Bi24Fs_BY1FmLiG_Ptv7PJw8LLYSP6AG27rUfOzc4EKxkUs4pUdw-DqHtvjMh8sFMrGUXtn8AGKrcTPkOREzskByQngT330O80HKWId0CMWRaACFFJdHkhBjSzk-7A7UgzG59G_D_pKON1iH_ZpzOq15Vw_uuOA/3gl/iMh47h2PTSq3lMJ7ASq0qg/h1/-GqJGoczOb61OHfWDpPqkrUuTctw0j4LxLee8Pyi1qc) | | | [Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3GlhGrUsr-IDnwcvkmf23jpcVIoirpJ6l1IxsuqYTdCnvf1vV8fquVcnViyy5INEawfbi-sXSRO-pwPHw_RJFNc7vtvQu3MbNAc2USVfII7RhQUVB9nu5is13n7O77boJOAsOmZB9W5i_1fPbW02n3UhGucgVelUd3SHW2vTDkz0jAQGFalDURa-O49X4p6W5hf3ydwOlLzLxlBZmbo0fxgXiuBmEnBPWSzuwMYYbejv9k-FYF43WCdZs8zFQfUmAp65ohoVKDCbfwZ_Kpcjrom83Mb6uAlAe4x54if6tEv5yfi6S7Q0J0KtMqM4ItqkJIVE/3gl/iMh47h2PTSq3lMJ7ASq0qg/h2/MSsuRcYam4xmZf1BoNpSUT4tDatAvSAWPWa4vnspEsk)

Look, there are some similarities between 2010. And that’s why I know Steve can win:
\-- Republicans are hellbent on nominating a rightwing extremist (and there’s a clown car of crazies running right now)
\-- From expanding health care to investing in workers, Steve Sisolak is focused on making people’s lives better (and he won’t get distracted by the GOP nonsense)
\-- Steve is running a grassroots campaign -- powered by people like you!
And running a people-powered campaign means Steve needs good Democrats like you to chip in to meet his fundraising goals.
[Will you chip in a contribution to Steve Sisolak’s Democratic campaign before the end of the month to help keep Nevada blue?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3GlhGrUsr-IDnwcvkmf23jpcVIoirpJ6l1IxsuqYTdCnvf1vV8fquVcnViyy5INEawfa7kjMA1x2kQr0qykuDcbpHQCXjvaAznTtXKeVATl8JP-j7_k4MLCstpCwRUYiARvGjInxUlK1HStpUanZFxIDMBI9vY7AnYvviCHaxcpNzA1ynUZiSzj71ZMkrhEE4MEag12OfvldrnF2PWb0MHe2w1MKTCPRJmc2dhe4ztPXLHNArghULLfCc6fTdXFKWJIFIMjzGoUozvEIgybIS6mPuet1PovtaFR5Zj3bU2K6e-XOIt7Yg6S0GOPapuS9Ejoc/3gl/iMh47h2PTSq3lMJ7ASq0qg/h3/F_2HFfIOqc1sB6qn_8z7Rqr9P2QJnEPGdZ6YxeVv8Wc)

clean_body: | | | | | In 2010, I was supposed to lose, you know. It was the first midterm since the election of Barack Obama, America was pulling itself out of a recession, and the pundits all said Republicans were predestined to flip the Senate red. And me? I was the Democratic Senate Majority Leader in swing state Nevada. I had a giant target on my back. But we ran a disciplined people-powered campaign -- and we kept Nevada blue. Now the pundits are saying there are echoes of 2010 and my friend Governor Steve Sisolak has a giant target on his back. | | | Look, there are some similarities between 2010. And that’s why I know Steve can win: \-- Republicans are hellbent on nominating a rightwing extremist (and there’s a clown car of crazies running right now) \-- From expanding health care to investing in workers, Steve Sisolak is focused on making people’s lives better (and he won’t get distracted by the GOP nonsense) \-- Steve is running a grassroots campaign -- powered by people like you! And running a people-powered campaign means Steve needs good Democrats like you to chip in to meet his fundraising goals. | | I’m counting on you. \-- Harry Harry Reid Former Senator of Nevada and Democratic Majority Leader P.S. If Steve doesn’t have the resources to get our message out, I know keeping Nevada blue will be real tough. | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. clean_body: | | | | Let’s get your town on the map! Friend, We have some exciting news! According to the most recent round of campaign finance data that was filed with the FEC, we have outraised Liberal Lisa Murkowski, here in Alaska. The Alaska Momentum is on our side! Now, let’s get your town on the map! Let’s keep the enthusiasm on our side, If you are not convinced we will win, here is one more fact that might change your mind. This same FEC report told us that only 3% of Murkowski’s donations came from Alaska. That means that 97% of her donations are from out-of-state liberal elites! It’s no wonder why Liberal Lisa is down in the polls and Kelly is FULLY ENDORSED by President Donald J. Trump! Thank you, Kelly for Alaska Finance Team | | | | ==

clean_body: | | | We’re worried about Virginia. Right now, Trump-supporting GOP extremists look poised to not just take the Governor’s office -- they look to be on the edge of sweeping the House of Delegates too. Normally that would be scary -- but right now it’s terrifying! Today is the last day of early voting in Virginia, and turnout is way down. That’s terrible news for Democrats. With Trumpists on the verge of victory, we’re counting on you to help us fight for the future of Virginia. Please don’t let us down. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: Republicans are attacking me for protecting voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend — Georgia is ground zero in our fight to keep the Senate blue, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand:
**FIRST:** Our people-powered movement defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and the Senate for Democrats.
**THEN:** Georgia Republicans started to ram through new voter suppression legislation in a shameful effort to silence voters and prevent Democrats from winning elections. Gov. Kemp (R) signed into law a _sweeping_ voter suppression bill so restrictive that Stacey Abrams calls it "Jim Crow 2.0."
**NOW:** Republicans are launching attack ads against me and my critical efforts to protect and expand voting rights — and _CNN_ confirms I'm the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection.
With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control for Mitch McConnell, and they're coming after me as their top target for defeat. I'm proud to serve as Georgia's _first ever_ Black senator and help lead the fight for voting rights — but the truth is, I can't protect my battleground seat without your urgent grassroots support.
[**So please, friend: Will you split a donation of $10 or more between our campaign and Mark Kelly's so we can keep Georgia and Arizona blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-oct21?refcode=em211030-2-15&t=1&refcode2=1579_6688874_HloJaS&akid=1579%2E6688874%2EHloJaS)

clean_body: Violent crime in Las Vegas this year alone is higher than the national average... | | | | Peter, Thanks to Governor Sisolak, the streets in Nevada are not safe. How can our families thrive when our streets are not safe? Democratic leadership caved to the Radical Left’s demands to defund the police. Now our communities are paying the price. Violent crime in Las Vegas this year is higher than the national average. That’s why we need Dean Heller as our next Governor of Nevada. It is a top priority of Dean’s to get our police the resources and the respect they deserve. Dean backs the blue. Period. He is 100% committed to fully funding and supporting our law enforcement. Our police deserve respect and the resources they need to keep our communities secure. Dean is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by the Nevada Police Union. If you think our police deserve respect, chip in to Dean’s race. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. clean_body: Did you see Derek’s last email? The end of the month is almost here, and we’re pushing hard to make sure it’s our best month yet. Derek has already Friend, Did you see Derek’s last email? The end of the month is almost here, and we’re pushing hard to make sure it’s our best month yet. Derek has already received the support of dozens of conservative leaders from all across the state this month: Law enforcement heroes, state legislators, community leaders, and more... Just about a new endorsement every day! But now we need YOU to jump on board in this critical month. As Derek explained, we need to end October on a good note if we want to sustain our efforts through the rest of the year. We are so grateful to you for stepping up and helping us save Kansas from another four years of failed leadership. Derek is ready to turn Kansas around and restore the conservative values that we all hold dear. We just need your help to get him to the governor’s office. With the Far Left doing everything they can to seize power in Kansas and force their radical agenda onto our hardworking families, we need to stand strong together now more than ever before. Thanks, Team Schmidt \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, October is coming to a close, and that means that we only have a few days left to finish out this month. I know it’s hard to believe, but as we flip the calendar over to November, we’ll be just ONE YEAR away from election day. While that is very exciting, it’s also a fact I take very seriously... We don’t know what the next year has in store for us, and we need to be ready for anything. My opponent Laura Kelly’s campaign is bankrolled by Far-Left special interests and coastal liberal elites. We’re counting on as many Kansas Patriots as possible to step up right now and help us fight back against what will undoubtedly be a large war chest. Time and time again, Laura Kelly has proven that she’s just not up to the job. That’s why we need to spread our message far and wide across Kansas: That I’m the candidate to get things back on track here in Kansas, and cement our conservative values in place for decades to come. I can’t do that without you. I need YOU to help us end October strong so we can prepare to counter anything Laura Kelly and her allies among the national Far Left liberals and in the media throw at us in this race. I’m so glad to have you on my team, friend. Together, we will win this fight and restore strong leadership to Kansas. Thanks, Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

| | Derek, I know it’s late, but I had to get one last message out to you before tomorrow.

**This is the most important election in the country this year. Virginia is a must win for Democrats.**

Last year, we worked tirelessly to stand up to Donald Trump. We stood up for our children and our future and our morals — and we voted against right-wing extremism in its entirety.

But now, our progress is under attack. If my right-wing opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes governor, that’ll lend legitimacy to his dangerous brand of politics and it will grant Donald Trump a path back to the presidency.

And right now, **Youngkin winning is a real possibility.**

Derek, we have 24 hours until the final fundraising deadline of this campaign, and our last matching opportunity expires at midnight tomorrow.

_**[So I’m asking, will you chip in to my campaign? We only have 3 days left, and I need all the help I can get so we can turn out a record number of voters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38139312/314113098/-2023814932?refcode=20211030.12_TM_10JU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzExMWE3Yy1mMjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=brcQcgMG6R-eUaayi_mM99LgqfQtQEz1ptmhbL0Sd0w=)**_

Glenn Youngkin has shown us who he is. He has attacked our democracy. He has professed backwards, right-wing ideologies. And he has proven himself entirely unfit to lead.

**But right now, we have an opportunity to deny darkness its day and maintain the drumbeat of progress.**

_**[I hope you’ll join me by making a matched contribution of any amount to my campaign for progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38139313/314113099/-2023814932?refcode=20211030.12_TM_10JU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzExMWE3Yy1mMjM5LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=brcQcgMG6R-eUaayi_mM99LgqfQtQEz1ptmhbL0Sd0w=)**_

Together,

Terry McAuliffe

clean_body: and Republicans are ahead. | | | Derek, we’re in trouble. Not only are polls showing Trump extremists on the move in Virginia. Not only are national Republicans pumping money into the Virginia elections. Not only have top election analysts called Virginia a “tossup” and the most competitive election of 2021. But with early voting ending TODAY , Republican enthusiasm is far surpassing Democratic enthusiasm. We’re running out of time, and right now Republicans are ahead. Help us turn things around -- now. If we fail, we’ll see Republicans in Virginia start pushing the exact same anti-abortion, anti-LGBTQ, anti-voter, pro-gun bills that we’ve seen pop up across the country in GOP extremist-led states. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . body:
| | | **POLL: Biden, Trump tied in potential 2024 match-up**
I know you're busy, so I promise to keep this quick. Here are the facts:
\-- Trump has suggested he'll run for President if Republicans flip the House.
\-- A shocking poll shows he's now TIED with Biden for the Presidency.
\-- And his Republicans have raised $105 MILLION to destroy our Majority.

I refuse to sit on my hands, lose the House to Trump's cronies, and let them destroy all of the progress we've made.

**[But I need your help to make their plans completely BACKFIRE. I'm calling for 7,000 more Democrats to step up before my End of Month Deadline in just 24 hours so we can fight back to OUTRAISE Republicans, EVISCERATE their plan to take our Majority, and hand them a HUMILIATING defeat. Will you rush $3 to defend our House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: 10/31, 11:59 PM
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

I won't mince words:

We won't stand a chance against Trump and his Republicans as long as they hold a cash advantage over my Democrats.

**And right now, we 're struggling to keep up. We need to pick up the pace ASAP.**

**[That's why I'm calling for a massive Democratic fundraising surge -- 7,000 more gifts before my End of Month Deadline in just 24 hours -- to defeat Trump's House Republicans and stop them from EVER barging back into power again. I can't overstate how important your $3 is before my deadline in 24 hours. Can I count on you to step up and help defend my House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)**

body:

Folks, I won’t lie to you — if Democrats lose in Virginia, it’s
game over.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5747?t=1007&akid=1276%2E3611125%2EVwGoIZ ]Don’t let it happen — split a donation between Tim Ryan and Terry
McAuliffe’s campaign right now to help him in the final days of his
campaign.

If Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate pulls off a win this year,

midterm elections.

And if Republicans do well next year, Donald Trump will be all set for his
2024 run for president.

It’s that simple.

name: Team Booker
subject: Doing this the only way we know how
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

We’ll get straight to the point,
Peter.

There’s less than 48 hours until our end-of-month fundraising deadline
tomorrow. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12416?refcode=em20211030-1126&t=1001&akid=1126%2E346206%2EapM7nu ]Can you chip in $4.80 to our campaign to help us hit our
goal? →

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12416?refcode=em20211030-1126&t=1002&akid=1126%2E346206%2EapM7nu ]DONATE $4.80 →

Running a campaign and reaching out to Kentuckians — especially
Kentuckians who’ve been ignored, left behind, and failed by our leaders —
isn’t easy.

And running a campaign by the grassroots — without big checks from Big
Pharma and Wall Street — is unprecedented, especially in our Commonwealth.
But our movement doesn’t respond to corporations and the ultra-wealthy. It
responds to the people of Kentucky, and the people of Kentucky alone.

Your $4.80 donation today will help us:

* Train our organizers so we can effectively (and directly) reach out to
voters in all 120 counties of our Commonwealth
* Hire key campaign staff to expand our capacity
* Acquire digital tools so we can get our message out to millions of
Kentuckians
* Provide PPE for our campaign office
* Reimburse our organizers for gas as they travel across Kentucky
* Grow our historic movement to unite Kentuckians, from the hood to the
holler

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12417?refcode=em20211030-1126&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1126%2E346206%2EapM7nu ]Every dollar makes a difference when it comes to achieving these goals
and more.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12416?refcode=em20211030-1126&t=1023&akid=1126%2E346206%2EapM7nu ]DONATE $4.80 →

We’re trying to send a people’s champion to represent our Commonwealth in
the Senate, and to end Rand Paul’s corruption. And we’re doing this only
way we know how: from the grassroots, and with your generosity and
support.

Peter, we can
build a better, brighter future for everyone in our Commonwealth. The
first step is replacing Rand Paul — and defeating his corporate war chest.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12417?refcode=em20211030-1126&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1126%2E346206%2EapM7nu ]So if you’re ready to rise up in this fight, can we count on you to
make a $4.80 donation right now to our campaign and help us reach our
goal? We rely on people just like you, reading emails like this, to power
our movement.

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211030-1126-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1126_346206_apM7nu&akid=1126%2E346206%2EapM7nu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1126%2E346206%2EapM7nu

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
